Semasa lahir, bayi mungkin tidak menunjukkan tanda tetapi kemudiannya bayi mungkin mengalami episod kulit kebiruan apabila menangis atau menyusu yang dipanggil “Tet Spells”. Kerana darah mereka tidak membawa oksigen yang mencukupi. Tetralogy of Fallot dikenalpasti apabila melakukan detailed scan Sono Ultrasound. Kadangkala, bergantung kepada berapa parah kecacatan dan gejala, Tetralogy of Fallot tidak dikesan sehingga dewasa. Terdapat beberapa perkara yang mungkin meningkatkan risiko bayi dilahirkan dengan TOF ini : Ibu dijangkiti dengan virus semasa hamil seperti rubella Faktor nutrisi pemakanan Pengambilan alkohol semasa hamil Ibu hamil berumur lebih dari 40 tahun Ibu/Bapa yang mengalami Tetralogy of Fallot Kehadiran Syndrome Down/ DiGeorge Syndrome pada bayi Sekiranya kandungan dikesan mengalami masalah Tetralogy of Fallot, pemeriksaan terperinci harus dilakukan kerana Tetralogy of Fallot kadangkala hadir bersama ciri-ciri Down Syndrome. Pentingnya untuk menjalani pemeriksaan Sono Ultrasound yang terperinci agar rancangan rawatan selepas kelahiran dan semasa kelahiran dapat membuat persediaan rapi untuk mengelakkan sebarang risiko. Komplikasi buat penghidap Tetralogy of Fallot ialah: Tumbesaran dan perkembangan yang lambat Arrhythmias – masalah pada degupan jantung tidak teratur Kematian akibat serangan jantung, walaupun selepas melakukan pembedahan Berlakunya sawan semasa tidak cukup oksigen

input: Blog: Thrombophilia Article | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 25/8/2023 Thrombophilia Punca Keguguran Apa tu THROMBOPHILIA? Ia adalah keadaan dimana proses pembekuan darah menjadi mudah membeku. Maka, terjadinya gumpalan darah (thrombosis) pada pembuluh darah. THROMBOPHILIA adalah penyakit genetik yang diwarisi dan ia menyebabkan keguguran berulang pada Ibu hamil. Ia boleh menyebabkan saluran darah yang membekalkan oksigen dan nutrien pada bayi tersumbat. Sekiranya saluran darah tersumbat, akan berlaku gangguan pada perkembangan janin. Risiko Thrombophilia pada Ibu hamil ialah : Preeclampsia Platelet darah rendah IUGR – pertumbuhan bayi yang terbantut Kematian janin Thrombosis Thrombophilia tidak boleh sembuh atau hilang dengan sendiri. Risiko Thrombosis meningkat sebanyak 6x sewaktu hamil. Rawatan Thrombophilia : Heparin Dan Clexane : Ubat cairkan darah akan diberikan ketika mengandung Memakai stokin TED bagi mengelakkan darah beku berlaku. Thrombophilia dapat didiagnosis dengan : Ujian darah Ujian akan dilakukan selepas Ibu hamil mengalami thrombosis Saringan tentang sejarah keluarga yang mengalami Thrombophilia Berlaku kelahiran dimana bayi mengalami masalah perkembangan terbantut (IUGR) Darah Tinggi (Preeclampsia) Keguguran berulang Ibu hamil yang didiagnos dengan Thrombophilia perlukan pemerhatian khas. Melalui Sono Ultrasound, serta pemerhatian pada aliran darah di Tali pusat dan plasenta janin. Technography Plasmic Aliran darah plasenta adalah kaedah penting yang dapat menentukan komplikasi yang berlaku pada peringkat awal. Pemeriksaan Ibu dan janin dalam kandungan, pemeriksaan Sono Ultrasound secara berkala adalah perlu dan ikutlah saranan doktor anda supaya pemantauan dan risiko dapat dikurangkan.

input: Perbezaan Ultrasound Scan: Jenis, Kegunaan & Bila Sesuai
expected: Perbezaan ultrasound scan 2D ScanHitam/putih scan di klinik/hospital untuk mengetahui perkembangan bayi. Terdapat 3 jenis 2D scan iaitu 2D Growth Scan & 2D Full Detail scan/2D Partial Detail Scan. 2D Growth Scan (4-40 minggu)Check baby saiz, placenta, air ketuban, kedudukan tetapi tidak check kecacatan baby. 2D FULL Detail Scan (20-25 minggu)Check kecacatan baby termasuk kira jari kaki dan tangan, tulang, organ dalaman, otak, muka, jantina, tulang belakang, tengok jantung berlubang, ketepatan setinggi 90% fizikal kecacatan baby boleh dikesan. 2D PARTIAL Detail Scan (26-30 minggu)Check kecacatan baby tetapi tidak akan mengira jari tangan dan jari kaki baby sebab baby padat, otak structur tidak akan diukur sebab tidak accurate. Tulang baby, tulang belakang, organ, muka, ketepatan setinggi 60% fizikal kecacatan baby akan dikesan. 3D 4D Scan3D scan merupakan gambar tidak bergerak manakala 4D scan ialah video baby secara live. HD Scan / 5D ScanHD scan sama dengan 3D4D, ianya bukan 5D scan, sebab tiada extra dimensi yang boleh dikelihatan. Beza dengan 3D4D scan ialah, texture baby kelihatan macam kulit baby akan tetapi banyak klinik namakan HD scan sebagai 5D scan. Untuk kurang keliruan, HD/5D scan dikategorikan dalam sama. 6D Scan SilhouetteGambar 6D scan adalah ‘transparent’. Jika bayi anda terlindung di sebalik uri, scan 6D ni boleh menembusinya. VR ScanAnda memakai VR box untuk melihatkan bayi anda dalam bentuk 5D scan, anda boleh melihatkan bayi anda secara dekat.

input: Blog: Tips buat Ibu hamil yang berada di kawasan banjir | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 29/8/2023 Tips buat Ibu hamil yang berada di kawasan banjir Buat ibu-ibu hamil khasnya yang berada di Kawasan Banjir, jom periksa checklist dibawah sebagai persediaan sekiranya Ibu perlu ke hospital sebagai langkah berjaga–jaga : 1. Pastikan Ibu menyimpan semua dokumen penting seperti Buku Pink, Kad Pengenalan, Sijil Nikah dan dokumen-dokumen lain yang diperlukan sekiranya perlu ke hospital. 2. Simpan baju & keperluan asas penting, kelengkapan bersalin, keperluan anak yang bakal lahir didalam beg dan letak beg di tempat yang mudah untuk dicapai sekiranya kecemasan berlaku. 3. Sekiranya boleh, buat Ibu hamil yang berada di trimester ketiga ini untuk dapatkan tempat tinggal sementara yang berdekatan dengan hospital 4. Simpan nombor Telefon Hospital berdekatan, klinik sekiranya berlaku kecemasan. 5. Berjaga-jaga dengan penyakit bawaan air bah(Banjir) seperti jangkitan pernafasan akut, konjunktivitis (sakit mata), cirit-birit, disentri, hepatitis A, taun, demam kepialu, keracunan makanan, demam denggi dan jangkitan kulit. Leptospirosis boleh berlaku. Asalnya adalah bakteria Leptospira yang wujud dalam air kencing haiwan mamalia seperti tikus, kucing, anjing dan lembu. Ia boleh berjangkit kepada manusia yang terdedah atau bersentuhan secara langsung dengan air banjir yang dicemari air kencing haiwan yang dijangkiti bakteria ini. Simpan ubat-ubatan dan vitamin didalam beg khas kalis air agar ubat-ubatan ini tidak rosak.

input: Blog: Tips gerakkan baby sewaktu scan Sono Ultrasound | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 3/8/2023Tips gerakkan baby sewaktu scan Sono Ultrasound Sono Ultrasound dilakukan untuk menentukan kesihatan bayi, kedudukan bayi dan juga jantina bayi.Sesetengah ibu bapa juga memilih untuk melakukan Sono Ultrasound dalam 3D, 4D dan 5D untuk mendapatkan gambaran yang lebih baik tentang rupa bayi dalam kandungan. Bayi yang aktif memberi peluang yang lebih baik buat Sonographer untuk melihat dan mengukur semua bahagian badan bayi. Jika bayi menghadap kearah tulang belakang ibu, atau melengkung ke dalam kedudukan yang menyembunyikan muka, mungkin agak sukar untuk melihat ciri-ciri tertentu. Jadi, jom kita lihat tips-tips yang mommies boleh guna supaya bayi tidak tidur & menyembunyikan muka sewaktu sesi Sono Ultrasound nanti : 1) pengambilan gula yang berpada sebelum sesi Sono Ultrasound kerana ia dapat merangsang bayi untuk bergerak aktif. 2) Berjalan-jalan selama 10 minit kerana aktiviti fizikal tidak akan membiarkan bayi anda tidur. 3) Usap dan gosok perut dengan lembut biasanya akan mendapat tindak balas daripada bayi sewaktu sesi Sono Ultrasound dijalankan. 4) Pilih temujanji Sono Ultrasound sewaktu anda tahu bayi anda paling aktif. 5) Makan sebelum sesi Sono Ultrasound anda kerana bayi biasanya aktif selepas makan. 6) Bawa minuman sejuk sewaktu sesi Sono Ultrasound anda kerana air yang sejuk dapat merangsang pergerakan bayi. Harap dapat membantu ibu-ibu membuat persiapan sebelum sesi Sono Ultrasound nanti.

input: Blog: Tips Mengurangkan Masalah Perut kejang Ketika Hamil | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 3/10/2023Tips Mengurangkan Masalah Perut kejang Ketika Hamil Kekejangan pada perut adalah perkara biasa semasa hamil. Sekiranya rasa sakit itu tidak kuat dan hilang apabila menukar kedudukan ia adalah perkara biasa sewaktu hamil. Cara mengurangkan masalah kekejangan pada perut ialah : 1. Berehat atau mandi air suam akan membantu melegakan rasa kekejangan pada perut. – Senaman yang kerap akan menguatkan dan mengencangkan otot perut. – Semasa hamil, Ibu mudah merasa kekejangan berpunca dari ligamen. Ia terjadi kerana ligamen meregang untuk menyokong berat kandungan yang semakin membesar. Ia terasa seperti kekejangan yang tajam pada sebelah perut bawah. – Berhati-hati semasa membuat senaman. Elakkan untuk berbaring telentang selama lebih daripada beberapa minit pada satu-satu masa selepas trimester pertama, kerana ini boleh mengurangkan aliran darah ke bayi. 2. Makan makanan seimbang yang tinggi dengan serat – Sembelit adalah perkara yang biasa berlaku semasa hamil. Untuk memastikan najis lembut dan pergerakan usus lancar, dapatkan banyak serat makanan daripada buah-buahan segar, sayur-sayuran, bijirin serta buah-buahan kering. Minum banyak air dan kerap bersenam. 3. Letakkan minyak angin pada abdomen dan tuamkan dengan tuala yang direndam dengan air hangat. – Banyak angin & gas di dalam usus/perut juga menyebabkan kekejangan pada perut. 4. Dapatkan tidur malam yang nyenyak, dan berehat dengan meletakkan kaki ke atas selama sekurang-kurangnya 15 minit beberapa kali sehari. Kekejangan pada perut biasanya tidak perlu dirisaukan tetapi kadangkala ia boleh menjadi petanda sesuatu yang lebih serius yang perlu diperiksa. Sentiasa penuhi temujanji pemeriksaan prenatal dan segera dapatkan rawatan sekiranya kekejangan itu disertai dengan darah dan sakit kuat.

input: Blog: Tips sembuh Luka Ceaser | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 10/10/2023 Tips Sembuh Luka Ceaser Dengan Cepat Cuba bergerak dan minum air secukupnya : Ibu yang bersalin dengan kaedah ceaser berisiko untuk mendapat darah beku (Thrombosis). Salah satu punca terjadinya darah beku ialah kurang bergerak dan kurang minum air. Pemakanan seimbang : Makanan seimbang dan tinggi protein perlu untuk proses penyembuhan luka dan banyakkan buah-buahan serta sayur-sayuran untuk penghadaman yang lebih baik. Jaga kebersihan dan basuh tangan dengan bersih sebelum menyentuh kawasan luka : Sentiasa pastikan luka ceaser kering dengan cara anginkan kawasan luka dan pastikan kawasan luka dan sekitarnya bersih dari kotoran. Ubat tahan sakit : Ambil ubat tahan sakit sekiranya perlu mengikut aturan dan dos yang ditetapkan. Gunakan abdominal binder : Pastikan abdominal binder tidak terlalu ketat dan binder ini bertujuan untuk menyokong kawasan abdomen terutamanya sewaktu batuk, bersin untuk mengurangkan gegaran. Dapatkan rehat yang secukupnya untuk proses penyembuhan luka cepat sembuh. Segera dapatkan rawatan sekiranya Ibu mendapati terdapat kelainan pada luka ceaser seperti, terasa panas pada luka, merah, keluar darah, cecair atau nanah.

input: Blog: Transabdominal scan vs Transvaginal scan | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 3/8/2023 Transabdominal scan vs Transvaginal scan Terdapat dua jenis Ultrasound yang dapat dijalankan iaitu Transabdominal scan TAS (perut) dan Transvaginal scan TVS (melalui vagina). Kedua-duanya membolehkan imej dipancarkan pada skrin monitor ultrasound. Alat Sono Ultrasound menggunakan kuasa bunyi yang dipantulkan apabila terkena objek dan pantulan bunyi ini menghasilkan imej pada skrin. TRANSABDOMINAL SCAN Prosedur dimulai dengan meletakkan gel lutsinar pada bahagian perut kerana ia melancarkan pergerakan transducer dan menghalang hadirnya udara antara kulit dan transducer. Transabdominal scan ini bukan sahaja digunakan ketika hamil, tetapi boleh digunakan untuk memeriksa Ginjal, Hati, Pankreas, Usus dan organ-organ lain. TRANSVAGINAL SCAN Prosedur Transvaginal adalah dengan memasukkan scanner ultrasound beberapa inci kedalam faraj. Ia memaparkan imej yang lebih jelas kerana lebih dekat dengan rahim . Imej yang terhasil adalah terhad kepada organ yang berhampiran pelvis sahaja. TVS digunakan apabila memeriksa kandungan untuk : Memeriksa kandungan luar rahim (ektopik) Memeriksa cyst pada ovari Memeriksa denyutan jantung bayi diawal kehamilan Serviks. Sekiranya ada risiko kelahiran pramatang atau keguguran Rahim & ovari Jika ada masalah pada Plasenta Kesimpulannya, kedua-dua kaedah ini adalah tepat untuk digunakan. Hanya tujuan pemeriksaan dijalankan yang dapat menentukan kaedah yang diperlukan.

input: Blog : Saluran Peranakan Tersumbat | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 25/8/2023 Saluran Peranakan Tersumbat Saluran Peranakan Tersumbat atau Blocked Fallopian Tube adalah keadaan dimana Fallopian Tube (saluran Peranakan) yang menghubungkan ovari dan rahim telah tersumbat. Jika tiub fallopio tersumbat, laluan untuk sperma sampai ke telur, serta laluan kembali ke rahim untuk telur yang disenyawakan, disekat. Wanita mempunyai dua tiub fallopian dan kadangkala salah satu tiub tersumbat dan mungkin kedua-duanya tersumbat. Antara punca saluran Peranakan Tersumbat ialah : Tisu parut Berlakunya jangkitan bakteria seperti Chlamydia dan Gonorrhea mampu menghancurkan silia dalam tiub dan menyebabkan tiub tersumbat. Perekatan pelvis. Saluran Peranakan Tersumbat boleh terjadi selepas bersalin Endometriosis Radang Pelvis Penyakit Kelamin Sejarah kehamilan luar rahim Fibroid Hydrosalphinx Tiub fallopian juga boleh rosak jika terdapat jangkitan bakteria yang merebak hingga bahagian dalam rahim dan faraj. Kebanyakan Wanita tidak sedar mengalami masalah Fallopian yang tersumbat ini kerana tiada gejala khas. Bagaimanapun, ia mungkin dapat dikesan apabila timbul masalah untuk mendapatkan zuriat, dan pemeriksaan lanjut seperti HSG (histerosalpingogram) dan pembedahan laparoskopi dapat memastikan kondisi ini. Sentiasa peka tentang kesihatan diri dan sebarang perubahan pada diri. Dapatkan rawatan dan pemeriksaan dengan segera.

input: Blog: Ultrasound scan hanya untuk Ibu hamil? | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 25/7/2023 Scan Rahim Hanya Untuk Wanita Mengandung? Ramai sangka Sono Ultrasound hanya perlu apabila seseorang itu hamil. Scan rahim juga bertujuan untuk memeriksa organ peranakan wanita seperti rahim, serviks dan ovari. Untuk mengesan sebarang ketidaknormalan seperti cyst, fibroid dan masalah lain dengan melakukan Sono Ultrasound atau ultrabunyi pelvis. Antara kondisi yang dapat dilihat melalui Scan rahim ialah Kondisi Rahim. Ia dapat menentukan keadaan rahim. Rahim yang normal adalah berbentuk buah pear dan terletak pada ruang pelvis. Contohnya, rahim bercabang (Retroverted Uterus) : kebanyakkan wanita tidak menyedari kondisi rahim bercabang. Ia hanya dapat dikesan melalui Sono Ultrasound/ Pelvis Ultrasound. Ia boleh menyebabkan kesukaran untuk hamil, period yang tidak menentu dan keguguran yang mungkin berulang. Masalah ketidaknormalan rahim : Agenesis (Rahim tak terbentuk) Samada rahim nya tidak terbentuk atau rahimnya pendek/kecil. Kebiasaannya, kes sebegini, mereka tidak didatangi haid dan tidak dapat mengandung. Ia boleh dirawat dengan pembedahan. Unicornuate Uterus (Rahim ada 1 tanduk) Saiz Unicornuate uterus adalah setengah dari saiz rahim yang normal dan terbentuk seperti tanduk. Bagi kes begini, hanya mempunyai 1 tiub fallopio. Rahim jenis ini sangat jarang dijumpai dan ianya terjadi apabila sel-sel tisu yang terlibat dalam pembentukan rahim tidak berkembang dengan sempurna. Tiub fallopio dan ovari yang normal akan ada peluang untuk mengandung. Tetapi, peratus keguguran juga tinggi. Uterus Didelphys Adalah dimana terdapat dua ruang pada rahim dan terdapat dua serviks/pangkal rahim. Dan ada juga kes terdapat dua vagina. Kes ini sangat jarang dijumpai. Septate Uterus Terdapat pembahagian di tengah-tengah rahim (septum). Rahim begini adalah sukar untuk hamil dan terdapat risiko keguguran. Bicornuate Uterus (rahim ada 2 tanduk dan berbentuk hati) Rahim jenis ini berbentuk love dan seperti dua tanduk.

input: Blog: Ultrasound scan hanya untuk Ibu hamil? | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: h rahim (septum). Rahim begini adalah sukar untuk hamil dan terdapat risiko keguguran. Bicornuate Uterus (rahim ada 2 tanduk dan berbentuk hati) Rahim jenis ini berbentuk love dan seperti dua tanduk. Ada peluang untuk hamil tetapi risiko keguguran tinggi. Arcuate Uterus Arcuate Uterus kelihatan normal tetapi bahagian atasnya sedikit kedalam. Rahim jenis ini biasa dijumpai dan tiada masalah untuk mengandung. Tidak semua masalah rahim jenis-jenis seperti diatas memerlukan rawatan. Ada yang boleh dirawat dan yang tak boleh dirawat. Kebiasaannya, wanita yang mengalami masalah pada haid, sakit bahagian bawah perut dan tidak mengandung adalah antara ciri-ciri yang memerlukan Sono Ultrasound atau scan pelvis.

input: Blog: Uri melekat sewaktu hamil bahayakan nyawa Ibu | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 24/7/2023 Uri Melekat Sewaktu Hamil Bahayakan Nyawa Ibu Selain mengalami masalah Placenta Previa (masalah uri rendah), ibu hamil tersebut juga mungkin mengalami masalah rahim melekat. Pernah tak ibu-ibu dengar tentang Placenta Accreta? Jom tengok beberapa jenis uri melekat yang dapat dikenalpasti : 1️. Uri melekat atau Placenta Accreta – adalah keadaan yang serius dimana uri bayi melekat pada dinding rahim. Kebiasaannya, uri/placenta akan terlepas dari dinding rahim selepas proses kelahiran. Bagi kes ‘Placenta Accreta’, uri tersebut melekat kekal pada rahim dan boleh menyebabkan tumpah darah yang teruk. 2️. Placenta Increta – Uri tertanam didalam otot dinding rahim (lapisan miometrium) 3️. Placenta Percreta – Uri tertanam sehingga menembusi keseluruhan dinding rahim dan melibatkan organ berdekatan iaitu pundi kencing dan rektum Faktor yang meningkatkan risiko terjadinya Uri melekat : Antara risiko uri melekat mungkin dialami ibu yang mengalami masalah berikut Placenta Previa Ibu yang mengalami placenta previa terdapat kemungkinan 10% mengalami masalah uri melekat. Info mengenai placenta previa Pernah menjalani pembedahan pada rahim, seperti D&C Pernah menjalani pembedahan fibroid Pernah menjalani pembedahan caesarean pada kelahiran yang lepas Ibu yang pernah melalui pembedahan melibatkan rahim, menyebabkan otot pada dinding rahim menjadi nipis menjadi punca uri melekat pada rahim apabila plasenta yang menempel pada peringkat awal kehamilan tertanam dengan lebih dalam. Placenta accreta sukar dikesan hinggalah proses kelahiran berlaku. Tetapi, dengan Sono Ultrasound, beberapa keraguan mungkin dapat dikesan dan placenta accreta mungkin dapat di diagnos. Sekiranya keraguan mengenai kondisi Placenta Accreta ini dikesan, Ibu akan melalui beberapa Sono Ultrasound yang lebih detail dan ujian radiologi MRI akan dilakukan. Placenta Accreta selalunya diketahui apabila plasenta tidak dapat dikeluarkan selepas 30minit bayi dilahirkan.

input: Blog: Uri melekat sewaktu hamil bahayakan nyawa Ibu | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: lalui beberapa Sono Ultrasound yang lebih detail dan ujian radiologi MRI akan dilakukan. Placenta Accreta selalunya diketahui apabila plasenta tidak dapat dikeluarkan selepas 30minit bayi dilahirkan. Rawatan bagi masalah Placenta Accreta: Sekiranya Placenta Accreta dikesan sewaktu sesi Sono Ultrasound, proses kelahiran dapat dirancang. Pakar dapat membuat persediaan supaya proses kelahiran lebih terancang. Cara terbaik untuk melahirkan ialah melalui Caesarean dan pembuangan rahim (histerektomi) mungkin perlu dilakukan.

input: Blog: Uterus organ yang hebat | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 28/8/2023 𝗨𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘂𝘀 𝗢𝗿𝗴𝗮𝗻 𝗬𝗮𝗻𝗴 𝗛𝗲𝗯𝗮𝘁! Uterus atau Rahim adalah organ yang terdapat didalam tubuh Wanita. Ia adalah organ berongga yang terletak di pelvis. Ovari menghasilkan telur yang bergerak melalui tiub fallopio dan apabila telur telah meninggalkan ovari, ia boleh disenyawakan dan menempel didalam lapisan rahim. Fungsi utama rahim adalah untuk menampung janin yang sedang berkembang sebelum ia dilahirkan. Rahim adalah berukuran 6-8cm (2.4 hingga 3.1 inci) panjang, ketebalan dinding adalah lebih kurang 2-3cm (0.8 hingga 1.2 inci). Lebar Rahim adalah berbeza-beza, kebiasaanya kira-kira 6cm lebar. Jadi, bayangkan Saiz asal rahim yang berukuran 6cm lebih kurang saiz sebiji lemon akan membesar hingga saiz sebiji tembikai. Dan proses selepas kelahiran, saiz rahim kembali kepada saiz asal. Ajaib kan? Rahim memainkan peranan penting dalam organ pembiakan. Ia bertanggungjawab untuk implantasi dan penyuburan ovum yang disenyawakan. Selain itu, organ ini membolehkan proses kelahiran dengan menolak bayi melalui pengecutan otot. Dalam keseluruhan kehidupan pembiakan wanita, rahim menyediakan dirinya untuk kehamilan sekitar hampir 500 kali. Ini juga bermakna anda mendapat hampir sekitar 500 kali haid. Rahim terdiri daripada tiga lapisan tisu yang berbeza iaitu : Perimetrium: Lapisan luar tisu yang diperbuat daripada sel epitelium Myometrium: Lapisan tengah yang diperbuat daripada tisu otot licin Endometrium: Lapisan dalam yang terkumpul selama sebulan dan akan terbuang jika kehamilan tidak berlaku Sewaktu proses kehamilan, rahim membesar dan dinding otot menjadi lebih nipis, seperti belon yang telah ditiup, untuk menampung janin yang sedang berkembang dan cecair amniotik (air ketuban) dihasilkan pertama kali oleh ibu dan kemudian oleh rembesan air kencing dan paru-paru bayi.

input: Blog: Vaksin selamat atau tidak buat ibu hamil? | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 25/7/2023 Vaksin selamat atau tidak buat ibu hamil? Ramai ibu-ibu hamil mula risau sewaktu Covid melanda negara. Rata-rata ibu hamil mula faham pentingnya detail scan, Sono Ultrasound dan kerana risaunya pandemik yang melanda memberi kesan kepada anak dalam kandungan. Kebimbangan adalah dikalangan: 1) Ibu-ibu yang pernah terkena jangkitan Covid diawal kehamilan atau 2) Baru selepas vaksin samada sedar hamil atau tidak sedar sedang hamil (trimester pertama) Pemeriksaan detailed scan keatas ibu-ibu hamil,didapati bayi tidak mengalami sebarang kecacatan (Dr Anna liza). Detail scan dapat mengesan sebarang kecacatan fizikal pada bayi (bukan kes genetik). Jangkitan COVID-19 dapat dikelaskan kepada lima peringkat mengikut tahap: Tahap 1: – Tanpa gejala Tahap 2: – Simptomatik, Tiada radang paru-paru Tahap 3: – Simptomatik, Pneumonia Tahap 4: – Pneumonia dengan Hipoksia Tahap 5: – Sakit kritikal dengan Kegagalan Multi Organ Sebahagian besar ibu hamil tanpa gejala (asymptomatic) dan sebahagian mungkin mengalami gejala ringan seperti demam dan batuk. Jika pesakit tidak sihat, terutamanya jika mengalami kesukaran bernafas, adalah lebih baik untuk mendapatkan perubatan segera. Vaksin tidak menyebabkan kecacatan janin. Kajian tidak membuktikan Covid-19 dan vaksin dikaitkan dengan peningkatan risiko keguguran (KKM) Adalah bahaya buat ibu hamil yang berada di tahap 4 : Pneumonia dengan hipoksia ( kekurangan oksigen dalam darah) kerana ia membahayakan bayi dalam kandungan. Kesukaran bernafas menyebabkan darah juga kekurangan oksigen (termasuklah darah yang disalurkan kepada bayi dalam kandungan). Bayi dalam kandungan sekiranya mengalami hypoxia, boleh mengalami kerosakan saraf dan otak. Vaksin juga digalakkan buat ibu hamil dan langkah berjaga-jaga masih perlu diambil bagi mengelakkan penularan Covid-19.

input: Blog: Ventriculomegaly | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 29/8/2023 𝗩𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗥𝗜𝗖𝗨𝗟𝗢𝗠𝗘𝗚𝗔𝗟𝗬 Ventriculomegaly adalah keadaan luar biasa dimana ventrikal di dalam otak janin membesar melebihi 10mm lebar. Ventriculomegaly boleh memberi kesan kepada samada sebelah atau kedua-dua belah ventrikal. Dan ia juga boleh memberi kesan kepada ventrikal ketiga dan keempat. Sewaktu pemeriksaan Sono Ultrasound kepala janin, pemerhatian pada struktur otak dan saiz ventrikal otak, Ventriculomegaly dapat dikesan sewaktu sesi Sono Ultrasound pada trimester kedua. Ventriculomegaly mempunyai tiga peringkat iaitu kecil, sederhana dan teruk Ventricolumegely terjadi disebabkan oleh kerosakan atau kehilangan tisu otak, berlaku kecacatan dalam perkembangan otak dan ketidakseimbangan peredaran dan penyerapan cecair cerebralspinal. Bagi kes ini, Cecair otak memenuhi sebahagian besar daripada otak mengakibatkan tisu otak pula mengecil. Punca lain terjadinya Ventriculomegaly ialah daripada jangkitan virus dari Ibu seperti jangkitan Sitomegalovirus dan Toksoplasmosis. Jangkitan virus boleh menyebabkan kecacatan perkembangan otak, ventriculomegaly dan hydrocephalus. Kesan Ventriculomegaly pada penghidapnya ialah : Masalah pada perkembangan fizikal Pergerakan Otot terganggu Pergerakan saraf terganggu Lemah pada aspek daya fikir, intelektual dan pembelajaran Jangan abaikan jadual antenatal dan pemeriksaan Sono Ultrasound anda. Sekiranya didapati kandungan anda terdapat sebarang kelainan, anda akan segera dirujuk pada pakar.

input: Blog: Vernix Caseosa | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 16/8/2023 Vernix caseosa ‘kerak-kerak‘ pada kulit bayi bermakna kulit bayi tak bersih? Bayi yang baru dilahirkan, akan diselaputi dengan ‘kerak-kerak putih‘ ini, atau dipanggil Vernix Caseosa. Vernix Caseosa dibuat oleh kulit bayi itu sendiri.Lapisan ini berkembang pada kulit bayi sekitar usia kandungan 20 minggu. Ibu dan ayah digalakkan supaya melengahkan mandian pertama bayi.Vernix Caseosa ini seeloknya dibiarkan dahulu pada hari pertama kelahiran.Ini adalah kerana Vernix Caseosa banyak memberi manfaat buat bayi. Fungsi Vernix Caseosa : Melindungi kulit bayi dari sebarang jangkitan. Bersifat kalis air. Membolehkan kulit bayi bertahan berada didalam air ketuban. Ia mengandungi bahan antibakteria untuk melindungi bayi Pelembap semulajadi Sebaik sahaja bayi dilahirkan, bayi memerlukan masa untuk menyesuaikan diri dengan suhu di luar berbanding suhu yang sedikit panas didalam kandungan, lapisan Vernix ini mencegah bayi kehilangan haba. Ia mempercepatkan proses penyembuhan luka akibat pergeseran yang berlaku sewaktu proses kelahiran. Jumlah Vernix Caseosa pada kulit bayi semakin berkurangan apabila semakin hampir dengan tarikh bersalin/due date. Ia tidak kelihatan dalam Sono Ultrasound 3D/4D tetapi kulit bayi kelihatan agak bergelombang didalam imej Sono Ultrasound kerana Vernix Caseosa terdiri daripada 80% air, 10% protein dan 10% lemak/lipid. Lipid ini tidak larut dalam air. Ia mengandungi lemak, wax, hormon dan komponen membrane tertentu dan berfungsi sebagai simpanan tenaga. Jadi mommies tak perlu risau kerana sangka putih-putih itu adalah kotoran pada bayi ya? Kerana itu ialah Vernix Caseosa yang banyak beri kebaikan pada bayi.

input: Blog: Warfarin Embryophaty Syndrome | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 24/8/2023WARFARIN EMBRYOPHATY SYNDROME Sebelum tu, jom kita tengok Apa tu Warfarin? Warfarin ialah alat untuk mencegah pembekuan darah. Ia juga berfungsi untuk menghentikan pertambahan saiz darah beku yang telah terbentuk. Darah beku adalah merbahaya kerana ia meningkatkan risiko serangan jantung, strok dan menghalang pengaliran darah. Warfarin dapat melepasi plasenta dan ia boleh menjejaskan perkembangan janin. Kesan buruk warfarin kepada kandungan : Keguguran Kelahiran Pramatang Kematian janin dalam kandungan Pendarahan Anomali Muka (Kecacatan pada muka) Dapat dikesan melalui Sono Ultrasound Kecacatan pada tulang hidung (hipoplasia) Masalah pada sistem saraf pusat Sawan Microcephaly Optic atrophy Kecacatan pada mata Warfarin adalah antikoagulan aktif yang paling berkesan untuk mencegah kejadian thromboembolic pada ibu semasa kehamilan. Jom kita tengok Apa itu Warfarin Embryophaty Syndrome? Ia adalah keabnormalan pembentukan tulang dan rawan janin, kecacatan pada wajah, optic atrophy, kecacatan mental. Risiko berlakunya syndrome ini ialah 4%-10% Risiko amat tinggi sekiranya warfarin diberikan semasa 6-12 minggu kehamilan. Dos pengambilan Warfarin kurang dari 5mg sehari mempunyai risiko terendah sebanyak 3%. Penyelesaian kedua kepada masalah pembekuan darah bagi Ibu hamil ialah pengambilan HEPARIN supaya dapat mengurangkan kematian bayi dalam kandungan dan masalah keguguran. Melalui kajian, Warfarin banyak memberi kesan buruk kepada janin dalam kandungan,oleh itu sebaik sahaja disahkan hamil, Heparin akan diberi menggantikan warfarin. Ibu hamil yang mengalami masalah pembekuan darah dan mengambil ubat antikoagulan ini perlu melalui Sono Ultrasound secara berkala untuk memeriksa janin dalam kandungan. Info mengenai Details Scan

input: Blog: Warna najis bayi | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 25/10/2023 Warna Najis Bayi, Apakah Maksudnya? Memantau warna najis bayi dapat memberikan gambaran tentang kesihatan mereka. Perubahan dalam warna najis juga kadangkala boleh menunjukkan perubahan dalam diet, pencernaan atau kesihatan keseluruhan mereka. Contohnya, bayi mungkin mengalami masalah hati jika najis bayi tiba-tiba menjadi sangat pucat atau putih. Bagi bayi yang menyusu badan, najis yang berwarna hijau mungkin menunjukkan bahawa bayi mendapat banyak foremilk dan tidak mendapat cukup hindmilk. Bagi bayi yang telah mula makan, najis berwarna hijau mungkin disebabkan oleh makanan tertentu yang mereka makan. Adalah penting untuk anda tahu bahawa warna najis juga boleh dipengaruhi oleh pelbagai faktor, jadi sebarang kerisauan haruslah mendapat nasihat dan bimbingan yang betul dengan pakar. Berikut adalah warna najis bayi dan apakah maksud setiap warna tersebut : 1) HijauTerang – bagi bayi yang menyusu susu ibu, jika najis kelihatan berbuih bermakna bayi mendapat terlalu banyak foremilk dan tidak cukup susu hindmilk yang berlemak 2) Kuning Terang – Bagi bayi yang menyusui susu ibu, ini mungkin bermakna ia adalah kesan daripada ubatan atau makanan yang diambil oleh ibu 3) Kuning Mustard – Normal buat bayi samada yang minum susu ibu atau susu formula 4) Oren/Jingga – Bayi yang makan makanan berwarna jingga contohnya seperti carrot cenderung mempunyai warna najis oren/jingga. – Bayi yang disusui dengan susu ibu juga mungkin didapati najisnya berwarnajingga akibat ubatan yang dimakan oleh ibu atau kerana ibu makan makananmengandungi warna artificial. – Secara amnya, ia tidak menunjukkan sebarang masalah. Tetapi, jika anda merasa risau, anda boleh mendapatkan nasihat pakar. 5) Merah – Tompokan kecil berwarna merah pada najis bayi mungkin bermakna bayi anda sembelit dan meneran najis dengan kuat– Najis berdarah atau merah terang mungkin menunjukkan jangkitan, alahan ataukecederaan. Segera dapatkan rawatan.

input: Blog: Warna najis bayi | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: erah pada najis bayi mungkin bermakna bayi anda sembelit dan meneran najis dengan kuat– Najis berdarah atau merah terang mungkin menunjukkan jangkitan, alahan ataukecederaan. Segera dapatkan rawatan. 6) Hitam – Ia juga boleh disebabkan oleh zat besi dalam diet (buat bayi yang telah mula makan atau berusik setahun keatas). – Sekiranya anak anda tidak mengambil apa-apa suplemen zat besi, ia mungkinmenjadi tanda pendarahan di saluran GI. Segera berjumpa dengan doktor. – Untuk bayi yang baru lahir adalah normal untuk mengeluarkan najis berwarnahitam. Bagaimanapun, jika najis masih berwarna hitam pada hari ketiga, iamungkin tanda bayi tidak mendapat nutrisi yang mencukupi atau tidak mencernasusu dengan betul. 7) Kelabu – Sekiranya bayi anda telah mula makan, ia mungkin disebabkan oleh pemakanan. Tetapi jika bayi anda belum mula makan, dapatkan pemeriksaan pakar kerana ia mungkin disebabkan oleh masalah pada pundi hempedu. 8) Putih – Sekiranya najis bayi sedikit berkapur, putih atau kelabu boleh menjadi petanda hati tidak berfungsi dengan betul. 9) Hijau Gelap – Iron dalam susu formula bayi kadangkala boleh menggelapkan najis bayi, ini tidak perlu dirisaukan. 10) Hijau Kekuningan – Najis biasa juga boleh mendapat warna seperti Hijau Kekuningan. Tetapi jika bayi anda kelihatan seperti tidak selesa, meragam, atau perut kembung mungkin inibermakna bayi anda mempunyai alahan dengan susu lembu dalam susu formula. Anda boleh mendapat gambaran banyak tentang kesihatan bayi dengan memantau warna dan konsistensi najis mereka. Ada beberapa tanda jika anda dapati kelainan anda harus segera dapatkan nasihat pakar : – Najis bayi keras– Najis bayi berwarna putih, kelabu– Bayi yang menyusu dengan susu ibu tidak membuang air besar selama lebih tigahari – Bayi yang diberi susu formula tidak membuang air besar selama lebih lima hari– Najis bayi berwarna merah atau hitam Pasti setiap ibu bapa mahukan yang terbaik buat bayi. Sentiasa pantau sebarang kelainan pada bayi anda.

input: Blog: Warna najis bayi | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 3)
expected: u formula tidak membuang air besar selama lebih lima hari– Najis bayi berwarna merah atau hitam Pasti setiap ibu bapa mahukan yang terbaik buat bayi. Sentiasa pantau sebarang kelainan pada bayi anda. Dapatkan rawatan dan nasihat pakai jika perlu.

input: Blog: Warna sticker buku pink | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 7/8/2023 Apa warna sticker buku pink anda? Sekiranya mommies melakukan pemeriksaan dan memdaftar dengan KKIA berdekatan, pasti mommies tahu setiap buku pink akan ditandakan dengan sticker pada penghujung atas buku. Apa beza warna-warna sticker ni? 1️. PUTIH : Tiada Risiko – Boleh bersalin di mana-mana hospital 2️. Hijau : Berisiko Berat 80kg, Bersalin koyak tahap 3, Primid (Kandungan pertama), Vacuum, asma, LSCS – Boleh bersalin dimana-mana hospital. – Follow up dengan jururawat dibawah pengawasan doktor. 3️. Kuning : Berisiko Diabetes dengan insulin, darah tinggi, ibu tanpa nikah. – Boleh bersalin dimana-mana hospital – Follow up: perlukan pemantauan doktor pakar FMS/O&G 4️. Merah : Berisiko tinggi Kontraksi pramatang, sakit jantung – Perlu rujuk segera ke Hospital – Follow up Pakar O&G dan Pakar Perubatan Keluarga. Adalah amat penting buat ibu hamil mengikut jadual pemeriksaan Sono Ultrasound, menjaga pemakanan dan kesihatan serta mengikut arahan dan perancangan doktor mengenai kehamilan.

input: Blog: Yolk Sac | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 19/7/2023 Pernah dengar tentang Yolk Sac? Pada awal kehamilan di usia 6 minggu, melalui Sono Ultrasound akan terlihat bentuk bulat yang biasa dipanggil kantung atau IUGS (Intrauterine Gestational Sac) dan didalamnya terdapat seperti cincin kecil dipanggil Yolk Sac. Pada awal kehamilan, tumpuan akan diberikan kepada gestational sac dan yolk sac ini. Ukuran saiz dan perkembangannya akan diperhatikan. Yolk sac mempunyai bentuk cincin dengan dinding nipis dan ia menjalankan fungsi yang penting pada bulan pertama kehamilan. Fungsi yolk sac : – Sumber nutrien kepada bayi sebelum plasenta mengambil alih – Terlibat dalam proses pernafasan – Berkait dengan usus bayi – Terjadinya pembentukan kapilari pertama dan sistem peredaran darah janin – Menjalankan fungsi hati **Pentingnya pembentukan yolk sac untuk perkembangan janin yang normal. Yolk sac yang gagal ketika proses pembentukan, boleh terjadinya pengguguran. Ketiadaan kantung sewaktu sesi Sono Ultrasound scan adalah kerana: – Usia kandungan tidak sama dengan perkiraan tarikh mula period (kitaran haid tidak teratur) – Biasanya ibu akan disarankan untuk mengulangi sesi Sono Ultrasound satu minggu atau dua minggu lagi. – Tanda keguguran Yolk Sac pergi mana? Tiga bulan pertama, embrio dan plasenta akan terbentuk sepenuhnya dan yolk sac ini tidak diperlukan lagi dimana tisunya akan beransur-ansur dikurangkan. Sehinggalah akhir kehamilan, yolk sac ini masih ada tetapi dalam bentuk seperti bulatan/cyst yang kecil dan berada berhampiran tali pusat.

expected: Introduction Blood tests are more than just routine health checks—they are vital tools in early detection, diagnosis, and health monitoring. In Malaysia, with the rise of non-communicable diseases and increased health awareness, blood tests have become an essential part of preventive healthcare. This article offers an in-depth look at various blood test types, their importance, and how Sonobee’s tailored packages can help individuals from all walks of life manage their health more effectively.Whether you’re searching for a “blood test near me” or comparing options for a “full blood test package,” Sonobee provides accessible, comprehensive solutions with options for both in-clinic and home sampling services. The Importance of Blood Tests in Modern Healthcare Blood tests offer insights into almost every aspect of health—from organ function and metabolic efficiency to early warning signs of chronic illness, infections, nutritional deficiencies, or even cancer. They provide doctors and patients with measurable data to:Detect diseases earlyMonitor ongoing conditions (like diabetes, hypertension, or thyroid disorders)Evaluate organ health (such as liver and kidney)Track the effectiveness of medicationIdentify risk factors before symptoms appearFor example, a simple test like the CBC (complete blood count) can detect infections and anemia, while a lipid panel can flag high cholesterol levels, potentially preventing cardiovascular disease. Reports that are reviewed and verified by a radiologist may be used for insurance-related purposes, subject to the insurance provider’s acceptance criteria. Employers and employees are advised to check with their insurers directly. 7. Where can the screening be conducted? Screening can be conducted at:Our ultrasound centres, orOn-site at the workplace, subject to space, privacy, and logistical requirements. 8. How long does each screening session take? Each employee screening typically takes 30–60 minutes, depending on the selected screening package and add-ons. 9. Do employees need to fast before screening? Yes, for upper abdominal scans, employees are usually required to fast for at least 8 hours.For pelvic scans, a full bladder is typically required. Clear preparation instructions will be provided in advance. 10. Will employees receive their results digitally? Yes. Ultrasound images and reports can be delivered securely via the FlaBee Care App, allowing convenient digital access. 11. Is ultrasound screening safe for employees? Ultrasound does not involve radiation and is non-invasive.

input: Dating Scan | First Trimester Ultrasound for Due Date & Viability
expected: Dating Scan | First Trimester Ultrasound for Due Date & Viability Confirm your due date and check baby’s heartbeat with an early pregnancy Dating Scan. This first ultrasound offers reassurance and accurate pregnancy dating. Book your appointment. Available in Klang Valley, Penang & Johor Bahru Digital scan images delivered to your Flabee Care App BOOK NOW What is the Meaning of a Dating Scan? A dating scan is an early ultrasound used to confirm a pregnancy, determine the estimated due date, and check the baby’s viability by measuring the fetus. Typically performed between 8 and 14 weeks, it is particularly helpful if the date of the last menstrual period is unknown. It can also identify multiple pregnancies and check for early signs of complications. A dating scan, also known as a viability or early pregnancy scan, is an ultrasound examination typically performed during the first trimester of pregnancy. Its primary purpose is twofold:To Determine Your Baby’s Gestational Age: The scan accurately measures your baby to estimate your due date. This is often more reliable than calculating from the first day of your last menstrual period (LMP), especially if your cycles are irregular, you are unsure of your dates, or you conceived while using contraception.To Confirm Pregnancy Viability: It checks that the pregnancy is developing as expected inside the uterus, confirms the presence of a heartbeat, and establishes that it is a single or multiple pregnancy (twins, triplets, etc.). What Week is Best for a Dating Scan? The optimal window for a dating scan is between 8 weeks and 13 weeks plus 6 days of pregnancy.Before 7 weeks: It can be difficult to see the baby clearly or detect a heartbeat, which may cause unnecessary anxiety.8 to 10 weeks: This is often considered the ideal time. The baby is large enough to get accurate measurements, and the heartbeat is usually clearly visible.

A dating scan is not mandatory, but many parents find it helpful. When performed early in pregnancy, it can provide a more accurate estimate of the expected due date (EDD) compared to using the last menstrual period alone.Having a clearer understanding of pregnancy timing can support better planning for follow-up scans and appointments. Your doctor will use the scan information together with other clinical details to guide your ongoing pregnancy care. 2. When is the best time to do a dating scan?

input: Dating Scan | First Trimester Ultrasound for Due Date & Viability (part 3)
expected: or follow-up scans and appointments. Your doctor will use the scan information together with other clinical details to guide your ongoing pregnancy care. 2. When is the best time to do a dating scan? The ideal time for a dating scan is usually between 8 and 10 weeks of pregnancy. At this stage, the pregnancy is more clearly visualised, allowing for a more reliable estimation of gestational age and expected due date. 3. Can a dating scan detect twins? Yes. A dating scan can often identify twin or multiple pregnancies, depending on visibility at the time of the scan. 4. Will the scan be done abdominally or internally? In early pregnancy, a transvaginal (internal) scan may be recommended to obtain clearer images. An abdominal scan may also be used, depending on pregnancy stage and image visibility. 5. Is a transvaginal scan safe? Yes. Transvaginal scans are commonly used in early pregnancy and are generally safe when performed by trained professionals. Some mild discomfort may be felt, but it is usually not painful. 6. Can a dating scan detect abnormalities? No. A dating scan is not intended to detect abnormalities. It is focused on early visualisation and estimating pregnancy timing only. 7. What if nothing is clearly seen during the scan? In very early pregnancy, visibility may be limited. If this happens, you may be advised to return for a repeat scan after some time for better visualisation. 8. Do I still need to follow up with my doctor after a dating scan? Yes. A dating scan does not replace regular check-ups with your O&G doctor. Ongoing pregnancy care and medical decisions should always be managed by your doctor. 9. How long does a dating scan take? A dating scan usually takes about 10–20 minutes, depending on image visibility and pregnancy stage.Important note:Dating scans are provided for screening and observation purposes only.

input: Dating Scan | First Trimester Ultrasound for Due Date & Viability (part 4)
expected: ing scan take? A dating scan usually takes about 10–20 minutes, depending on image visibility and pregnancy stage.Important note:Dating scans are provided for screening and observation purposes only. They are not diagnostic and do not replace medical consultation or care by an O&G doctor or Maternal–Fetal Medicine (MFM) specialist. 10. Can I bring my partner or family members? Yes. You are welcome to bring your partner or family members to share this special moment. The number of accompanying persons allowed may vary by clinic location, so we recommend checking in advance. 11. What if the scan shows something wrong? Try not to panic. Occasionally, an image may need further review or clarification. If this happens, you will be advised to follow up with your attending O&G doctor, who can guide you on the next steps if needed.Please note that a dating scan is for screening and observation only and is not intended to diagnose conditions. 12. Why was my due date changed after the scan? A dating scan performed early in pregnancy can sometimes provide a more accurate estimate of the expected due date (EDD) than menstrual dates alone. Your doctor may adjust the EDD based on the scan findings to better reflect pregnancy timing. 13. Can the dating scan determine the baby’s sex? No. A dating scan is too early to determine the baby’s sex. Gender identification is not part of this scan. 14. What if no heartbeat is detected during the scan? In very early pregnancy, it may be too early to visualise a heartbeat. This does not necessarily mean there is a problem. In such cases, a repeat scan or follow-up with your doctor may be advised for further assessment. 15. Do I need a full bladder for a transvaginal scan? No. A full bladder is not required for a transvaginal (internal) scan. You will usually be asked to empty your bladder before the scan for comfort and better image clarity. 16. Is a dating scan really necessary if I’m sure of my dates?

expected: or a transvaginal (internal) scan. You will usually be asked to empty your bladder before the scan for comfort and better image clarity. 16. Is a dating scan really necessary if I’m sure of my dates? A dating scan is not mandatory, but even when menstrual dates are known, the scan can help provide a more accurate EDD, especially if cycles are irregular. Whether to have one is a personal choice and can be discussed with your doctor. 17. Can I have a 3D or 4D scan instead of a dating scan? 3D and 4D scans are not suitable for early pregnancy dating. A dating scan is typically performed using 2D ultrasound, which is most appropriate for early visualisation and pregnancy timing.

input: BASIC OB / 3D 4D ULTRASOUND EXAMINATION | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: BASIC OB / 3d 4D 5D Ultrasound examination Terms & Conditions What is the difference between 2D, 3D, 4D, 5D scan? 2D growth scan (4-40week) also known as basic OB scan to examine the baby growth, placenta location, amniotic fluid level, baby weight, fetal heartbeat, estimated due date, baby lying position and gender for 18 weeks above. However, this package does not include checking baby anomaly.3d scan will be the static picture while the 4D scans will be the live video. 5D scan is the HD scan means high definition whereby the texture of the HD scan is more clear and similar to your baby skin. Hence, the images of your baby will look more real. 3d4d5d scan normally can do 12week above , however the most suitable time is around 20-35week. When is the suitable time to peak baby gender? We can provide the indication can begin as early as 15 weeks. However, we can only provide 70% accuracy of your fetus gender. The Limitations of 3D /4D / 5D SCAN There are few factor will affect the image quality which including (1) machine brand, difference area will have difference machine range. (2) Low level of amniotic fluid level will decrease the quality of the image(3) Thick abdominal layer of the mummy will affect the quality image (4) Baby position where the baby is hiding inside behind the uterus. (5) Baby face block by the placenta or uterus wall. (6) Baby do not cooperate blocking the face using hand, legs, umbilical cord or etc Translate »

input: Gender Scan as Low as RM18 | Sonobee Ultrasound
expected: baby Gender Scan - as low as rm18 Discover the joy of knowing your baby’s gender with our Gender Scan Service at Sonobee Ultrasound — a special moment designed to be accurate, comfortable, and memorable for parents-to-be.Our experienced sonographers use advanced ultrasound technology to identify your baby’s gender in a safe, supportive, and welcoming environment. Available in Klang Valley, Penang & Johor Bahru Digital scan images delivered to your Flabee Care App BOOK NOW What is a Gender scan? A gender scan is a targeted ultrasound examination performed during pregnancy to determine your baby’s gender. This scan focuses on clear visualisation while ensuring both mother and baby’s comfort throughout the session. Sexing Scan can be done as early As 18 Weeks Looking to undergo an early gender scan in Selangor Malaysia in the capable hands of a friendly team of experts that will help you every step of the way?We are happy to provide gender scans, which as the name suggests, is a scan to determine the sex of your baby, to increase the excitement further (if that’s even possible), and give you the chance to start preparing for the arrival of your little one.A gender scan in Selangor Malaysia can take place from as little as 18 weeks into your pregnancy, so you can find out the baby’s gender as soon as possible. This is purely a 2D scan, you may want to upgrade to 4D should you wish.Our gender scans are 95% accurate, based on a study where we scanned 100 ladies between 14 and 15 weeks. 60 of which returned with gender confirmation at 18 weeks and were all 95% correct. Gender confirmation is determined by a number of factors including BMI, previous scar tissue, or the position of your baby during the scan. The earliest time we can assess the baby’s sex is at 14 weeks gestation/pregnancy: We can tell the sex of the baby at the 14 week scan by assessing the direction of the nub. This is something that can be identified on babies at this stage and if it points vertically then it is likely to be a boy. 2. How accurate is a 13 week gender scan? It is important to state from the off that unfortunately, there is always a chance an early gender scan at 13 weeks could be wrong. After all, this is the very first week in pregnancy that your baby’s genitals are viewable on ultrasound and whilst the baby is still so small, there is every chance it could be wrongly determined.However, for those parents who are desperate for an early sneak peed of your baby, there is some good news!

input: Gender Scan as Low as RM18 | Sonobee Ultrasound (part 3)
expected: and whilst the baby is still so small, there is every chance it could be wrongly determined.However, for those parents who are desperate for an early sneak peed of your baby, there is some good news! Early gender scans at 13 weeks (thanks to modern technology) have been known to be up to 99% accurate – and although no scanning facility can promise 100% accuracy on the gender of your baby at 13 weeks, we can certainly come pretty close!Please noteOur gender scans are 99.99% accurate, this is based on a study where we scanned 100 ladies between 12 and 13 weeks, 60 of which returned with gender confirmation at 14 weeks and were all 99.9% correct. Gender confirmation is determined on a number of factors including BMI, previous scar tissue or position of your baby during the scan. Although this is unlikely, it can occur. 3. Can you get a gender scan at 14 weeks? We can determine the gender of your baby from 14 weeks with 99.9% accuracy. It should be noted ultrasound cannot provide 100% confirmation, since some fetuses can be ambiguous. 4. Can a scan tell gender at 15 weeks? You’ll need to decide soon whether you want to know the sex of your baby before you give birth; the external sex organs are nearly complete, so an ultrasound can reveal whether you’re having a boy or a girl. Between about 15 and 23 weeks. 5. Is it to early for gender scan at 16 weeks? If patients decide against Nipt then a gender determination scan can be performed from 16 weeks onward. Sometimes the fetal sex can be seen as early as 11 weeks depending on the individual but it’s advised to wait until at least 16 weeks as any scan under 16 weeks can be inaccurate or not even possible 6. Is a 16 week gender scan accurate? This is a scan to look for whether you are having a boy or a girl. It is 97% accurate – we cannot guarantee to absolutely always get it right! The later we scan the more accurate it is so we recommend waiting until at least 17 weeks if you can, and 18 weeks is even better 7.

input: Gender Scan as Low as RM18 | Sonobee Ultrasound (part 4)
expected: accurate – we cannot guarantee to absolutely always get it right! The later we scan the more accurate it is so we recommend waiting until at least 17 weeks if you can, and 18 weeks is even better 7. Can you have a gender scan at 17 weeks? Your baby and the umbilical cord are experiencing a growth spurt this week. Your baby’s sex can now be accurately detected on an ultrasound scan. 8. Do I still need to visit the NHS if I had a Gender Scan with you? YES, absolutely! Our sonographers want to make sure you see your baby and don’t carry out a full abnormality check during your scan. Our sonographers will perform a wellbeing check during your scan, but this does not go into the level of detail required during an abnormality scan, which by itself could take up the entire time that you appointment is planned for, and would leave no time for you to bond with your baby or see them in 3D/4D. As a result, the wellbeing check doesn’t cover all the things that your midwife needs to see and know so its best to still keep up with all of your NHS scans and appointments. 9. When Can I Have A Baby Gender Scan? This scan usually takes place between 14 to 21 weeks into your pregnancy. Most private clinics offer the scan from 16 weeks, while we at Sonobee Ultrasound Clinic are able to offer a baby gender scan from 14 weeks. 10. What should I do before a gender scan? At the same time, we recommend you to have a sweet juice or chocolate or cake before taking the ultrasound. The sugar will make the baby move and the gender identification will be easier. Relax yourself! Take into account that you might not find out your baby’s gender at the first baby scan appointment 11. Do you need a full bladder for gender scan? You need to arrive with a full bladder for both Dating scans and gender scans between 14-20 weeks gestation. After 20 weeks it is not necessary. 12.How much water do I need to drink before my gender ultrasound?

input: Gender Scan as Low as RM18 | Sonobee Ultrasound (part 5)
expected: arrive with a full bladder for both Dating scans and gender scans between 14-20 weeks gestation. After 20 weeks it is not necessary. 12.How much water do I need to drink before my gender ultrasound? In general, most women should start drinking approximately eight glasses of eight ounces of water each day for about a week before your ultrasound. If your doctor recommends a different amount, always follow your doctors instructions. 13. How likely is a gender scan wrong? The chances of an error with ultrasound are up to 5 percent, says Schaffir. An ultrasound can be between 95 to 99 percent accurate in determining sex, depending on when it’s done, how skilled the sonographer is and whether baby is in a position that shows the area between their legs. 14.Can a girl scan be mistaken for a boy? The simple answer is no. That’s right, girl/boy predictions done by expert sonographers are not correct 99.1% of the time. (Although they are right most of the time!)

input: Blog: Hamil? What's Next? | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Date Release: 19/7/2023 Selepas disahkan kehamilan, apa next step yang mommies perlu buat? Buat mommies yang menantikan kehadiran cahaya mata, lewat haid boleh jadi salah satu tanda, jadi mommies mungkin hamil. Jom check apa yang perlu mommies buat sebaik saja haid mommies lewat 1-2 minggu. UPT – Urine Pregnancy Test Mommies boleh melakukan sendiri ujian air kencing ini di rumah atau membuatnya di klinik berhampiran. UPT mudah dan senang didapati dan hasilnya juga tepat. Sekiranya UPT mommies adalah POSITIF; 1. Mommies boleh melakukan Sono Ultrasound atau scan diawal kehamilan supaya dapat memeriksa kandungan berada di dalam rahim atau diluar rahim(etopic pregnancy). Biasanya kandungan 5-7minggu, kantung bayi sudah nampak melalui sono ultrasound. 2. Segera dapatkan temujanji di klinik berdekatan untuk antenatal checkup atau buka buku pink bagi memeriksa kandungan dan kesihatan ibu sewaktu hamil. Mommies digalakkan untuk mendaftar buku pink sebelum kandungan 12 minggu. 3. Growth Scan – Growth scan adalah salah satu sono ultrasound yang penting buat mommies sepanjang kehamilan. Growth scan akan memeriksa ukuran panjang bayi, ukur lilit kepala, bahagian abdomen, kedudukan uri, panjang tulang peha atau femur, estimate berat bayi, jumlah air ketuban, dan juga jantina 4. Detail Scan – Mommies juga digalakkan untuk melakukan details scan bagi memeriksa secara keseluruhan bayi didalam kandungan. Detail scan dilakukan menggunakan Sono Ultrasound 2D. Biasanya detail scan mengukur dan melihat keadaan otak,muka seperti mulut,hidung,telinga. Selain itu details scan juga melihat jantung anak,diafragma,pundi kencing, buah pinggang, perut, tangan, kaki dan jari jemari bayi.

input: Health Ministry Offers Free Whooping Cough Vaccines for Expectant Mothers – Latest Update | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Malaysia’s Health Ministry provides free whooping cough (pertussis) vaccines for pregnant women to protect newborns. Learn about the benefits and how to get vaccinated. Why This Matters: Protecting Newborns from Whooping Cough Whooping cough, medically known as pertussis, is a highly contagious respiratory infection that poses severe risks to infants, particularly those under six months old. Newborns are especially vulnerable because they cannot receive their first pertussis vaccine until two months of age, leaving them unprotected during this critical window. To address this gap, Malaysia’s Health Ministry has introduced a free maternal whooping cough vaccination program for expectant mothers. By immunizing pregnant women, protective antibodies are passed to the fetus, offering newborns crucial immunity in their first weeks of life. This strategy follows World Health Organization (WHO) guidelines, which recommend maternal pertussis vaccination to reduce infant hospitalizations and deaths. Key Benefits: Infant Protection: Maternal vaccination reduces newborn pertussis risk by over 90% (CDC Study on Pertussis) Cost-Free & Accessible: The program eliminates financial barriers for pregnant women nationwide Proven Safety: Extensive research supports the vaccine’s safety during pregnancy (WHO Position Paper) Take Action:Expectant mothers can check eligibility and locate vaccination centers via the Health Ministry’s official portal. Early immunization (recommended between 27–36 weeks of pregnancy) maximizes antibody transfer to the baby.

input: Health Ministry Offers Free Whooping Cough Vaccines for Expectant Mothers – Latest Update | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: check eligibility and locate vaccination centers via the Health Ministry’s official portal. Program Details: What Expectant Mothers Need to Know Key Features of Malaysia’s Maternal Vaccination Initiative Eligibility:All pregnant women in Malaysia qualify, regardless of nationality or socioeconomic status Optimal timing: 27–36 weeks of gestation for peak effectiveness Vaccine Type:Tdap vaccine (Tetanus, Diphtheria, acellular Pertussis) Provides dual protection: safeguards mothers while transferring immunity to babies Safety Profile:No increased risk of pregnancy complications (NIH Safety Study) Mild side effects (like arm soreness) resolve within 48 hours How to Access: Visit any government health clinic (Klinik Kesihatan) with your antenatal record No appointment needed – walk-ins accepted during prenatal visits Receive the vaccine free of charge Locate a Center: Use the MySejahtera app or MOH Facility Finder The Science Behind Maternal Vaccination How Antibody Transfer Works The Tdap vaccine stimulates the mother’s immune system to produce antibodies that: Crosses the placenta to protect the fetus Concentrate on breastmilk for continued postpartum protection Evidence-Based Outcomes: Protection MethodEffectivenessDurationMaternal Vaccination91%First 6 monthsCocooning (family vaccines)70%VariableNo ProtectionHigh RiskN/A Expert Resources: MOH Immunization Guidelines WHO Pertussis Vaccine Research Comprehensive FAQ Why vaccinate during pregnancy?Newborns can’t be vaccinated until 2 months old. Maternal vaccination bridges this gap. What if I miss the 27-36 week window?Vaccination up until delivery still provides partial protection. Are there side effects?Mild reactions (sore arm, low-grade fever) are common and temporary. Can I get it with other vaccines?Yes, including flu and COVID-19 boosters (space by 2 weeks if possible).

What if clinics run out of stock?Check the Vaksin Malaysia Portal for real-time updates. Does it affect breastfeeding?No, antibodies in breastmilk provide added protection. Conclusion: A Shared Responsibility This program protects not just individual babies, but entire communities through herd immunity. Every vaccinated mother contributes to Malaysia’s goal of halving pertussis deaths by 2030. input: Home Phototherapy Rental for Baby Jaundice in Malaysia - Fast Delivery
expected: Baby Jaundice Phototherapy Rental (Malaysia) Safe, At-Home Phototherapy Support for Newborn JaundiceJaundice is a common condition affecting many newborns in the first week of life, often seen as yellowing of the skin and eyes due to elevated bilirubin levels. While mild jaundice may improve naturally, some babies may be advised by a healthcare professional to undergo phototherapy.At Sonobee Ultrasound, we offer a home phototherapy rental service to support families who have been advised to continue phototherapy at home, providing convenience and comfort without unnecessary hospital stays. No hospital stay required Parent-supervised & radiologist-supported Fast home delivery across Klang Valley How Our Phototherapy Units Work Our portable LED phototherapy units emit a blue light wavelength (460–490 nm) that breaks down excess bilirubin in your baby’s skin, allowing it to be safely excreted through urine and stool. Non-invasive and safe for newborns Hospital-grade bilirubin light technology Includes newborn eye shields & instruction guide Can be used during feeding and resting times Benefits of At-Home Jaundice Treatment No need for hospitalization – keep your baby close and minimize infection risk 24/7 treatment schedule – more consistent bilirubin reduction Stress-free bonding at home Affordable rental rates with flexible options Includes tele-support & monitoring guidance Our phototherapy service includes: KKM-approved phototherapy equipment Suitable for home use under parental supervision No hospital admission required Professional guidance on setup and usage Fast home delivery — within 4 hours across Malaysia* Our service is intended to support home care following medical advice and does not replace medical assessment or follow-up by a doctor.*Delivery timing subject to location and availability. Important NoticeHome phototherapy rental is provided as a supportive care service only.

input: Home Phototherapy Rental for Baby Jaundice in Malaysia - Fast Delivery (part 3)
expected: s an optional add-on, and general visual monitoring guidance can be provided. Home monitoring does not replace medical assessment. 4. What happens if jaundice does not improve during or after rental? If jaundice appears to persist or worsen, parents should seek immediate medical attention from their paediatrician or nearest hospital.Our role is limited to providing the phototherapy equipment and usage guidance; medical assessment and treatment decisions must be made by a doctor. 5. Can I extend the rental if needed? Yes. Rental extensions are subject to availability. Please contact our team at least 12 hours before the scheduled return time to arrange an extension. 6. How long does my baby need to use phototherapy each day? The duration of phototherapy should be based on your doctor’s advice. Generally, babies may require several hours of exposure per day, with breaks for feeding and care. Parents should always follow medical guidance rather than self-deciding treatment duration. 7. Can my baby sleep during phototherapy? Yes. Babies can usually rest or sleep comfortably during phototherapy. Eye protection and proper positioning should be used as instructed to ensure safety. 8. Will phototherapy cause discomfort or pain to my baby? Phototherapy is non-invasive and does not cause pain. Babies may appear slightly unsettled at first due to the light or environment, which is normal. 9. Are there any side effects I should watch for? Most babies tolerate phototherapy well. Some may experience mild skin dryness or increased bowel movements. If you notice unusual symptoms or have concerns, you should contact your paediatrician immediately. 10. Can I stop phototherapy once the baby looks less yellow? No. Visual improvement alone is not sufficient to determine when treatment should stop. Decisions on stopping phototherapy should be made based on medical follow-up and bilirubin assessment by your doctor. 11. Is home phototherapy suitable for all jaundice cases? No.

input: Implanon: The Complete Guide to This Long-Acting Birth Control Implant
expected: Implanon: Safe, Effective, Long-Term Contraception Implanon (now often Implanon NXT) is a highly effective (> 99%), long-acting reversible contraceptive, consisting of a small, flexible rod inserted under the skin of the upper arm. It releases progestin to prevent pregnancy for up to 3 years by stopping ovulation and thickening cervical mucus. It is inserted/removed by a doctor.It is widely recognised as one of the most effective forms of contraception, with a success rate of over 99% (World Health Organization, 2023).According to the Ministry of Health Malaysia, modern contraceptive methods, including implants, play an important role in family planning by helping individuals and couples plan pregnancies safely and effectively (Ministry of Health Malaysia, 2018).If you’re searching for reliable information about this contraceptive implant, you’ve come to the right place. This comprehensive guide will walk you through everything you need to know about Implanon—from what it is and how it works, to its effectiveness, side effects, and answers to frequently asked questions. Whether you’re considering Implanon for the first time or simply want to learn more about your birth control options, this article will provide the detailed information you need to make an informed decision.What is Implanon?Implanon is a single-rod contraceptive implant that is placed just beneath the skin of a woman’s upper arm. It contains etonogestrel, a synthetic hormone similar to progesterone, which is released slowly into the body over time.The implant is about the size of a matchstick and remains effective for up to three years before it needs to be removed or replaced. According to the Ministry of Health Malaysia and international reproductive health guidelines, contraceptive implants are safe, reversible, and appropriate for most women, including those who are unable to use estrogen-containing contraceptives.

input: Implanon: The Complete Guide to This Long-Acting Birth Control Implant (part 2)
expected: and international reproductive health guidelines, contraceptive implants are safe, reversible, and appropriate for most women, including those who are unable to use estrogen-containing contraceptives.Physical CharacteristicsThe Implanon rod is 40 mm long and 2 mm in diameter—roughly the size of a matchstick . It’s made from a flexible plastic material called ethylene vinyl acetate (EVA) that contains 68 mg of etonogestrel . The rod is non-biodegradable, meaning it doesn’t dissolve in the body and must be removed after its effective period . How Does Implanon Work? Understanding how Implanon prevents pregnancy helps explain why it’s so effective. The implant works through three primary mechanisms : Ovulation InhibitionThe primary mechanism of action is preventing ovulation. The continuous release of etonogestrel suppresses the body’s natural hormonal surge that triggers an ovary to release an egg. On average, the rod releases about 40 μg of etonogestrel daily . Without an egg available for fertilization, pregnancy cannot occur. Cervical Mucus ThickeningThe hormone causes the cervical mucus to become thick and sticky, creating a physical barrier that makes it difficult for sperm to travel through the cervix and reach the uterus . Think of it as creating a protective plug that sperm cannot penetrate. Endometrial ChangesImplanon also alters the lining of the uterus (the endometrium), making it less receptive to implantation should an egg happen to be fertilized . While this is considered a secondary mechanism, it provides an additional layer of protection.These three mechanisms working together create a highly effective contraceptive barrier that provides continuous protection without requiring any daily action on your part.According to the World Health Organization and supported by Ministry of Health Malaysia guidelines, these combined effects make contraceptive implants one of the most reliable hormonal contraceptive methods available today.How Effective Is Implanon?

input: Implanon: The Complete Guide to This Long-Acting Birth Control Implant (part 3)
expected: pported by Ministry of Health Malaysia guidelines, these combined effects make contraceptive implants one of the most reliable hormonal contraceptive methods available today.How Effective Is Implanon?When discussing birth control effectiveness, healthcare providers typically refer to “perfect use” (using the method exactly as intended) versus “typical use” (accounting for human error). This is where Implanon truly shines.Exceptional Effectiveness RatesImplanon is more than 99% effective, making it one of the most reliable contraceptive options available. Its effectiveness does not depend on daily compliance, unlike oral contraceptive pills (World Health Organization, 2023).This means that fewer than 1 woman out of 100 who use Implanon will become pregnant over a year of use. In fact, clinical trials have demonstrated remarkable results—one systematic review covering nearly 27,000 women-months of follow-up found zero pregnancies among Implanon users .To put this in perspective, here’s how Implanon compares to other common contraceptive methods:Typical use of birth control pills: 91% effective (9 pregnancies per 100 women per year)Male condoms: 85% effective (15 pregnancies per 100 women per year)Implanon: 99.95% effective (less than 1 pregnancy per 100 women per year)Real-World ConsiderationsWhile clinical trial data shows exceptional effectiveness, real-world data provides additional context. A large Australian post-marketing study that followed over 200,000 implant insertions found a failure rate of approximately 1 in 1,000 insertions . Importantly, many of these failures were attributed to:Failure to insert the implant (the device was never actually placed)Pre-existing pregnancy at the time of insertionDrug interactions that reduced effectivenessIncorrect timing of insertionWhen the implant is correctly inserted and you’re not taking medications that interfere with it, the effectiveness remains extremely high.

Does Body Weight Affect Effectiveness?There is some evidence that Implanon may become less effective in overweight women over time, particularly in those with a higher body mass index (BMI) . This is especially true when other factors are present that decrease hormone concentrations, such as taking certain medications. If you’re overweight, your healthcare provider may advise replacing the implant earlier than the standard three years or monitoring its effectiveness more closely . When Does It Start Working? The time it takes for Implanon to become effective depends entirely on when during your menstrual cycle it is inserted .Optimal Insertion TimingIf Implanon is inserted according to the recommended schedule, it provides immediate protection and no backup contraception is needed:Between Day 1 and Day 5 of your menstrual cycle: If inserted during this window (counting the first day of your period as Day 1), you are protected from pregnancy right away .When You Need Backup Birth ControlIf the implant is inserted at any other time in your cycle, or if you’re switching from a different contraceptive method with non-standard timing, you’ll need to use a barrier method (like condoms) for 7 days after insertion .

Your healthcare provider will always confirm you’re not pregnant before insertion .According to the Ministry of Health Malaysia and WHO guidelines, correct timing of insertion is important to ensure immediate contraceptive protection.How Do I Use Implanon?One of the biggest advantages of Implanon is that there’s nothing for you to do on a daily, weekly, or monthly basis . Unlike pills that need to be taken at the same time every day, Implanon is truly “set it and forget it.” However, understanding the insertion and removal process helps set realistic expectations.According to the Ministry of Health Malaysia, minor medical procedures such as contraceptive implant insertion must be performed by qualified healthcare providers to ensure safety, proper placement, and effectiveness.The Insertion ProcedureImplanon must be inserted by a trained healthcare provider during an in-office procedure . Here’s what typically happens:Preparation: You lie on an examination table with your non-dominant arm flexed and externally rotated (bent with your hand near your head) .Site identification: The provider identifies the insertion site on the inner side of your upper arm, about 8-10 cm (3-4 inches) above the elbow. They avoid the groove between muscles where large blood vessels and nerves are located .Anesthesia: The area is numbed with a local anesthetic (like lidocaine) .

The procedure is designed to place the implant superficially so both you and your provider can feel it afterward .Confirmation: Both parties should be able to feel the implant under the skin to confirm correct placement .Bandaging: The insertion site is covered with two bandages—a pressure bandage and a smaller waterproof dressing .The entire procedure is quick, typically taking only a few minutes .After Insertion CareRemove the pressure bandage the evening of insertion .Keep the smaller dressing clean and dry for 3-5 days .You can shower on the day of insertion, but keep the area dry as directed .You can return to work and normal activities immediately .Resume arm exercises after initial discomfort and bruising resolve .Removal and ReplacementThe implant must be removed by the end of the third year . The removal process:Is performed in the office under local anesthesiaInvolves a small incision to remove the implantTakes less time than insertionLeaves a small scarIf you want to continue contraception, a new implant can be inserted immediately at the time of removal . If you have the implant removed and don’t start a new contraceptive method, your fertility returns quickly—94% of women ovulate within 3 months, most within 3 weeks .Important: Never try to remove the implant yourself .According to the Ministry of Health Malaysia, contraceptive implants are fully reversible, and normal fertility resumes soon after removal.What Stops Implanon from Working?While Implanon is highly reliable, certain factors can reduce its effectiveness. Understanding these helps you take appropriate precautions.Drug InteractionsSeveral medications can interfere with Implanon by inducing (speeding up) liver enzymes that metabolize hormones, potentially reducing etonogestrel levels in your body . These include :Anticonvulsants/Seizure Medications:CarbamazepinePhenytoinPhenobarbitalPrimidoneFelbamateOxcarbazepineTopiramateAntibiotics/Antifungals:GriseofulvinRifampicinRifabutinHIV Medications:Certain protease inhibitorsNon-nucleoside reverse transcriptase inhibitorsOther Medications:Aprepitant (used for nausea)Bosentan (for pulmonary hypertension)Modafinil (for sleep disorders)St. John’s Wort (herbal supplement)Certain medications for hepatitis C If you’re prescribed any of these medications, you may need to use additional barrier contraception during treatment and for up to 28 days after stopping . Always tell your healthcare provider about all medications and supplements you’re taking.According to the Ministry of Health Malaysia, patients should inform their healthcare provider about all medications and supplements before choosing a contraceptive method.Insertion IssuesThe most common reason for contraceptive failure in real-world studies was failure to actually insert the implant . ConclusionImplanon represents a remarkable advancement in contraceptive technology, offering women one of the most effective, convenient, and reversible birth control methods available. With over 99% effectiveness, three years of continuous protection, and no daily attention required, it eliminates many of the common barriers to consistent contraceptive use.The key to satisfaction with Implanon lies in understanding both its benefits and its limitations.

The most significant trade-off is the potential for unpredictable menstrual bleeding—while not harmful, this side effect leads some women to discontinue use. On the other hand, for women who want “set it and forget it” contraception, who cannot use estrogen-containing methods, or who want rapid return to fertility when they’re ready to conceive, Implanon offers compelling advantages.Important considerations to remember:Verify you can feel the implant after insertionBe aware of medications that can interfere with effectivenessUse condoms for STI protectionContact your provider if you experience severe pain or can’t feel your implantHave it removed by the end of the third yearEvery woman’s body and preferences are unique. What works wonderfully for one person may not be ideal for another. The best contraceptive choice is one that fits your health profile, lifestyle, and personal comfort level. Discussing your options with a healthcare provider who knows your medical history will help you determine whether Implanon is the right choice for you. Can I feel the implant under my skin? Yes, you should be able to feel it. After insertion, both you and your healthcare provider should be able to gently press on the area and feel the small rod under the skin .
