Early treatment makes a difference. WhatsApp Us Now to Check Availability Book Your 2-Day Phototherapy Rental Today Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) What is phototherapy for babies? Phototherapy is a treatment used for babies with jaundice, where the skin appears yellow due to high bilirubin levels. It uses a specific wavelength of blue light to convert bilirubin into a form that can be safely removed from the body. How do I know if my baby needs phototherapy treatment? Phototherapy is recommended when bilirubin levels exceed safe thresholds based on your baby’s age, weight, and condition, as determined by a doctor through a blood test. Common signs include yellowing of the skin and eyes. Babies with rapidly rising or high bilirubin levels require treatment to prevent complications. Does every baby with jaundice need phototherapy? No. Most newborn jaundice is mild and resolves naturally. Phototherapy is only required when bilirubin levels exceed medical thresholds based on clinical guidelines and assessment. Why does my baby develop jaundice?

input: Phototherapy Light Home Rental for Baby Jaundice in Johor | Sonobee (part 3)
expected: jaundice is mild and resolves naturally. Phototherapy is only required when bilirubin levels exceed medical thresholds based on clinical guidelines and assessment. Why does my baby develop jaundice? Jaundice occurs because a newborn’s liver is still developing and may not process bilirubin efficiently. This condition is common in the first few days after birth and usually improves as the baby matures. Can jaundice be prevented? Physiological jaundice cannot be completely prevented as it is part of a newborn’s natural adaptation. However, early and frequent feeding may help reduce bilirubin levels by supporting elimination through urine and stool. Is phototherapy safe for my baby? Yes, phototherapy is a safe and widely used treatment when conducted correctly. Babies are protected with eye covers, and body temperature and hydration are monitored throughout the session. Can phototherapy be done at home? Is it as effective as hospital treatment? Yes, home phototherapy can be effective when using approved medical-grade equipment and proper guidance. It allows treatment in a comfortable environment while maintaining clinical effectiveness, provided the baby meets eligibility criteria and is monitored appropriately. What features does the phototherapy machine include? The phototherapy system includes:(a) Double LED light technology for more effective bilirubin reduction(b) Hospital-grade, KKM-approved and MDA-certified equipment(c) Baby bassinet for safe and stable positioning(d) Protective eye patches to protect the baby’s eyes(e) Portable and compact design for home use(f) Complete setup with guidance supportThese features ensure safe, consistent, and effective treatment at home. What happens during a phototherapy session?

input: Phototherapy Light Home Rental for Baby Jaundice in Johor | Sonobee (part 4)
expected: e) Portable and compact design for home use(f) Complete setup with guidance supportThese features ensure safe, consistent, and effective treatment at home. What happens during a phototherapy session? During the session:(a) Your baby is placed under or on the phototherapy light(b) Your baby wears only a diaper to maximise light exposure(c) Eye protection is applied(d) Feeding and bonding continue during breaks What is the maximum duration during a phototherapy session? Phototherapy is often carried out continuously with short breaks for feeding and care. Continuous exposure improves effectiveness in reducing bilirubin levels. What improvements can I observe after phototherapy? You may notice reduced yellowing of the skin and eyes, improved feeding, and increased alertness. Bilirubin levels are typically monitored to confirm progress, and levels often decrease within hours to days of treatment. What are the warning signs of severe jaundice? Seek medical attention immediately if your baby:(a) Appears very yellow including palms and soles(b) Is extremely sleepy or difficult to wake(c) Refuses to feed(d) Has a high-pitched or unusual cryThese may indicate more serious conditions requiring urgent care. What are the warning signs to stop phototherapy immediately? Stop the session and seek medical advice if you notice:(a) Baby becomes unusually lethargic(b) Poor feeding or refusal to feed(c) Fever or signs of dehydration(d) Worsening jaundice or unusual symptoms What are the benefits of home phototherapy rental service? Home phototherapy allows your baby to receive treatment in a familiar environment, reducing stress and avoiding hospital admission. Parents can monitor closely while using hospital-grade equipment with proper guidance, ensuring both comfort and effectiveness.

Early treatment makes a difference. WhatsApp Us Now to Check Availability Book Your 2-Day Phototherapy Rental Today Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) What is phototherapy for babies? Phototherapy is a treatment used for babies with jaundice, where the skin appears yellow due to high bilirubin levels. It uses a specific wavelength of blue light to convert bilirubin into a form that can be safely removed from the body. How do I know if my baby needs phototherapy treatment? Phototherapy is recommended when bilirubin levels exceed safe thresholds based on your baby’s age, weight, and condition, as determined by a doctor through a blood test. Common signs include yellowing of the skin and eyes. Babies with rapidly rising or high bilirubin levels require treatment to prevent complications. Does every baby with jaundice need phototherapy? No. Most newborn jaundice is mild and resolves naturally. Phototherapy is only required when bilirubin levels exceed medical thresholds based on clinical guidelines and assessment. Why does my baby develop jaundice? Jaundice occurs because a newborn’s liver is still developing and may not process bilirubin efficiently. This condition is common in the first few days after birth and usually improves as the baby matures. Can jaundice be prevented? Physiological jaundice cannot be completely prevented as it is part of a newborn’s natural adaptation. However, early and frequent feeding may help reduce bilirubin levels by supporting elimination through urine and stool. Is phototherapy safe for my baby? Yes, phototherapy is a safe and widely used treatment when conducted correctly. Babies are protected with eye covers, and body temperature and hydration are monitored throughout the session. Can phototherapy be done at home? Is it as effective as hospital treatment?

What features does the phototherapy machine include? What happens during a phototherapy session? During the session:(a) Your baby is placed under or on the phototherapy light(b) Your baby wears only a diaper to maximise light exposure(c) Eye protection is applied(d) Feeding and bonding continue during breaks What is the maximum duration during a phototherapy session? Phototherapy is often carried out continuously with short breaks for feeding and care. Continuous exposure improves effectiveness in reducing bilirubin levels. What improvements can I observe after phototherapy? You may notice reduced yellowing of the skin and eyes, improved feeding, and increased alertness. Bilirubin levels are typically monitored to confirm progress, and levels often decrease within hours to days of treatment. What are the warning signs of severe jaundice?

Early treatment makes a difference. WhatsApp Us Now to Check Availability Book Your 2-Day Phototherapy Rental Today Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) What is phototherapy for babies? Phototherapy is a treatment used for babies with jaundice, where the skin appears yellow due to high bilirubin levels. It uses a specific wavelength of blue light to convert bilirubin into a form that can be safely removed from the body. How do I know if my baby needs phototherapy treatment? Phototherapy is recommended when bilirubin levels exceed safe thresholds based on your baby’s age, weight, and condition, as determined by a doctor through a blood test. Common signs include yellowing of the skin and eyes. Babies with rapidly rising or high bilirubin levels require treatment to prevent complications. Does every baby with jaundice need phototherapy? No. Most newborn jaundice is mild and resolves naturally. Phototherapy is only required when bilirubin levels exceed medical thresholds based on clinical guidelines and assessment. Why does my baby develop jaundice? Jaundice occurs because a newborn’s liver is still developing and may not process bilirubin efficiently. This condition is common in the first few days after birth and usually improves as the baby matures. Can jaundice be prevented? Physiological jaundice cannot be completely prevented as it is part of a newborn’s natural adaptation. However, early and frequent feeding may help reduce bilirubin levels by supporting elimination through urine and stool. Is phototherapy safe for my baby? Yes, phototherapy is a safe and widely used treatment when conducted correctly. Babies are protected with eye covers, and body temperature and hydration are monitored throughout the session. Can phototherapy be done at home? Is it as effective as hospital treatment?

input: Phototherapy Light Home Rental for Baby Jaundice in Perlis | Sonobee (part 3)
expected: d correctly. Babies are protected with eye covers, and body temperature and hydration are monitored throughout the session. Can phototherapy be done at home? Is it as effective as hospital treatment? Yes, home phototherapy can be effective when using approved medical-grade equipment and proper guidance. It allows treatment in a comfortable environment while maintaining clinical effectiveness, provided the baby meets eligibility criteria and is monitored appropriately. What features does the phototherapy machine include? The phototherapy system includes:(a) Double LED light technology for more effective bilirubin reduction(b) Hospital-grade, KKM-approved and MDA-certified equipment(c) Baby bassinet for safe and stable positioning(d) Protective eye patches to protect the baby’s eyes(e) Portable and compact design for home use(f) Complete setup with guidance supportThese features ensure safe, consistent, and effective treatment at home. What happens during a phototherapy session? During the session:(a) Your baby is placed under or on the phototherapy light(b) Your baby wears only a diaper to maximise light exposure(c) Eye protection is applied(d) Feeding and bonding continue during breaks What is the maximum duration during a phototherapy session? Phototherapy is often carried out continuously with short breaks for feeding and care. Continuous exposure improves effectiveness in reducing bilirubin levels. What improvements can I observe after phototherapy? You may notice reduced yellowing of the skin and eyes, improved feeding, and increased alertness. Bilirubin levels are typically monitored to confirm progress, and levels often decrease within hours to days of treatment. What are the warning signs of severe jaundice?

input: Phototherapy Light Home Rental for Baby Jaundice in Perlis | Sonobee (part 4)
expected: ing, and increased alertness. Bilirubin levels are typically monitored to confirm progress, and levels often decrease within hours to days of treatment. What are the warning signs of severe jaundice? Seek medical attention immediately if your baby:(a) Appears very yellow including palms and soles(b) Is extremely sleepy or difficult to wake(c) Refuses to feed(d) Has a high-pitched or unusual cryThese may indicate more serious conditions requiring urgent care. What are the warning signs to stop phototherapy immediately? Stop the session and seek medical advice if you notice:(a) Baby becomes unusually lethargic(b) Poor feeding or refusal to feed(c) Fever or signs of dehydration(d) Worsening jaundice or unusual symptoms What are the benefits of home phototherapy rental service? Home phototherapy allows your baby to receive treatment in a familiar environment, reducing stress and avoiding hospital admission. Parents can monitor closely while using hospital-grade equipment with proper guidance, ensuring both comfort and effectiveness.

Seek medical attention immediately if your baby:(a) Appears very yellow including palms and soles(b) Is extremely sleepy or difficult to wake(c) Refuses to feed(d) Has a high-pitched or unusual cryThese may indicate more serious conditions requiring urgent care. What are the warning signs to stop phototherapy immediately? Stop the session and seek medical advice if you notice:(a) Baby becomes unusually lethargic(b) Poor feeding or refusal to feed(c) Fever or signs of dehydration(d) Worsening jaundice or unusual symptoms What are the benefits of home phototherapy rental service? Home phototherapy allows your baby to receive treatment in a familiar environment, reducing stress and avoiding hospital admission. Parents can monitor closely while using hospital-grade equipment with proper guidance, ensuring both comfort and effectiveness.

A growth scan is a procedure that is used to identify potential health problems in a newborn baby. A growth scan checks for problems such as low birth weight, growth problems, and problems with the central nervous system. At the growth scan we are able to measure important growth parameters of your baby such as head measurements, abdominal/tummy measurements and limb measurements. This information helps us to provide an estimated weight of the baby and to ensure fetal development is on track for delivery. Baby Growth Scan can be done as early As 4 Weeks A 2D growth scan is done between 4 – 40 weeks of pregnancy. This measures and observes: Growth and well-being of baby Length of baby’s head, abdomen and thigh bone Amount of amniotic fluid around baby Baby’s activity Placental position Growth scans help identify babies that are struggling and that need to be born early to keep them safe (Gardosi et al 2018, NHS 2019, RCOG 2013). Sonographer will check your baby’s size by measuring: The circumference of your baby’s head (HC). The circumference of your baby’s tummy (AC). Growth scans can be done in the second half of pregnancy to assess the growth and well-being of the baby. During the scan, the baby’s head, abdomen and thigh bone are measured, the amount of amniotic fluid around the baby is assessed, the baby’s activity is observed and the position of the placenta is recorded.

Babies are diagnosed with intrauterine growth restriction (IUGR) if they appear to be smaller than expected. This would happen if an ultrasound indicates that the baby’s weight is below the 10th percentile for their gestational age (weeks of pregnancy). It’s also called fetal growth restriction (FGR). A 4D scan, also known as a 4-dimensional ultrasound, offers a captivating glimpse into the womb, allowing expecting parents to see their baby in remarkable detail and in real-time. Unlike traditional 2D scans, which provide flat images, or even 3D scans, which offer still images, a 4D scan captures dynamic movements and expressions with enhanced clarity and realism, adding the element of time to the imaging experience. When is the Best Week to Do a 4D Scan? The optimal time for a 4D scan is typically between 20 to 32 weeks of pregnancy. During this period, your baby has developed enough to showcase their features while still having room to move and display their unique personality. This window offers the ideal balance between clarity and mobility, ensuring a memorable and insightful experience. Understanding the Differences: To better grasp the evolution of ultrasound imaging, let’s explore the distinctions between 2D, 3D, 4D, 5D, and 6D scans: 2D Scan: Traditional ultrasound imaging providing flat, black-and-white images.3D Scan: Renders three-dimensional still images, offering a more detailed view of the baby’s features. 4D Scan: Adds the dimension of time, providing real-time visualization of the baby’s movements.

The earliest time we can assess the baby’s sex is at 14 weeks gestation/pregnancy: We can tell the sex of the baby at the 14 week scan by assessing the direction of the nub. This is something that can be identified on babies at this stage and if it points vertically then it is likely to be a boy. How accurate is a 13 week gender scan? It is important to state from the off that unfortunately, there is always a chance an early gender scan at 13 weeks could be wrong. After all, this is the very first week in pregnancy that your baby’s genitals are viewable on ultrasound and whilst the baby is still so small, there is every chance it could be wrongly determined. However, for those parents who are desperate for an early sneak peed of your baby, there is some good news! Early gender scans at 13 weeks (thanks to modern technology) have been known to be up to 99% accurate – and although no scanning facility can promise 100% accuracy on the gender of your baby at 13 weeks, we can certainly come pretty close! Please note Our gender scans are 99.99% accurate, this is based on a study where we scanned 100 ladies between 12 and 13 weeks, 60 of which returned with gender confirmation at 14 weeks and were all 99.9% correct. Gender confirmation is determined on a number of factors including BMI, previous scar tissue or position of your baby during the scan. Although this is unlikely, it can occur. Can you get a gender scan at 14 weeks? We can determine the gender of your baby from 14 weeks with 99.9% accuracy. It should be noted ultrasound cannot provide 100% confirmation, since some fetuses can be ambiguous. Can a scan tell gender at 15 weeks?

An NT (Nuchal Translucency) scan is a prenatal ultrasound examination that focuses on measuring the thickness of the nuchal fold at the back of the baby's neck. This measurement helps assess the risk of chromosomal abnormalities, particularly Down syndrome and other genetic conditions. When is the Best Week to Do an NT Scan? The optimal time for an NT scan is typically between 11 to 13week 6 daysof pregnancy. During this period, the nuchal translucency measurement is most accurate, providing valuable information for risk assessment. Understanding the Differences: Let’s differentiate between an NT scan and NIPT (Non-Invasive Prenatal Testing): NT Scan: Involves an ultrasound examination to measure the thickness of the nuchal fold, assessing the risk of chromosomal abnormalities based on this measurement. NIPT: A blood test that analyzes fetal DNA in the mother’s blood to screen for chromosomal abnormalities, including Down syndrome, trisomy 18, and trisomy 13, with high accuracy. When an egg meets sperm, conception occurs. 3 Weeks Pregnant At 3 weeks after your last period, about one week post-fertilisation, your baby is a tiny cluster of dividing cells. 4 Weeks Pregnant At 4 weeks, your baby is now an embryo with two layers, while the early placenta begins to develop. 5 Weeks Pregnant Baby’s brain, spinal cord, and heart begin developing, while pregnancy hormones may trigger nausea and breast tenderness. 6 Weeks Pregnant The heart starts beating, facial features begin forming, and morning sickness or food aversions may become noticeable. 7 Weeks Pregnant Baby grows quickly as arms and legs develop, while your body continues adjusting to rising hormone levels. 8 Weeks Pregnant Major organs are forming, facial features become clearer, and the embryo starts making small movements inside the womb. 9 Weeks Pregnant Baby’s muscles develop, allowing movement, while the head remains large compared to the body at this stage. 10 Weeks Pregnant Baby officially becomes a fetus, with vital organs formed and continuing to mature steadily inside the uterus. 11 Weeks Pregnant Bones begin hardening, fingers and toes separate, and baby starts stretching and kicking, though movements remain unnoticed. 12 Weeks Pregnant Baby’s organs continue developing, and the risk of miscarriage significantly decreases for most pregnancies. 13 Weeks Pregnant At 13 weeks pregnant, you’re in the final week of the first trimester. Your baby now has distinct fingerprints and measures nearly 3 inches long. Second Trimester of Pregnancy 14 Week Pregnant At 14 weeks pregnant, your baby can now make facial expressions, and you may feel more energetic with reduced nausea. 15 Weeks Pregnant At 15 weeks, your baby can move their joints and is developing taste buds.

Your baby is heading into a growth spurt. 17 Weeks Pregnant At 17 weeks, your baby’s skeleton is transitioning from soft cartilage to bone, while the umbilical cord becomes stronger and thicker. 18 Weeks Pregnant At 18 weeks, your baby’s genitals are developed enough to be visible on an ultrasound, and increased appetite is common. 19 Weeks Pregnant At 19 weeks, your baby’s scalp is beginning to grow hair. Aching sides may be due to round ligament pain. 20 Weeks Pregnant At 20 weeks pregnant, you’ve reached the halfway point! Your baby’s taste buds are now developing and becoming functional. 21 Weeks Pregnant At 21 weeks pregnant, those early flutters may soon become strong kicks. Fun fact: your baby is now developing eyebrows. 22 Weeks Pregnant At 22 weeks, your baby may start hearing your heartbeat, while your growing belly often attracts plenty of curious hands. 23 Weeks Pregnant Now that you’re 23 weeks pregnant, your baby has a well-developed sense of movement. Meanwhile, you may notice swelling in your ankles and feet. 24 Weeks Pregnant At 24 weeks, your baby remains long and lean, though that will change soon. Your uterus is now about the size of a soccer ball. 25 Weeks Pregnant At 25 weeks, your baby is beginning to gain baby fat and grow more hair, while you may notice your own hair looking fuller and shinier. 26 Weeks Pregnant At 26 weeks, your baby is practicing breathing by inhaling and exhaling small amounts of amniotic fluid. 27 Weeks Pregnant At 27 weeks pregnant, you may notice your baby hiccupping, and they are also beginning to open and close their eyes.

What is the VIP Pregnancy Scan? The VIP Pregnancy Scan is a premium ultrasound service in Malaysia offered by Sonobee. It includes multiple scan types (2D, 3D, 4D, 5D), anatomy/fetal anomaly checks, gender reveals and growth scans, from early pregnancy (week 4) all the way to week 40. It offers priority service and digital delivery of scan images via the Flabee Care App. 2. What are the benefits of choosing the VIP Pregnancy Scan? You get priority service with very short waiting times (~5 minutes).Expert care by senior sonographers.Flexibility: scan packages suitable for different pregnancy stages (week 4 to 40).Digital images/videos delivered to your app for easy access and sharing. 3. What scan types are included in the VIP package, and when can I do them? Some of the scan options include:2D Gender Scan (from week 15 to 40)2D Growth Scan (week 4–40)4D/5D Scan (from ~12 weeks onwards)NT Scan (week 11–13+6 days)Anatomy Scan (week 18–29)Combined Anatomy + 4D/5D scan 4. How much do the different scans cost? Costs vary depending on the type of scan and location in Malaysia. Examples for Peninsular Malaysia (“Semenanjung”) vs Sabah/Sarawak:2D Gender Scan: ~ RM 1002D Growth Scan: ~ RM 150 in peninsula, ~ RM180 in Sabah/Sarawak4D/5D Scan: ~ RM 350 both in peninsula & Sabah/SarawakNT Scan: ~ RM 200-220Anatomy Scan: ~ RM 500Anatomy + 4D/5D: ~ RM 750 5. What are the terms & conditions / notes for booking a VIP Pregnancy Scan? Priority service is provided, with waiting time around 5 minutes.

expected: RM 200-220Anatomy Scan: ~ RM 500Anatomy + 4D/5D: ~ RM 750 5. What are the terms & conditions / notes for booking a VIP Pregnancy Scan? Priority service is provided, with waiting time around 5 minutes.Advance payment is required to secure the slot.Available throughout Malaysia, including Klang Valley. 6. When is the best time to do a 3D or 4D scan? Between 24 to 32 weeks is generally considered optimal — baby’s facial features are more developed and there’s still enough amniotic fluid to allow good movement and clearer imaging. 7. How accurate is the gender scan? From week 15 onward, the gender reveal scan’s accuracy is about 95-98%, depending on the baby’s position. 8. Can I bring my partner or family members to the scan? Yes, Sonobee allows 2-3 family members or partner to join you during the scan so you can share that special moment. 9. Is ultrasound safe for my baby? Yes — ultrasound is non-invasive and does not use ionizing radiation. It has been used safely worldwide for many decades. 10. How do I book, and is advance payment required? To book, can directly click this link https://appointment.flabee.com/guest/services?category=vip-pregnancy-scanCan also contact our customer service numbers 018-9092933 or 014-3577226.Advance payment is required for booking. 11. How and when will I receive the scan images & report? You will get your images/videos the same day via the Flabee Care App. If you request a radiologist report (if applicable), that usually takes 3-5 working days.

These screenings help expectant parents visualise fetal growth, confirm gestational age, view the heartbeat, and gain reassurance throughout pregnancy.At Sonobee Ultrasound, all pregnancy screenings are performed by certified sonographers using modern imaging equipment. Our focus is on providing clear, high-quality wellness screening images to support your pregnancy journey.For advanced medical assessments such as the anatomy scan, expectant parents will be referred to qualified doctors who perform these diagnostic evaluations. input: Pregnancy Ultrasound Scans at Sonobee: Monitoring Your Baby’s Growth with Care | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Nurturing Your Pregnancy Journey with Ultrasound Scans Welcoming a new life is a beautiful experience — and modern ultrasound scans help parents monitor their baby’s development safely and accurately. At Sonobee, we offer comprehensive pregnancy ultrasound services, from early scans at 5 weeks to detailed 5D imaging later in your pregnancy.If you’re searching for scans during pregnancy, sonogram pregnancy, or maternity scan near me, Sonobee is ready to support you every step of the way. Types of Pregnancy Ultrasound Scans at Sonobee Confirms the presence of a gestational sac and fetal heartbeat.Detects ectopic pregnancies or early complications.Related search terms: 5 week pregnant ultrasound, 6th week pregnancy ultrasound. Performed between 11 and 14 weeks.Measures the fluid at the back of the baby’s neck to assess the risk of chromosomal abnormalities like Down syndrome.Related keywords: nuchal translucency, nuchal translucency scan near me. A detailed scan around 18–22 weeks.Examines baby’s organs, limbs, and measures amniotic fluid levels.Related term: anatomy scan. Provides high-definition, realistic images of your baby’s facial features and movements.Ideal for keepsake moments between 26 and 32 weeks.Related searches: 5d scan, scan 5d near me. Internal scan for clearer early pregnancy views.Used when external abdominal scans don’t provide enough detail.Related terms: transvaginal ultrasound, tvs scan, tvs scan near me. Why Are Pregnancy Scans Important? Regular ultrasound scans during pregnancy provide essential information:Confirming your baby’s heartbeat and growthEstimating due dates accuratelyMonitoring the baby’s development and organ formationIdentifying any complications earlyProviding peace of mind for expectant parentsWhether you’re just starting your pregnancy journey or already feeling baby kicks, ultrasound scans are a vital part of prenatal care.

input: Pregnancy Week 10 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 10 / minggu 10 Week 10 Most of the fetus’s major organs and body systems have formed and are already functioning. The heart is fully formed and beating fast. While the kidneys, liver and digestive system have also started to function. The fetus looks more human than during the embryonic phase with the development of the lips, tongue and nose. The fetal eyes have moved closer together, and the ears have shifted to the correct position on the side of the head. Now, fingers and toes have also completely separated, nails have also started to form. Symptoms You may feel indigestion and heartburn. Your breasts may also become larger, tender, or sore. You may also notice that your nipples are darker or more sensitive. As your uterus expands, it puts pressure on your bladder, which can cause you to urinate more often. Tips For You If you experience indigestion and heartburn, avoid spicy food, eat food in small quantities and often. It will help your digestive system so that the stomach and intestines can process food more efficiently and reduce the possibility of indigestion and heartburn.With the growing uterus, as well as your growing belly, it is the right time to start using stretch mark cream. Apply in a circular motion on the abdomen, thighs and hips to prevent severe stretch marks.Sono UltrasoundYou can start to get an appointment for the NICC test. NICC test or Non Invasive Chromosomes Check function is to detect chromosomal abnormalities in the fetus such as Down Syndrome, Patau Syndrome and Edward Syndrome. This test only uses blood taken from the arm. This NICC test is 99% accurate, easy and safe. Minggu 10Kebanyakan organ dan sistem badan utama janin telah terbentuk dan sudah mula berfungsi. Jantung terbentuk sepenuhnya dan berdegup kencang. Manakala buah pinggang, hati dan sistem pencernaan juga sudah mula berfungsi.Janin kelihatan lebih seperti manusia berbanding semasa fasa embrio dengan berkembangnya bibir, lidah dan hidung.

input: Pregnancy Week 10 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: kencang. Manakala buah pinggang, hati dan sistem pencernaan juga sudah mula berfungsi.Janin kelihatan lebih seperti manusia berbanding semasa fasa embrio dengan berkembangnya bibir, lidah dan hidung. Mata janin telah bergerak lebih rapat, dan telinga telah beralih ke kedudukan yang betul di sisi kepala. Sekarang, jari tangan dan kaki juga telah terpisah sepenuhnya, kuku juga sudah mula untuk terbentuk. Simptom Anda mungkin berasa senak dan pedih ulu hati. Payudara anda juga mungkin menjadi lebih besar, lembut, atau sakit. Anda juga mungkin perasan bahawa puting anda lebih gelap atau lebih sensitif.Apabila rahim anda mengembang, ia memberi tekanan pada pundi kencing anda, yang boleh menyebabkan anda membuang air kecil dengan lebih kerap.Tips Untuk AndaSekiranya anda mengalami rasa senak dan pedih ulu hati, elakkan makanan yang pedas, makan makanan dengan kuantiti yang kecil dan kerap. Ia akan membantu sistem penghadaman anda supaya perut dan usus dapat memproses makanan dengan lebih cekap dan mengurangkan kemungkinan senak dan pedih ulu hati.Dengan rahim yang semakin mengembang, begitu juga perut anda yang semakin membesar, adalah masa yang tepat untuk memulakan penggunaan krim stretch mark. Sapu dengan arah membulat di bahagian perut, peha dan pinggul untuk mengelakkan kesan stretch mark yang teruk. Sono UltrasoundAnda sudah boleh mula untuk dapatkan temujanji bagi NICC test. NICC test atau Non Invasive Chromosomes Check untuk mengesan kelainan kromosom pada janin seperti Down Syndrome, Patau Syndrome dan Edward Syndrome. Ujian ini hanya menggunakan darah yang diambil pada bahagian lengan. Ujian NICC ini adalah 99% tepat, mudah dan selamat.

input: Pregnancy Week 11 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 11 / minggu 11 Week 11 The fetus is now about 41mm long from the head down. The head is still large, but the body of the fetus is also growing rapidly. There are small nails on the fingers of the fetus. Although your fetus is actively moving in the sac like kicking, you may not be able to feel it yet. The fetal kidneys begin to produce urine, which is released into the amniotic fluid and then swallowed by the fetus. Previously, your fetus got nutrients and food through the ‘yolk sac’, but a new organ called the placenta will start to take over. Symptoms You may feel very tired right now, but light exercise like walking can also help you feel better. Your body is now pumping up to 50% more blood than usual. It can also make you feel hot, sweaty and dizzy. For some women, morning sickness may have subsided closer to the second trimester. Many women are starting to feel healthier now. Tips For You Get help from family members if you need it. Especially if you feel too tired or have severe allergy symptoms. Be patient, because these symptoms usually end well into the second trimester.Drink maternal milk for pregnant women helps with the necessary nutrients. Minggu 11Janin kini berukuran sekitar 41mm panjang dari kepala ke bawah. Kepala masih bersaiz besar, tetapi badan janin juga membesar dengan cepat. Terdapat kuku kecil pada jari janin. Walaupun janin anda sedang bergerak aktif didalam kantung seperti menendang, anda mungkin masih belum dapat merasainya. Buah pinggang janin mula mengeluarkan air kencing, dan dilepaskan ke dalam cecair amniotik dan kemudian ditelan oleh janin. Sebelum ini, janin anda mendapat nutrien dan makanan melalui ‘yolk sac’, tetapi organ baru yang dipanggil plasenta akan mula mengambil alih. Simptom Anda mungkin berasa sangat letih pada masa ini, tetapi senaman ringan seperti berjalan juga boleh membantu anda untuk berasa lebih baik. Badan anda kini mengepam sehingga 50% lebih darah daripada biasa.

input: Pregnancy Week 11 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: a mungkin berasa sangat letih pada masa ini, tetapi senaman ringan seperti berjalan juga boleh membantu anda untuk berasa lebih baik. Badan anda kini mengepam sehingga 50% lebih darah daripada biasa. Ia juga boleh membuat anda berasa panas, berpeluh dan pening. Buat sesetengah wanita, morning sickness mungkin telah berkurang menghampiri ke trimester kedua. Ramai wanita mula terasa lebih sihat sekarang. Tips Untuk AndaDapatkan bantuan ahli keluarga sekiranya anda memerlukan. Terutamanya jika anda merasa terlalu letih atau mengalami simptom-simptom alahan yang teruk. Bersabarlah, kerana selalunya simptom-simptom ini biasanya berakhir memasuki usia trimester kedua. Minum susu khas untuk Ibu hamil membantu dengan nutrisi-nutrisi yang diperlukan.

input: Pregnancy Week 12 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 12 / minggu 12 Week 12 The fetus is now 5.4cm long from head to bottom. Internal organs and muscles are present. The skeleton is made up of tissue and hardens into bone. The fetal vocal cords are forming, although they won’t function until a few more weeks into the pregnancy. Although the sex organs (gender) have formed, you can only see them at the next Ultrasound session. Fetal fingernails and toenails begin to grow, and fingertips and toes now have unique fingerprints. Many fetal organs and systems become more functional. Symptoms Your waist may be getting thicker and wider and your breasts are getting bigger. As other allergy symptoms subside, you may start to feel hungrier and eat more often. As the nausea begins to subside, some women may experience an increase in appetite and weight gain. Tips for you Try to follow a healthy pregnancy diet, you don’t need to eat more for the baby. If you maintain a healthy weight, it is good for your health as well as the fetus. Being overweight puts you at risk of pre-eclampsia and high blood pressure.Sono Ultrasound Have you made an appointment for NT Scan? NT scan should be done from 11-14 weeks of pregnancy. NT Scan or Nuchal Translucency Scan. NT Scan is used to detect several types of genetic abnormalities. NT scan is performed by measuring the thickness of the fluid behind the fetal neck. Fetuses with genetic problems are found to have excess fluid behind the neck. Minggu 12 Janin kini berukuran 5.4cm panjang dari kepala ke bawah. Organ dalaman dan otot telah ada. Rangka pula terdiri daripada tisu dan mengeras menjadi tulang. Pita suara janin sedang terbentuk, walaupun ia tidak akan berfungsi sehingga beberapa minggu lagi semasa kehamilan. Walaupun organ seks (jantina) telah terbentuk, anda hanya dapat melihatnya pada sesi Ultrasound akan datang. Kuku jari tangan dan kuku kaki janin mula tumbuh, dan hujung jari dan kaki kini mempunyai cap jari yang unik. Banyak organ dan sistem janin menjadi lebih berfungsi.

input: Pregnancy Week 12 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: pada sesi Ultrasound akan datang. Kuku jari tangan dan kuku kaki janin mula tumbuh, dan hujung jari dan kaki kini mempunyai cap jari yang unik. Banyak organ dan sistem janin menjadi lebih berfungsi. Simptom Pinggang anda mungkin semakin menebal dan lebar dan payudara anda semakin besar. Apabila simptom alahan lain semakin reda, anda mungkin mula berasa lebih lapar dan kerap makan. Apabila rasa mual mula berkurangan, sesetengah wanita mungkin mengalami peningkatan selera makan dan berat badan anda juga semakin bertambah. Tips Buat Anda Cubalah untuk ikut diet kehamilan yang sihat, anda tidak perlu makan lebih untuk bayi. Jika anda mengekalkan berat badan yang sihat, adalah bagus untuk kesihatan diri dan juga janin. Berat badan yang berlebihan memudahkan diri anda terdedah pada risiko pre-eklampsia dan tekanan darah tinggi. Sono Ultrasound Sudahkah anda membulat temujanji untuk NT Scan? NT scan sesuai dilakukan bermula usia kandungan 11-14 minggu. NT Scan atau Nuchal Translucency Scan. NT Scan digunakan untuk mengesan beberapa jenis keabnormalan genetik. NT scan dilakukan dengan mengukur ketebalan cecair di belakang leher janin. Janin yang mempunyai masalah genetik dikesan mempunyai lebihan cecair yang banyak di belakang leher.

input: Pregnancy Week 13 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 13 / minggu 13 Week 13 You are now in the second trimester of pregnancy. Your fetus is about 7.4cm long. Some fetuses start sucking their thumbs in the womb. It helps develop their sucking reflex. They will need this when they are born later (while nursing). Fine hair called lanugo begins to grow on the fetus’s body to keep it warm. Fine veins can be seen behind the skin of the fetus. In fact, the fetus can also move its limbs and make small reflexive movements. Symptoms Among the symptoms you may encounter are swollen and bleeding gums. Some pregnant women feel pain in the side of the abdomen due to your growing uterus (round ligament pains). Most women have started to feel less morning sickness. Tips for you Beware of urinary tract infections. Pregnant women are prone to urinary tract infections. Drinking plenty of water can help flush bacteria from your urinary tract. Practice hygiene by wiping your bottom (pubic area) from front to back after using the toilet to prevent bacteria from spreading from the anus to the urinary tract. Wear loose clothing so you feel more comfortable. This is the time for you to get more comfortable maternity clothes.Ultrasound ScanBy 13 weeks, the fetal heartbeat is stronger and easily detectable with Sono Ultrasound. During the ultrasound session you can also measure the size of the fetus and check its growth rate to make sure it is developing normally. Minggu 13 Anda kini berada di trimester kedua kehamilan. Janin anda adalah kira-kira 7.4cm panjang. Sesetengah janin mula menghisap ibu jari mereka di dalam rahim. Ia membantu mengembangkan refleks menghisap mereka. Mereka akan memerlukan ini apabila ia lahir nanti (ketika menyusu). Rambut halus yang dipanggil lanugo mula tumbuh pada badan janin untuk memastikan ia hangat. Kelihatan urat-urat halus disebalik kulit janin. Malah, janin juga boleh menggerakkan anggota badannya dan membuat gerakan refleksif kecil.

input: Pregnancy Week 13 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: go mula tumbuh pada badan janin untuk memastikan ia hangat. Kelihatan urat-urat halus disebalik kulit janin. Malah, janin juga boleh menggerakkan anggota badannya dan membuat gerakan refleksif kecil. Simptom Antara simptom-simptom yang mungkin anda hadapi ialah gusi bengkak dan berdarah. Sesetengah wanita hamil berasa sakit di sebelah perut disebabkan oleh rahim anda yang semakin membesar (round ligament pains). Kebanyakan wanita sudah mula merasa morning sickness yang berkurangan. Tips Buat Anda Berjaga-jaga dengan jangkitan air kencing. Wanita hamil mudah mendapat jangkitan air kencing. Minum banyak air boleh membantu membuang bakteria dari saluran kencing anda. Amalkan kebersihan dengan mengelap bahagian bawah (kemaluan) dari depan ke belakang selepas menggunakan tandas untuk mengelakkan bakteria daripada merebak dari dubur ke saluran kencing. Pakai pakaian yang longgar supaya anda merasa lebih selesa. Inilah masanya untuk anda dapatkan pakaian maternity yang lebih selesa. Sono Ultrasound Menjelang 13 minggu, degupan jantung janin adalah lebih kuat dan mudah dikesan dengan Sono Ultrasound. Semasa sesi ultrasound (growth scan) juga boleh mengukur saiz janin dan memeriksa kadar pertumbuhannya untuk memastikan ia berkembang secara normal.

input: Pregnancy Week 14 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 14 / minggu 14 Week 14 The fetal head is getting rounder and more balanced with the rest of the body. The size of the fetus is approximately 8.5cm long. The skin of the fetus is still thin and translucent, but it starts to become less transparent when it has started to form a layer of fat. The features of the face of the fetus become clearer. Eyelashes, eyebrows and hair on the head of the fetus begin to grow. For male fetuses, the prostate gland has already begun to develop, while for female fetuses, the ovaries move down from the abdomen to the pelvis.Symptoms You may notice some yellow liquid/ stain. It may be colostrum (which is the first milk you will produce). You may experience swelling and bleeding gums, cream in the abdomen (Pelvic muscles) and nosebleeds. However, most women feel comfortable because they no longer feel weak and have morning sickness.Tips For You You may start to feel less tired and sick now. Your energy returns, so does your appetite. Remember, your baby doesn’t need any extra calories at this point. Excessive weight gain during pregnancy is not good for you or the baby. Practice healthy snacks such as sandwiches or fruit if you often feel hungry.Sono Ultrasound This is the last week for you to do NT Scan because NT Scan is quite difficult and no longer accurate to do after 14 weeks of pregnancy Minggu 14 Kepala janin sudah semakin bulat dan lebih seimbang dengan seluruh badan. Saiz janin adalah lebih kurang 8.5cm panjang. Kulit janin masih nipis dan lut sinar, tetapi ia mula menjadi kurang telus apabila ia telah mula membentuk lapisan lemak. Ciri-ciri wajah janin menjadi lebih jelas. Bulu mata,kening dan rambut di kepala janin mula tumbuh. Bagi janin lelaki, kelenjar prostatnya sudah mula berkembang, manakala bagi janin perempuan, ovarinya bergerak turun dari perut ke pelvis. Simptom Anda mungkin mendapati terdapat beberapa kesan kuning pada baju dalam anda. Ia mungkin kolostrum (iaitu susu pertama yang akan anda hasilkan).

input: Pregnancy Week 14 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: n, ovarinya bergerak turun dari perut ke pelvis. Simptom Anda mungkin mendapati terdapat beberapa kesan kuning pada baju dalam anda. Ia mungkin kolostrum (iaitu susu pertama yang akan anda hasilkan). Anda mungkin mengalami masalah gusi bengkak dan berdarah, krem dibahagian perut (Otot pelvis) dan hidung berdarah. Bagaimanapun kebanyakan wanita sudah merasa selesa kerana tiada lagi rasa lemah badan dan morning sickness. Tips Untuk Anda Anda mungkin mula berasa kurang letih dan sakit sekarang. Kembalinya tenaga anda, begitu juga selera makan anda. Harus diingat, bayi anda tidak memerlukan sebarang kalori tambahan pada ketika ini. Pertambahan berat badan yang berlebihan semasa mengandung tidak baik untuk anda atau bayi. Amalkan makanan ringan yang sihat seperti sandwich atau buah jika anda kerap berasa lapar. Sono Ultrasound Ini adalah minggu terakhir untuk anda lakukan NT Scan kerana NT Scan adalah agak sukar dan tidak lagi tepat untuk dilakukan selepas melepasi usia kandungan 14minggu.

input: Pregnancy Week 15 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 15 / minggu 15 Week 15 A 15 week fetus is about 4 inches long. At this stage, the fetus is developing rapidly. The fetus can move its limbs, body and head. Your baby’s eyes are now more sensitive to light and the fetus’s ears have developed, where they are good enough to detect sounds, including the mother’s voice. The fetus will continue to grow rapidly, and important developments are taking place. If this is not your first pregnancy, you may be able to feel subtle movements in your uterus. It is quite difficult for a first-time pregnant mother to feel this subtle movement. Don’t worry, you’ll soon be able to feel your baby’s first kick. Symptoms Have you noticed a lot of discharge in your pants? Most pregnant women experience it. It is because more blood flows around your pelvic area when you are pregnant and this can cause your body to produce more milky white fluid called leucorrhoea which keeps your vagina clean and free of infection. You may also notice that your skin is getting drier.Tips For You If the discharge called leucorrhea changes color, smells or you feel pain when urinating, you feel itchy in the genital area, immediately get checked. Wear underwear made of cotton, and comfortable. You can get maternity underwear so that you are more comfortable. For those of you who have dry skin problems, use a cream or balm containing Shea Butter and Vitamin E to moisturize the skin. Take care of personal hygiene, and always be aware of any troubling changes. Sono Ultrasound The gender of the baby can already be seen through Sono Ultrasound examination. But, depending on the position of the baby and the baby’s cooperation (some babies put their legs together the whole time at the ultrasound session- so the gender cannot be detected) Minggu 15 Panjang janin yang berusia 15 minggu adalah kira-kira 4 inci panjang. Pada peringkat ini, janin berkembang pesat. Janin sudah boleh menggerakkan anggota badan, badan dan kepala.

input: Pregnancy Week 15 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: e detected) Minggu 15 Panjang janin yang berusia 15 minggu adalah kira-kira 4 inci panjang. Pada peringkat ini, janin berkembang pesat. Janin sudah boleh menggerakkan anggota badan, badan dan kepala. Mata bayi anda kini lebih sensitif kepada cahaya dan telinga janin telah berkembang, dimana ia cukup untuk mengesan bunyi, termasuklah suara ibu. Janin akan terus berkembang dengan pesat, dan perkembangan yang penting sedang berlaku. Sekiranya ini bukan kandungan pertama anda, anda mungkin dapat merasakan pergerakan halus di rahim anda. Agak sukar buat Ibu yang pertama kali hamil untuk merasakan pergerakan halus ini. Jangan risau, anda akan dapat merasai tendangan pertama anak anda tidak lama lagi. Simptom Adakah anda perasan terdapat banyak lelehan dalam seluar anda?Kebanyakan wanita hamil mengalaminya. Ia adalah kerana lebih banyak darah yang mengalir di sekitar kawasan pelvis anda pada ketika anda hamil dan ini boleh menyebabkan badan anda menghasilkan lebih banyak cecair putih susu yang dipanggil leucorrhoea yang memastikan faraj anda bersih dan bebas daripada jangkitan. Anda juga mungkin perasan bahawa kulit anda semakin kering. Tips Untuk Anda Sekiranya lelehan dipanggil leucorrhea ini berubah warna, berbau atau anda berasa sakit semasa membuang air kecil, anda terasa gatal dikawasan kemaluan, segera dapatkan pemeriksaan. Pakai pakaian dalam yang diperbuat daripada kapas, dan selesa. Anda boleh dapatkan maternity underwear supaya anda lebih selesa. Bagi anda yang mengalami masalah kulit yang kering, pakai krim atau balm yang mengandungi Shea Butter dan Vitamin E bagi melembapkan kulit. Jaga kebersihan diri, dan sentiasa peka terhadap sebarang perubahan yang merisaukan. Sono Ultrasound Jantina bayi sudah dapat dilihat melalui pemeriksaan Sono Ultrasound (Gender Scan). Tetapi, bergantung pada posisi bayi dan kerjasama bayi (sesetengah bayi merapatkan kaki sepanjang masa di sesi ultrasound- jadi jantina tidak dapat dikesan).

input: Pregnancy Week 16 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 16 / minggu 16 Week 16 The fetal nervous system continues to develop, and this allows your baby to start moving its arms and legs. The length of the fetus is also about 11.6cm. The fetus can also grasp the hand forming a fist. They also start punching inside your uterus. The fetus’s hair may also have started to grow on its head. Symptoms You may experience swollen and bleeding gums. Constipation during pregnancy is also the most common problem experienced by pregnant women. Nausea and vomiting or morning sickness may decrease or disappear for some women, but for other pregnant women, it may persist. Some women may also experience ligamentous pain, which is pain in the lower abdomen due to stretching of the ligaments that support the uterus. Tips For You When you find it difficult to pass a bowel movement, it can make you feel bloated and sick. So, eat foods that are high in fiber such as whole wheat bread, fruits and vegetables and legumes. Drink enough water and do light exercise. You can use a pregnancy belly support or a support band on your belly to reduce the pressure on your back and pelvis. Sono Ultrasound You can now make an appointment for Anatomy Scan. An Anatomy Scan is a detailed ultrasound examination and is usually performed between 18 and 29 weeks of pregnancy. Anatomy Scan aims to assess the growth and development of the baby, as well as assess the anatomy and function of major organs and structures, including the heart, brain, lungs, liver, kidneys and limbs. Minggu 16Sistem saraf janin terus berkembang, dan ini membolehkan bayi anda mula menggerakkan tangan dan kakinya. Panjang janin juga sudah berukuran kira-kira 11.6cm. Janin juga sudah boleh menggenggam tangan membentuk penumbuk. Mereka juga mula menumbuk didalam rahim anda. Rambut janin juga mungkin sudah mula tumbuh di atas kepalanya.Simptom Anda mungkin mengalami masalah gusi bengkak dan berdarah. Sembelit semasa hamil juga adalah yang paling kerap dialami oleh wanita hamil.

input: Pregnancy Week 16 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: janin juga mungkin sudah mula tumbuh di atas kepalanya.Simptom Anda mungkin mengalami masalah gusi bengkak dan berdarah. Sembelit semasa hamil juga adalah yang paling kerap dialami oleh wanita hamil. Mual dan muntah atau morning sickness mungkin berkurangan atau hilang bagi sesetengah wanita, tetapi bagi wanita hamil yang lain, ia mungkin berterusan.Sesetengah wanita juga mungkin mengalami rasa sakit pada bahagian ligamen, iaitu rasa sakit di bahagian bawah abdomen akibat regangan ligamen yang menyokong rahim.Tips Untuk AndaApabila anda merasa sukar untuk membuang air besar, ia boleh membuatkan anda berasa kembung dan sakit. Jadi, makan makanan yang tinggi serat seperti roti gandum, buah-buahan dan sayur-sayuran dan kekacang. Minum air secukupnya dan lakukan senaman ringan. Anda boleh menggunakan pregnancy belly support atau ikatan sokongan pada perut bagi mengurangkan tekanan pada belakang dan pada pelvis anda.Sono UltrasoundAnda sudah boleh membuat temujanji bagi Anatomy Scan. Anatomy Scan ialah pemeriksaan ultrasound yang terperinci dan biasanya dilakukan antara 18 hingga 29 minggu kehamilan. Anatomy Scan bertujuan untuk menilai pertumbuhan dan perkembangan bayi, serta menilai anatomi dan fungsi organ dan struktur utama, termasuklah jantung, otak, paru-paru, hati, buah pinggang dan juga anggota badan.

input: Pregnancy Week 17 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 17 / minggu 17 Week 17 Many women can feel their baby’s first movements between 18 and 24 weeks. You may feel like a gentle, fluttering movement described as the gentle flapping of a butterfly’s wings. For twin pregnancies, you may be able to feel more frequent fetal movements. At 17 weeks, your baby can respond to loud noises, opening and closing his mouth. Your baby can even move their eyes, although their eyes will remain closed for now. The length of the baby is about 12cm long and the size of a pomegranate.Symptoms You may experience some joint pain as your pregnancy grows. You may also feel tired and have trouble sleeping. Tips for you Not getting enough sleep during pregnancy can make you feel tired. To get a good night’s sleep, sleep on your side, use a pillow to support your stomach and try to sleep with a pillow placed between your knees. Minggu 17 Ramai wanita dapat merasakan pergerakan pertama bayi mereka antara 18 hingga 24 minggu. Anda mungkin merasakan rasa seperti pergerakan yang lembut, berkibar-kibar dan digambarkan seperti kibaran halus sayap rama-rama. Bagi kehamilan kembar, anda mungkin dapat merasakan pergerakan janin yang lebih kerap. Pada usia 17 minggu, bayi anda boleh bertindakbalas terhadap bunyi kuat, membuka dan menutup mulut. Malah bayi anda sudah boleh menggerakkan mata mereka, walaupun mata mereka akan terus tutup buat masa ini. Panjang bayi adalah kira-kira 12cm panjang dan sebesar buah delima. Simptom Anda mungkin mengalami sedikit sakit sendi apabila kandungan anda semakin besar. Anda juga mungkin rasa keletihan dan mengalami masalah untuk tidur. Tips Buat Anda Tidak mendapat tidur yang cukup semasa hamil boleh menyebabkan anda merasa letih. Bagi mendapatkan tidur yang lena, tidur mengiring, gunakan bantal untuk menyokong perut anda dan cuba tidur dengan bantal diletakkan di antara lutut anda.

input: Pregnancy Week 18 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 18 / minggu 18 Week 18 The fetus is about 14.2cm long and weighs around 195gm. Your baby’s hearing, swallowing and sucking reflexes develop during this week. Your baby will also move their arms and legs a lot. They are also covered with a layer of ‘vernix’. Vernix, also known as vernix caseosa, is a waxy white substance that covers the skin of a newborn baby. It acts as a natural protector that forms on the skin of the fetus.Symptoms You may notice red or purple stripes or so-called ‘stretch marks’ on your stomach, thighs and breasts. These are stretch marks and they are usually caused by hormones and because of the stretching of your skin. Your breasts may also getting bigger, especially if this is your first pregnancy. Tips for you There are several things you can do to reduce the problem of stretch marks, namely massaging the area with stretch marks can help increase blood flow and reduce stretch marks. Additionally, keeping your skin hydrated can help improve skin elasticity and reduce the appearance of stretch marks. Use a moisturizer daily and pay special attention to areas prone to stretch marks such as the stomach, hips and thighs.Sono Ultrasound This is the right time for you to have an Anatomy Scan. This anatomical scan can help identify any abnormalities or birth defects that may be present, allowing planning to be done to manage any necessary treatment. Minggu 18 Janin sudah berukuran kira-kira 14.2cm panjang dan berat sekitar 195gm. Refleks pendengaran, menelan dan menghisap bayi anda berkembang pada minggu ini. Bayi anda juga akan banyak menggerakkan tangan dan kaki mereka. Mereka juga sudah diliputi dengan lapisan ‘vernix’. Vernix juga dikenali sebagai vernix caseosa, adalah bahan putih berlilin yang menutupi kulit bayi yang baru lahir. Ia bertindak sebagai pelindung semula jadi yang terbentuk pada kulit janin. Simptom Anda mungkin mengesan jalur merah atau ungu atau dipanggil ‘stretch mark’ pada perut,paha dan payudara anda.

input: Pregnancy Week 18 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: lahir. Ia bertindak sebagai pelindung semula jadi yang terbentuk pada kulit janin. Simptom Anda mungkin mengesan jalur merah atau ungu atau dipanggil ‘stretch mark’ pada perut,paha dan payudara anda. Ini adalah tanda regangan dan ia biasanya disebabkan oleh hormon dan kerana berlakunya regangan pada kulit anda. Payudara anda mungkin juga semakin membesar, terutamanya jika ini adalah kehamilan pertama anda. Tips Buat Anda Terdapat beberapa perkara yang boleh anda lakukan untuk mengurangkan masalah stretch mark iaitu dengan mengurut kawasan yang mempunyai stretch mark dapat membantu meningkatkan aliran darah dan mengurangkan tanda regangan. Selain itu, kekalkan hidrasi kulit anda boleh membantu meningkatkan keanjalan kulit dan mengurangkan penampilan stretch mark. Gunakan pelembab setiap hari dan beri perhatian khusus pada kawasan yang terdedah kepada tanda regangan seperti perut, pinggul dan peha. Sono Ultrasound Inilah masa yang sesuai untuk anda jalani Anatomy Scan. Imbasan anatomi ini boleh membantu mengenal pasti sebarang keabnormalan atau kecacatan kelahiran yang mungkin ada, membolehkan perancangan dilakukan bagi menguruskan sebarang rawatan yang diperlukan.

input: Pregnancy Week 19 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 19 / minggu 19 Week 19 The length of the fetus is about 15.3cm and the approximate weight is 240g. The fetus is now more active and its movements can be felt by the mother. The fetus is covered with fine hair called lanugo, which helps regulate body temperature. The fetal brain is developing rapidly, and nerve cells begin to form connections with each other. Symptoms You may feel uncomfortable while sleeping because of the growing belly. You may also experience mild contractions called Braxton Hicks. These are mild, irregular contractions that can occur as early as the second trimester, and they are usually painless.Tips for youIf you feel uncomfortable while sleeping, use a pillow to support your stomach so that you can sleep more comfortably. Some tips if you experience Braxton Hicks is to change your position. For example if you are sitting or lying down, try standing up and walking around. You can also try taking a warm bath as it can help relax your muscles and ease the discomfort.Sono Ultrasound Your baby is now growing and 18-19 weeks and above, you are suitable to do a 5D, 6D scan to see your baby’s face through the latest technology. Minggu 19Panjang janin adalah kira-kira 15.3cm dan berat anggaran 240g. Janin kini lebih aktif dan pergerakannya dapat dirasai oleh ibu. Janin dilitupi rambut halus yang dipanggil lanugo, ia membantu mengawal suhu badan.Otak janin pula berkembang pesat, dan sel-sel saraf mula membentuk hubungan antara satu sama lain.Simptom Anda mungkin merasa tidak selesa semasa tidur kerana perut yang semakin membesar. Anda mungkin merasai kontraksi ringan yang dipanggil sebagai Braxton Hicks. Iaitu kontraksi ringan dan tidak teratur yang boleh berlaku seawal trimester kedua, dan ia biasanya tidak menyakitkan.Tips Buat AndaSekiranya anda merasa tidak selesa semasa tidur, gunakan bantal untuk menyokong perut anda supaya anda dapat tidur dengan lebih selesa.Beberapa tips sekiranya anda mengalami Braxton Hicks adalah tukar kedudukan anda.

input: Pregnancy Week 19 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: rasa tidak selesa semasa tidur, gunakan bantal untuk menyokong perut anda supaya anda dapat tidur dengan lebih selesa.Beberapa tips sekiranya anda mengalami Braxton Hicks adalah tukar kedudukan anda. Contohnya jika anda sedang duduk atau baring, cuba berdiri dan berjalan-jalan. Anda juga boleh cuba untuk mandi air suam kerana ia boleh membantu mengendurkan otot anda dan meredakan ketidakselesaan.Sono UltrasoundBayi anda kini semakin membesar dan diusia 18-19 minggu keatas, anda sesuai untuk melakukan 5D, 6D scan untuk melihat wajah bayi anda melalui teknologi terkini.

input: Pregnancy Week 20 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 20 / minggu 20 Week 20 At the age of 20 weeks, the fetus is the size of a banana with a length of 25.6cm. The fetus has a fully formed body, including eyebrows, eyelashes, and hair. The eyes are fully developed, but the iris still lacks pigment. Your baby is now covered in a white, oily layer of “vernix”. Vernix also serves to protect their delicate skin from drying out in the amniotic fluid. You may also already be able to read your baby’s bedtime. You can feel the movements, kicks of the fetus and estimate the active time in the womb.Symptoms You may be easily awakened at night by sudden pain in your calf. You may experience cramping, which is common during pregnancy. Tips for you If you experience cramps during sleep, rub the muscles vigorously or pull your toes towards the ankle. In addition, you are encouraged to exercise with appropriate exercises during the day to avoid muscle cramps.Do not leave your folic acid, vitamins, or Iberet pills. Follow the recommendations prescribed by the doctor. Minggu 20 Pada usia 20 minggu, janin adalah sebesar sebiji pisang dengan ukuran 25.6cm panjang. Janin mempunyai badan yang terbentuk sepenuhnya, termasuklah kening, bulu mata, dan rambut. Mata telah berkembang sepenuhnya, tetapi iris masih kekurangan pigmen.Bayi anda kini diselaputi lapisan putih dan berminyak “vernix”. Vernix juga berfungsi untuk melindungi kulit halus mereka daripada kering dalam cecair amniotik. Anda juga mungkin sudah dapat membaca waktu tidur bayi anda. Anda dapat merasakan pergerakan, tendangan janin dan mengagak waktu aktifnya didalam kandungan. Simptom Anda mungkin mudah terjaga pada waktu malam kerana sakit yang mendadak di betis anda. Anda mungkin mengalami kekejangan, yang biasa berlaku semasa kehamilan. Tips Buat Anda Sekiranya anda mengalami kekejangan pada waktu tidur, gosok otot dengan kuat atau tarik jari kaki anda ke arah buku lali.

input: Pregnancy Week 20 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: kin mengalami kekejangan, yang biasa berlaku semasa kehamilan. Tips Buat Anda Sekiranya anda mengalami kekejangan pada waktu tidur, gosok otot dengan kuat atau tarik jari kaki anda ke arah buku lali. Selain itu, anda digalakkan untuk bersenam dengan senaman yang sesuai pada siang hari untuk mengelakkan kekejangan otot. Jangan tinggalkan folic acid, vitamin, atau pil Iberet anda. Ikut saranan yang telah ditetapkan oleh doktor.

input: Pregnancy Week 21 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 21 / minggu 21 Week 21 Now the fetus weighs 350g and measures 26.7cm. Skin becomes less translucent as fat begins to accumulate underneath. Now the fetus can hear sounds more clearly, including your voice and heartbeat. While the fetal brain is developing rapidly and forming billions of neurons. And the retina of the eye is fully formed and the fetus can begin to see light.Symptoms You may feel tired easily when walking and standing because of your growing baby. Cramps may also occur frequently, especially at night. You will feel more appetizing to eat and feel hungry easily. Tips for you Eat healthy food and eating lots of fruits and vegetables will give you more energy than junk food. By having a balanced diet, the risk of getting GDM during pregnancy is less. Wear shoes that are comfortable enough to support your current weight. Minggu 21Sekarang janin sudah seberat 350g dan berukuran 26.7cm. Kulit menjadi kurang lut sinar apabila lemak mula mengumpul di bawahnya.Kini janin boleh mendengar bunyi dengan lebih jelas, termasuklah suara dan degupan jantung anda. Manakala otak janin sedang berkembang pesat dan membentuk berbilion neuron. Kini retina mata pula terbentuk sepenuhnya dan janin boleh mula melihat cahaya. SimptomAnda mungkin terasa mudah letih apabila berjalan dan berdiri kerana kandungan anda yang semakin membesar. Kekejangan juga mungkin kerap terjadi terutamanya pada waktu malam. Anda akan berasa lebih berselera untuk makan dan mudah terasa lapar. Tips Buat Anda Amalkan diet dan makan makanan yang sihat, dengan mengambil banyak buah-buahan dan sayur-sayuran akan memberi anda lebih tenaga daripada makanan ringan. Dengan mengamalkan diet yang seimbang, risiko untuk mendapat GDM semasa hamil adalah kurang. Pakai kasut yang selesa supaya dapat menampung berat anda sekarang, serta tidak menambahkan rasa sakit yang tertumpu pada bahagian kaki.

input: Pregnancy Week 22 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 22 / minggu 22 Week 22 The length of the fetus is about 27.8cm and the weight is about 430g. The fetus has already begun to practice breathing movements, although the lungs are not yet fully developed. The fetus can now hear more complex sounds, and may even respond to certain voices or sounds. Symptoms You may easily feel backache, headache and some pregnant women also experience hemorrhoids. You may also find fine lines or stretch marks on the abdomen, thighs and hips.Tips for you Constipation can cause hemorrhoids. If you have hemorrhoids caused by constipation, eat foods that are high in fiber. Including fruits, vegetables, wheat-based foods such as wholemeal bread and drinking plenty of water can help reduce constipation and hemorrhoids. It is important that you continue regular prenatal care at this stage, including ultrasound examinations to monitor fetal development.If you find that your stretch marks have started to appear, don’t worry, use balms and creams that contain shea butter, Vitamin C & E to reduce the effects of stretch marks. Legumes also benefit you a lot during pregnancy. It is rich in folate and protein. Practice eating beans if there is no allergy.Sono Ultrasound You can now make an appointment for a VR Scan. VR Scan is suitable from 22-40 weeks of pregnancy. You will wear a VR box and see your baby up close in the form of a 5D scan Minggu 22Panjang janin adalah kira-kira 27.8cm dan berat lebih kurang 430g. Janin sudah mula mengamalkan pergerakan pernafasan, walaupun paru-paru belum berkembang sepenuhnya. Janin kini boleh mendengar bunyi yang lebih kompleks, malah mungkin bertindak balas kepada suara atau bunyi tertentu. SimptomAnda mungkin mudah terasa sakit belakang, sakit kepala malah sesetengah wanita hamil juga mengalami masalah buasir. Anda juga mungkin mengesan jalur halus atau stretch mark dibahagian perut, peha dan pinggul. Tips Buat AndaSembelit boleh menyebabkan buasir.

input: Pregnancy Week 22 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: ah sesetengah wanita hamil juga mengalami masalah buasir. Anda juga mungkin mengesan jalur halus atau stretch mark dibahagian perut, peha dan pinggul. Tips Buat AndaSembelit boleh menyebabkan buasir. Jika anda mengalami masalah buasir berpunca daripada sembelit, makan makanan yang tinggi serat. Termasuklah buah-buahan, sayur-sayuran, makanan berasaskan gandum seperti roti wholemeal dan minum banyak air boleh membantu mengurangkan masalah sembelit dan buasir. Adalah penting untuk anda meneruskan penjagaan prenatal yang kerap pada peringkat ini, termasuklah pemeriksaan ultrasound bagi memantau perkembangan janin.Sekiranya anda dapati stretch mark anda telah mula muncul, jangan khuatir, gunakan balm dan krim yang mengandungi shea butter, Vitamin C & E bagi mengurangkan kesan stretch mark. Kekacang juga banyak memberi manfaat kepada anda semasa hamil. Ia kaya dengan folat dan protein. Amalkan makan kekacang sekiranya tiada alahan. Sono UltrasoundAnda kini sudah boleh membuat temujanji untuk VR Scan. VR Scan sesuai dilakukan bermula usia kandungan 22-40 minggu. Anda akan memakai VR box dan melihat bayi anda secara dekat dalam bentuk 5D scan.

input: Pregnancy Week 23 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 23 / minggu 23 Week 23 The lungs continue to develop, and the fetus may begin to practice breathing movements by inhaling and exhaling small amounts of amniotic fluid. The fetus’s bones also harden and the fetus’s taste buds begin to develop, and it may be able to taste the amniotic fluid. The fetus is growing and almost fills the space in your abdomen. You may be able to see your belly rippling as your baby kicks hard from inside. At 23 weeks gestation, the fetus becomes more active and its organs continue to mature. It is a critical time for lung and brain development, and will continue to develop throughout pregnancy.Symptoms You may feel pain in the abdomen where your baby is positioned, it is caused by your expanding uterus. You may also feel short of breath. This happens because, when the uterus expands, it pushes against the diaphragm and makes it harder for you to breathe.Many pregnant women also often experience back pain. As the uterus continues to grow, it can put pressure on the lower back, causing you to feel uncomfortable.Tips for you Drink plenty of water to stay hydrated and help reduce swelling. Doing light exercise, such as walking can help reduce back pain. Even light exercise can help improve your sleep. It is not too early if you want to increase your knowledge about childbirth and how to care for babies by attending classes or reading books and articles. Minggu 23Paru-paru terus berkembang, dan janin mungkin mula mengamalkan pergerakan pernafasan dengan menyedut dan menghembus sejumlah kecil cecair amniotik.Tulang janin juga semakin keras dan tunas rasa janin mula berkembang, dan ia mungkin dapat merasai rasa cecair amniotik.Janin semakin membesar dan hampir memenuhi ruang perut anda. Anda mungkin dapat melihat perut anda yang berombak apabila bayi anda menendang kuat dari dalam. Di usia kandungan 23 minggu, janin menjadi semakin aktif dan organnya juga terus matang.

input: Pregnancy Week 23 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: g perut anda. Anda mungkin dapat melihat perut anda yang berombak apabila bayi anda menendang kuat dari dalam. Di usia kandungan 23 minggu, janin menjadi semakin aktif dan organnya juga terus matang. Ia merupakan masa kritikal untuk perkembangan paru-paru dan otak, dan akan terus berkembang sepanjang kehamilan. SimptomAnda mungkin berasa sakit di bahagian perut dimana kedudukan bayi anda, ia berpunca dari rahim anda yang mengembang.Anda juga mungkin rasa sesak nafas. Ini berlaku kerana, apabila rahim mengembang, ia menolak diafragma dan menjadikan anda lebih sukar untuk bernafas.Ramai wanita hamil juga kerap mengalami rasa sakit belakang. Apabila rahim terus membesar, ia boleh memberi tekanan pada bahagian bawah belakang, menyebabkan anda merasa tidak selesa. Tips Buat AndaMinum banyak air untuk kekalkan hidrasi dan membantu mengurangkan bengkak. Lakukan senaman ringan, seperti berjalan boleh membantu mengurangkan sakit belakang. Malah senaman ringan juga membantu memperbaiki tidur anda. Ia tidaklah terlalu awal sekiranya anda ingin menambah ilmu mengenai informasi tentang bersalin dan cara penjagaan bayi dengan menghadiri kelas atau membaca buku dan artikel.

input: Pregnancy Week 24 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 24 / minggu 24 Week 24 The fetus is now about 30cm long and weighs around 600g. Hair also started to grow more on the head and eyebrows. The ear in the fetus is fully developed. It works by controlling the sense of balance.Fetuses begin to accumulate fat under their skin, this fat will help regulate their body temperature after birth. You may need to do the MGTT (Modified Glucose Tolerance Test) where you will be given sugary drinks a second time to check your blood sugar levels.Symptoms Some pregnant women experience carpal tunnel syndrome or tingling and numbness in the fingers and wrists. Your hands and feet may also swell. Another symptom is that you may feel itchy skin and in eye area and also dry skin.Tips for you Try using a moisturizer if you have dry skin and use tear drops if you experience itchy eyes. Try to limit the time you have to use the phone and computer. If you have carpal tunnel syndrome, wearing a wrist splint at night can help keep your wrist in a neutral position and reduce pressure on the median nerve.Ultrasound Scans & TestsLet’s check the types of Ultrasound Scans and tests that you can do at 24 weeks of pregnancy: Growth ScanGender Scan Anatomy Scan 2D, 5D and 6D Scans VR Scan NIPT test Growth Scan: A growth scan, also known as a fetal growth ultrasound, is performed to assess your baby’s growth and development. It measures the baby’s size, estimates the weight, and evaluates the overall well-being. The scan helps monitor the baby’s growth rate, amniotic fluid levels, and placental function.Gender Scan: A gender scan, also referred to as a sex determination scan, is an ultrasound to reveal the baby’s gender if you choose to know. It can typically be done around 18 to 20 weeks, but it can sometimes be performed during the 24-week mark. This scan is optional and is not a part of routine prenatal care.

input: Pregnancy Week 24 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: nder if you choose to know. It can typically be done around 18 to 20 weeks, but it can sometimes be performed during the 24-week mark. This scan is optional and is not a part of routine prenatal care.Anatomy Scan: The anatomy scan, also called a detailed or anomaly scan, is a comprehensive ultrasound examination usually performed between 18 to 22 weeks of pregnancy. It assesses the baby’s major organs, limbs, and overall anatomy to check for any structural abnormalities or markers for certain conditions. This scan provides valuable information about the baby’s development.2D, 5D, and 6D Scans: These terms refer to the different types of ultrasound imaging technologies available.2D Scan: A traditional two-dimensional ultrasound scan that displays a black and white image of the baby.5D Scan: This refers to the use of advanced software to create a real-time moving image of the baby in three dimensions (3D) and adds color and depth to the image, making it more realistic.6D Scan: It is a marketing term used by some providers to describe a similar experience to a 5D scan with additional enhancements, such as virtual reality (VR) goggles or other technologies to enhance the visualization experience.It’s important to note that 5D and 6D scans are not standard medical scans and are usually offered by private clinics as a way to provide enhanced imaging experiences for parents.VR Scan: A VR (Virtual Reality) scan is a specialized type of ultrasound scan that incorporates virtual reality technology. It allows expectant parents to experience a virtual representation of their baby’s features and movements in a more immersive way. This type of scan offers a unique and interactive experience, but it’s considered an optional add-on and is not part of routine prenatal care.NIPT Test: Non-Invasive Prenatal Testing (NIPT) is a blood test that screens for common chromosomal abnormalities, such as Down syndrome (trisomy 21), trisomy 18, and trisomy 13.

input: Pregnancy Week 24 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 3)
expected: outine prenatal care.NIPT Test: Non-Invasive Prenatal Testing (NIPT) is a blood test that screens for common chromosomal abnormalities, such as Down syndrome (trisomy 21), trisomy 18, and trisomy 13. It analyzes fetal DNA present in the mother’s bloodstream. NIPT is typically offered between 10 to 12 weeks of pregnancy, but it can still be performed at 24 weeks if necessary.It’s important to consult with your healthcare provider regarding the availability and suitability of these scans and tests based on your specific needs, preferences, and medical history. They will guide you on which scans and tests are recommended during your pregnancy journey. Minggu 24Janin kini sudah berukuran kira-kira 30cm panjang dan berat sekitar 600g. Rambut juga mula tumbuh lebih banyak dibahagian kepala dan kening. Telinga dalam janin telah berkembang sepenuhnya. Ia berfungsi dengan mengawal deria keseimbangan. Janin mula mengumpul lemak di bawah kulit mereka, lemak ini yang akan membantu mengawal suhu badan mereka selepas lahir nanti. Anda mungkin perlu melakukan ujian MGTT (minum air gula) buat kali kedua bagi memeriksa tahap gula dalam darah anda.SimptomSesetengah wanita hamil mengalami Sindrom carpal tunnel atau rasa kesemutan dan kebas pada jari dan pergelangan tangan. Tangan dan kaki anda juga mungkin membengkak.Simptom lain ialah anda mungkin terasa gatal pada kulit dan bahagian mata dan kulit terasa kering. Tips Buat AndaCuba gunakan pelembap sekiranya anda mengalami masalah kulit yang kering dan gunakan titisan air mata jika ada alami rasa gatal pada mata. Cuba untuk hadkan masa sekiranya anda perlu menggunakan telefon dan komputer. Sekiranya anda mengalami Sindrom carpal tunnel, memakai splint pada pergelangan tangan pada waktu malam boleh membantu mengekalkan pergelangan tangan anda dalam kedudukan neutral dan mengurangkan tekanan pada saraf median.

input: Pregnancy Week 24 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 4)
expected: i Sindrom carpal tunnel, memakai splint pada pergelangan tangan pada waktu malam boleh membantu mengekalkan pergelangan tangan anda dalam kedudukan neutral dan mengurangkan tekanan pada saraf median. Sono Ultrasound Jom periksa jenis Sono Ultrasound yang boleh anda lakukan di usia kandungan 24 minggu :Growth Scan Gender ScanAnatomy Scan2D, 5D dan 6D ScanVR ScanNIPT test

input: Pregnancy Week 25 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 25 / minggu 25 Week 25 At the age of 25 weeks, the fetus actively moves and begins to respond to sounds. The fetal brain is also developing rapidly. The fetus now weighs 660g with a length of 34.6cm. The development of the sense of touch, taste and smell. Meanwhile, the iris still lacks pigment. The fetus can now regulate its own body temperature.Symptoms Easy to feel tired and have trouble sleeping. Some women also experience the following symptoms: – breast pain – leg cramps – feels hot – urinary tract infections and vaginal infections Tips for you If you have a vaginal infection, it may be a common yeast infection (thrush). Symptoms include itching around the vagina, lumpy discharge, and pain when you urinate or have sex. Tips to prevent vaginal infections, wear loose cotton underwear and use soap or body wash that does not contain fragrance chemicals. Minggu 25Pada usia 25 minggu, janin bergerak secara aktif dan mula bertindak balas terhadap bunyi. Otak janin juga sedang berkembang pesat. Janin kini sudah seberat 660g dengan panjang 34.6cm. Berkembangnya deria sentuhan, rasa dan bau. Manakala, iris mata masih kekurangan pigmen. Janin kini boleh mengawal suhu badannya sendiri. SimptomMudah merasa letih dan masalah untuk tidur. Sesetengah wanita juga mengalami simptom seperti berikut :– sakit payudara – kaki mudah kejang – terasa panas– jangkitan air kencing dan jangkitan pada faraj Tips Buat AndaSekiranya anda mempunyai jangkitan faraj, ia mungkin jangkitan yis biasa (thrush). Tanda-tandanya termasuklah gatal-gatal di sekitar faraj, keputihan yang berketul-ketul, dan rasa pedih apabila anda kencing atau melakukan hubungan seks. Tips untuk mencegah jangkitan faraj, pakai seluar dalam kapas yang longgar dan gunakan sabun atau pencuci badan yang tidak mengandungi bahan kimia pewangi.

input: Pregnancy Week 26 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 26/ minggu 26 Week 26 Your baby is now about 35.6cm long and weighs around 760g. This is when the fetus eyes will open for the first time. As for the color of the iris, it will change until the baby is about two years old. The fetal lungs continue to develop and produce surfactant, which is a substance that helps maintain the air sacs in the lungs.
