The fetus also has a pattern of guarding and sleeping.Symptoms Among the symptoms you may encounter are: – Heartburn and indigestion Hormones that relax your muscles during pregnancy can also cause the valve between your stomach and esophagus to relax, a situation that leads to heartburn and indigestion. – Braxton Hicks contractions – Fatigue – Shortness of breath As the uterus expands, this situation puts pressure on the diaphragm and makes it harder for you to breathe.Tips for you As you approach this last trimester, you may feel tired and lethargic quickly. It is difficult to carry extra weight. Try to get as much quality sleep and adequate rest as possible. Control your diet, take care of your health and most importantly, get checked and treated if you find something abnormal in yourself and your fetus. Ultrasound Scans If you haven’t done the Anatomy Scan yet, you still have time to do it. Anatomy Scan aims to check and detect any abnormality in the fetus. Minggu 26Bayi anda kini berukuran kira-kira 35.6cm panjang dan berat sekitar 760g. Ketika inilah mata janin akan terbuka buat kali pertama. Bagi warna iris mata pula, ia akan berubah-ubah sehinggalah umur bayi kira-kira dua tahun. Paru-paru janin terus berkembang dan menghasilkan surfaktan, iaitu bahan yang membantu mengekalkan kantung udara di dalam paru-paru. Janin juga sudah mempunyai pola jaga dan tidur.

input: Pregnancy Week 26 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: ira-kira dua tahun. Paru-paru janin terus berkembang dan menghasilkan surfaktan, iaitu bahan yang membantu mengekalkan kantung udara di dalam paru-paru. Janin juga sudah mempunyai pola jaga dan tidur.SimptomAntara simptom-simptom yang mungkin akan anda hadapi ialah : – Pedih ulu hati dan senakHormon yang mengendurkan otot anda semasa hamil juga boleh menyebabkan injap di antara perut dan esofagus anda untuk berehat, situasi ini membawa kepada pedih ulu hati dan senak.– Kontraksi Braxton Hicks– Keletihan– Rasa sesak nafasApabila rahim mengembang, situasi ini akan memberi tekanan pada diafragma dan membuatkan anda lebih sukar untuk bernafas. Tips Buat AndaSemakin anda menghampiri trimester terakhir ini, anda mungkin berasa cepat letih dan lesu. Adalah sukar untuk membawang berat tambahan (kandungan). Cuba untuk dapatkan sebaik mungkin kualiti tidur dan rehat yang mencukupi. Kawal pemakanan anda, jaga kesihatan dan yang penting sekali, dapatkan pemeriksaan serta rawatan sekiranya anda dapati sesuatu kelainan pada diri dan kandungan anda. Sono UltrasoundSekiranya anda masih belum melakukan Anatomy Scan, anda masih sempat untuk melakukannya. Anatomy Scan bertujuan untuk memeriksa dan mengesan sebarang kelainan pada janin.

input: Pregnancy Week 27 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 27 / minggu 27 Week 27 You must now have started to be able to distinguish when the baby starts to hiccup in the womb. The baby’s kicks are also getting stronger and the mother’s stomach seems to be shaking due to the baby’s kicks. The baby’s lungs are now able to breathe and your baby is getting fluffier day by day. Fat has filled the folds of the skin and all their organs are maturing.Symptoms 1) Dizziness 2) Bleeding gums 3) The stomach feels itchy because of stretch marksTips for you Swollen and bleeding gums are common during pregnancy. If you experience bleeding gums during pregnancy, here are tips for you: – brush your teeth twice a day– avoid sugary drinks and snacks. – use a soft toothbrush – use alcohol-free mouthwash to reduce plaque Sono Ultrasound This is the right time for you to ‘capture’ the moment of your child’s face with a 5D/6D scan because your baby’s face already looks quite plump. Minggu 27Anda kini pasti sudah mula dapat membezakan apabila bayi mula sedu didalam kandungan. Tendangan bayi juga semakin kuat sehingga perut ibu kelihatan bergoyang akibat tendangan bayi. Paru-paru bayi kini mampu bernafas dan bayi anda juga semakin gebu dari hari ke hari. Lemak sudah mengisi lipatan-lipatan kulit dan semua organ mereka semakin matang. Simptom 1) Pening2) Gusi berdarah3) Bahagian perut terasa gatal kerana stretch markTips Buat AndaGusi bengkak dan berdarah adalah perkara biasa semasa hamil. Sekiranya anda mengalami masalah Gusi berdarah semasa hamil, ini tips buat anda :– bersihkan gigi sebanyak dua kali sehari,– elakkan minuman manis serta makanan ringan. – gunakan berus gigi lembut – gunakan ubat kumur tanpa alkohol untuk mengurangkan plak gigi Sono UltrasoundIni adalah masa yang sesuai untuk anda ‘capture’ momen wajah anak anda dengan 5D/6D scan kerana wajah bayi anda sudah kelihatan agak berisi.

input: Pregnancy Week 28 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 28/ minggu 28 Week 28 Congratulations! You are now in your third trimester. Your baby now weighs 1000 grams and is 37.6cm long. Your baby is now also able to open his eyes, close his eyes and blink his eyes. Your baby is also ready to be in the birth position. Your baby’s heart rate also changes all the time and is much faster than an adult’s. This is because babies hearts are so small that they can’t pump much blood, but they are able to do it (which is why their heartbeats are faster).Symptoms – You may experience dry, sensitive and flaky skin – Nose bleed – Your ankles and face may appear slightly swollen. This may be due to water retention or edema. Get expert advice because it is one of the signs of pre-eclampsia. This is a condition where you may feel completely fine, but then your blood pressure can become very high, very quickly. – Your back will also feel sore, due to the extra weight you carry. – Your joints and ligaments will also be more loose than usual.Tips for you Rest can help with most of your symptoms, and get a specialist checkup if you’re worried about your symptoms. Minggu 28Tahniah! Anda kini berada di trimester ketiga. Bayi anda kini seberat 1000gram dan berukuran panjang 37.6cm. Bayi anda kini juga berupaya untuk membuka mata, menutup mata dan mengelipkan mata. Bayi anda juga sudah bersedia untuk berada di posisi kelahiran iaitu berada dekat dengan pintu rahim anda. Degupan jantung bayi anda juga berubah sepanjang masa dan jauh lebih laju berbanding orang dewasa. Ini adalah kerana jantung bayi sangat kecil sehingga mereka tidak dapat mengepam banyak darah, tetapi mereka boleh melakukannya (kerana itulah degupan jantung mereka lebih cepat).Simptom– Anda mungkin mengalami masalah kulit yang kering, sensitif dan mengelupas– Hidung berdarah– Pergelangan kaki dan muka anda mungkin kelihatan sedikit bengkak. Ini mungkin disebabkan oleh water retention atau edema. Dapatkan nasihat pakar kerana ia salah satu tanda pre-eklampsia.

input: Pregnancy Week 28 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: ng berdarah– Pergelangan kaki dan muka anda mungkin kelihatan sedikit bengkak. Ini mungkin disebabkan oleh water retention atau edema. Dapatkan nasihat pakar kerana ia salah satu tanda pre-eklampsia. Ini adalah keadaan di mana anda mungkin berasa sihat sepenuhnya, tetapi kemudian tekanan darah anda boleh menjadi sangat tinggi, dengan pantas.– Punggung dan belakang anda juga akan merasa sakit, disebabkan oleh berat tambahan yang anda bawa. – Sendi dan ligamen anda juga akan menjadi lebih longgar daripada biasa.Tips Buat AndaRehat boleh membantu kebanyakan masalah gejala anda, serta dapatkan pemeriksaan pakar sekiranya anda merasa bimbang dengan gejala yang anda hadapi.

input: Pregnancy Week 29 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 29 / minggu 29 Week 29 Your baby has now filled almost the entire space in your stomach. The baby’s skin also no longer looks wrinkled like before. Your baby’s weight is now approaching 1.2kg with a length of 38.6cm. Your baby is perfectly formed and looks plump. Your baby is also preparing for the birth process.Symptoms 1) ‘Veriscose Veins’ may appear on your skin. It appears because the amount of blood is increasing and the uterus has also put pressure on the pelvis. 2) You may feel a little short of breath, especially when your baby is pushing on your lungs. It puts stress on your body.Tips for you Rest when you can. It is best if you try to rest and sleep on your side. Try supporting your body when you lie down by placing a pillow under your baby bump, and another pillow between your legs. Minggu 29Bayi anda kini sudah memenuhi hampir seluruh ruang yang ada didalam perut anda. Kulit bayi juga sudah tidak kelihatan berkedut seperti sebelumnya. Berat bayi anda kini menghampiri 1.2kg dengan panjang 38.6cm. Bayi anda sudah terbentuk dengan sempurna dan kelihatan berisi. Bayi anda juga sedang bersedia untuk proses kelahiran kelak.Simptom 1) ‘Veriscose Veins’ mungkin kelihatan pada kulit anda. Ia muncul kerana jumlah darah yang semakin meningkat dan uterus juga telah memberikan tekanan pada pelvis. 2) Anda mungkin berasa agak sesak nafas, terutamanya semasa bayi anda menolak paru-paru anda. Ia memberi tekanan pada badan anda. Tips Buat AndaRehat apabila anda boleh. Adalah lebih baik sekiranya anda cuba untuk berehat dan tidur mengiring. Cuba sokong badan anda apabila anda berbaring dengan meletakkan bantal di bawah baby bump anda, dan satu lagi bantal di antara kaki anda.

input: Pregnancy Week 30 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 30 / minggu 30 Week 30 Your baby is now 39.9cm long and weighs 1.3kg. Your baby continues to grow and mature rapidly at this stage, where many of his organs and systems are becoming more complete. The surface of the baby’s brain begins to wrinkle so that it can hold more brain cells. At this time, there are many baby behaviors that you can see through Sono Ultrasound. Your baby’s eyes can now focus and his vision will continue to develop both inside and outside the womb. Your baby’s bones also become harder and stronger, although they are still quite flexible to facilitate the birthing process.Symptoms You may experience the following symptoms: – vaginal discharge. It is caused by increased blood flow to the vaginal area and is normal during pregnancy. – fluid in the breast. You have already started producing colostrum. – heartburn– you may find your stomach itchy during pregnancy especially when the stomach is getting bigger.Tips for you If you experience itching in the stomach due to the growing fetus, taking a cold shower can also help relieve the itching, wear loose clothing and clothes made of cotton material.For some women, the fluid that comes out of the breast ( colostrum ) sometimes causes discomfort. You can use a Breast Pad so that the liquid that comes out does not get on your bra and clothes. Minggu 30Bayi anda kini berukuran 39.9cm panjang dan seberat 1.3kg. Bayi anda semakin terus membesar dan matang dengan cepat pada peringkat ini, dimana banyak organ dan sistemnya semakin lengkap. Permukaan otak bayi mula berkedut supaya ia dapat memegang lebih banyak sel otak. Pada waktu ini, banyak gelagat bayi yang anda dapat lihat melalui Sono Ultrasound. Mata bayi anda kini boleh fokus dan penglihatannya akan terus berkembang di dalam dan di luar rahim. Tulang bayi anda juga menjadi lebih keras dan kuat, walaupun ia masih agak mudah dilentur untuk memudahkan proses kelahiran.SimptomAnda mungkin mengalami simptom-simptom dibawah: – keputihan.

input: Pregnancy Week 30 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: rahim. Tulang bayi anda juga menjadi lebih keras dan kuat, walaupun ia masih agak mudah dilentur untuk memudahkan proses kelahiran.SimptomAnda mungkin mengalami simptom-simptom dibawah: – keputihan. Ia disebabkan oleh berlakunya peningkatan aliran darah ke kawasan faraj dan ia adalah normal semasa kehamilan.– cecair di payudara. Anda sudah mula menghasilkan kolostrum – pedih ulu hati– anda mungkin mendapati perut anda gatal-gatal ketika hamil terutamanya semasa perut semakin membesar.Tips Buat AndaSekiranya anda mengalami rasa gatal-gatal pada perut akibat kandungan yang semakin membesar, mandi dengan air sejuk juga dapat membantu melegakan rasa gatal dan pakai pakaian yang longgar dan pakaian yang diperbuat daripada material kapas yang sesuai untuk Ibu hamil. Bagi sesetengah wanita, cecair yang keluar dari payudara ( kolostrum ) kadangkala menimbulkan rasa tidak selesa. Anda boleh menggunakan Breast Pad supaya cecair yang keluar tidak terkena pada pakaian dalam anda.

input: Pregnancy Week 31 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 31/ minggu 31 Week 31 Now, your baby weighs about 1.5kg and is 41.1cm long. The amount of amniotic fluid or amniotic fluid surrounding your baby is increasing as your baby can now urinate. Fetuses have regular wake and sleep cycles and can spend up to 20 hours a day sleeping. The fetus’s digestive system is also almost fully developed, and it may begin to produce meconium.Symptoms Among the symptoms you may be experiencing right now are frequent Braxton Hicks contractions. You may feel your stomach tighten for 20 to 30 seconds, then relax again. Braxton Hicks are usually painless. You may also still have difficulty sleeping due to discomfort while lying down.Tips for you Pay attention to your Braxton Hicks pattern, if the pattern and intervals are consistent and painful, immediately go to the hospital for an examination. Always be aware of your baby’s movements. If you find your baby moving less, or there are any symptoms that worry you, immediately get a specialist examination.Now it’s time for you to prepare for the birth of your baby and preparations for abstinence. (Check out our article on Preparation for Birth & Abstinence) Among the items you can prepare: Breast milk storage Milk bottle Wet Wipes Special baby bottle cleaner Baby liquid laundry Powder milk container Baby nail clippers Bottle brush Breastpump Maternity Pads Minggu 31Sekarang, bayi anda adalah seberat kira-kira 1.5kg dengan 41.1cm panjang. Jumlah cecair amniotik atau air ketuban yang mengelilingi bayi anda semakin meningkat kerana bayi anda kini boleh kencing.Janin mempunyai kitaran bangun dan tidur yang tetap dan boleh menghabiskan sehingga 20 jam sehari untuk tidur. Sistem pencernaan janin juga hampir berkembang sepenuhnya, dan ia mungkin mula menghasilkan mekonium.SimptomAntara simptom yang mungkin anda alami sekarang ialah kontraksi Braxton Hicks yang kerap. Anda mungkin merasakan perut anda seperti mengeras selama 20 hingga 30 saat, kemudian berehat semula.

input: Pregnancy Week 31 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: .SimptomAntara simptom yang mungkin anda alami sekarang ialah kontraksi Braxton Hicks yang kerap. Anda mungkin merasakan perut anda seperti mengeras selama 20 hingga 30 saat, kemudian berehat semula. Braxton Hicks biasanya tidak menyakitkan. Anda juga mungkin masih mengalami masalah sukar tidur akibat ketidakselesaan semasa berbaring. Tips Buat AndaPerhatikan pola Braxton Hicks anda, sekiranya pola dan sela masa adalah konsisten dan menyakitkan, segera ke hospital untuk pemeriksaan. Sentiasalah peka dengan pergerakan bayi anda. Sekiranya anda mendapati bayi anda kurang bergerak, atau terdapat sebarang gejala yang merisaukan anda, segera dapatkan pemeriksaan pakar.Sekarang sudah tiba masanya untuk anda melakukan persiapan kelahiran bayi anda dan persiapan berpantang. (Periksa article kami tentang Persiapan Kelahiran & Berpantang)Antara barang yang boleh anda siapkan : Breast milk storage Botol SusuTisu BasahPencuci khas botol bayiSerbuk pencuci baju bayiBekas simpan susu Pemotong kuku babyBerus botol Pam susuMaternity PadKelengkapan Berpantang

input: Pregnancy Week 32 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 32 / minggu 32 Week 32 The baby is now 42.4cm long and weighs 1.7kg. The baby begins to look more like a newborn, with distinct features, including eyelashes, eyebrows and hair. Your baby is also starting to build his own immune system and will be able to fight infections after birth.Symptoms Frequent Braxton Hicks Constipation Colostrum milk starts coming out Tips for you If you are experiencing constipation at the moment, eat more fruits to facilitate defecation and drink plenty of plain water. You may feel more tired than usual. Try to get plenty of rest throughout the day. Your baby is probably in the cephalic or head down position now, ready to be born. If this is not the case (head position is above or horizontal), don’t worry, you still have time. Minggu 32Bayi kini berukuran 42.4cm panjang dan seberat 1.7kg. Bayi mula kelihatan lebih seperti bayi baru lahir, dengan ciri yang jelas, termasuk bulu mata, kening dan rambut. Bayi anda juga mula membina sistem imunnya sendiri dan akan dapat melawan jangkitan selepas lahir.Simptom Braxton Hicks yang kerapSembelitSusu Kolostrum mula keluar Tips Buat AndaSekiranya anda mengalami masalah sembelit ketika ini, banyakkan makan buah-buahan untuk memudahkan membuang air besar dan minum air kosong yang banyak. Anda mungkin merasa lebih letih daripada biasa. Cuba untuk dapatkan banyak rehat sepanjang hari.Bayi anda mungkin sedang berada di kedudukan cephalic atau kepala dibawah sekarang, bersedia untuk dilahirkan. Jika ini tidak berlaku (kedudukan kepala berada diatas atau melintang), jangan risau, anda masih ada masa.

input: Pregnancy Week 33 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 33 / minggu 33 Week 33 Your baby’s brain and nervous system are now fully developed. The bones harden, while the bones of the skull will remain soft until the baby is around 12 – 18 months old. Having some flexibility in this part of the head makes it easier for your baby to go down the birth canal more easily. Your baby now weighs 1.9kg and is 43.7cm long. Your baby’s immune system is still developing and will continue to develop until after birth.Symptoms You may start to feel like something is weighing down your pelvis. This could be a sign that your baby is in a head-down position, ready to be born and that your baby is growing. Other symptoms, you may also have a headache, the body feels hot and back pain due to the growing contents. Tips for you Do safe exercise regularly during pregnancy. It helps to increase energy and prepare your body for labor later. Attend childbirth classes and practice breathing techniques. This is the time for you to prepare and pack your hospital bag. This advance preparation can help you in the event of an emergency and prepare for the day of delivery. Minggu 33Otak dan sistem saraf bayi anda kini berkembang sepenuhnya. Tulang semakin mengeras, manakala tulang tengkorak akan kekal lembut sehingga bayi berusia sekitar 12 – 18 bulan. Mempunyai sedikit fleksibiliti pada bahagian kepala ini memudahkan bayi anda untuk menyusuri saluran kelahiran dengan lebih mudah.Bayi anda kini seberat 1.9kg dengan panjang 43.7cm. Sistem imun bayi anda masih sedang berkembang dan akan terus berkembang sehinggalah selepas lahir. SimptomAnda mungkin mula terasa seperti ada sesuatu yang memberatkan pelvis anda. Ini boleh menjadi petanda bahawa bayi anda dalam kedudukan kepala ke bawah, yang bersedia untuk dilahirkan dan bayi anda semakin membesar. Simptom lain, anda juga mungkin mengalami sakit kepala, badan terasa panas dan sakit belakang akibat kandungan yang semakin membesar. Tips Buat Anda Lakukan senaman yang selamat dengan kerap semasa hamil.

input: Pregnancy Week 33 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: om lain, anda juga mungkin mengalami sakit kepala, badan terasa panas dan sakit belakang akibat kandungan yang semakin membesar. Tips Buat Anda Lakukan senaman yang selamat dengan kerap semasa hamil. Ia membantu untuk meningkatkan tenaga dan menpersiapkan badan anda untuk bersalin nanti. Hadiri kelas bersalin dan amalkan teknik pernafasan.Ini adalah masa untuk anda siapkan dan kemas beg hospital anda. Persediaan awal ini boleh membantu anda sekiranya kecemasan tiba lebih awal dan bersedia untuk hari bersalin nanti.

input: Pregnancy Week 34 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 34 / minggu 34 Week 34There isn’t much room anymore, but you can still feel your baby moving and kicking. Lumps on the stomach due to the movement of the baby can also be seen. Your baby is now 45cm long and weighs 2.1kg. The baby’s brain is now developing rapidly and will continue to develop until after birth. At this stage your baby is also developing the ability to regulate their body temperature.Symptoms Your breasts may feel enlarged and may release a small amount of yellowish colostrum. Colostrum is the early milk that is rich in antibodies and will help protect your baby from disease (if you breastfeed your baby later). Another symptom you may feel this week is back pain. You may also find that you are now urinating more and more often.Tips for you If your breasts feel sore, then you can wear a thin bra at night and wear a more supportive bra during the day.Sono Ultrasound Have you done a VR Scan? You can see an image of your baby up close when using this type of scan. Minggu 34Sudah tidak banyak ruang, tetapi anda masih boleh merasakan bayi anda bergerak dan menendang. Benjolan pada perut akibat pergerakan bayi juga boleh dilihat. Bayi anda kini sepanjang 45cm dan 2.1kg berat. Otak bayi kini sedang berkembang pesat dan akan terus berkembang sehinggalah selepas lahir. Pada peringkat ini juga bayi anda sedang meningkatkan keupayaan untuk mengawal suhu badan mereka.Simptom Payudara anda mungkin terasa membesar dan mungkin mengeluarkan sejumlah kecil kolostrum bewarna kekuningan. Kolostrum adalah susu awal yang kaya dengan antibodi dan akan membantu melindungi bayi anda daripada penyakit (jika anda susukan bayi anda nanti). Simptom lain yang mungkin anda rasakan minggu ini ialah rasa sakit belakang. Anda juga mungkin mendapati bahawa anda kini kencing lebih banyak dan kerap.Tips Buat AndaJika payudara anda terasa sakit, maka anda boleh memakai bra yang nipis pada waktu malam dan bra yang lebih menyokong payudara pada waktu siang.

input: Pregnancy Week 34 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: anda kini kencing lebih banyak dan kerap.Tips Buat AndaJika payudara anda terasa sakit, maka anda boleh memakai bra yang nipis pada waktu malam dan bra yang lebih menyokong payudara pada waktu siang.Sono Ultrasound Sudahkah anda buat imbasan VR Scan? Anda dapat melihat imej bayi anda secara dekat Apabila menggunakan imbasan jenis ini.

input: Pregnancy Week 35 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 35 / minggu 35 Week 35 Your baby is gaining weight and this will help them stay at the right temperature when they are born. Your baby is now 46.2cm long and weighs 2.4kg. Even if the situation in your stomach is quite tight because your baby is growing, you should still be able to count your baby’s movements sufficiently according to the set schedule. If you notice that your baby’s movements are reduced or slower than usual, immediately seek a specialist examination.Symptoms Now you may be experiencing pain in the ribs. This may be due to the position of the baby’s head below and legs on the side. When your baby kicks, you will feel pain in the ribs. Other symptoms are: stretch marks backache trouble sleeping headache constipation bloated stomach Tips for you This is the time for you to prepare for birth, breastfeeding and after birth. Around 3 to 5 days after birth, your milk will start to come in and your breasts will look bigger. You can prepare by measuring a nursing bra for use after birth. Minggu 35Bayi anda semakin berisi dan ini akan dapat membantu mereka kekal pada suhu yang sesuai apabila mereka dilahirkan. Bayi anda kini berukuran 46.2cm panjang dan berat 2.4kg. Walaupun keadaan didalam perut anda agak padat kerana bayi anda semakin membesar, anda sepatutnya masih dapat mengira pergerakan bayi anda mencukupi mengikut perkiraan yang ditetapkan. Sekiranya anda dapati pergerakan bayi anda berkurangan atau lambat daripada biasa, segera dapatkan pemeriksaan pakar. SimptomSekarang anda mungkin mengalami rasa sakit pada rusuk. Ini mungkin kerana posisi kepala bayi dibawah dan kaki dibahagian rusuk. Apabila bayi anda menendang, anda akan merasa sakit pada bahagian rusuk. Simptom lain ialah : stretch marksakit belakangmasalah untuk tidursakit kepalasembelitkembung perut Tips Buat AndaIni adalah masanya untuk anda lakukan persediaan kelahiran, penyusuan dan persediaan selepas kelahiran.

input: Pregnancy Week 35 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: : stretch marksakit belakangmasalah untuk tidursakit kepalasembelitkembung perut Tips Buat AndaIni adalah masanya untuk anda lakukan persediaan kelahiran, penyusuan dan persediaan selepas kelahiran. Sekitar 3 hingga 5 hari selepas kelahiran, susu anda akan mula hadir dan payudara anda akan kelihatan lebih besar. Anda boleh bersiap sedia dengan mengukur bra penyusuan untuk kegunaan selepas kelahiran.

input: Pregnancy Week 36 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 36 / minggu 36 Week 36 By now, your baby’s lungs may have matured enough to breathe outside the womb without any help. Your baby is now approximately 47.4cm long and weighs 2.6kg. Your baby may be ready to be in a head-down position for the birth process later, while some babies are in a transverse and inverted position. The waxy coating or vernix caseosa usually diminishes on the baby’s skin by now, and some babies usually still have remnants of it at birth.Symptoms As your body prepares for labor, you may notice a lot of discharge. The lower your baby’s position, you may find that you have difficulty breathing.You may also have started to experience swelling in your feet and ankles during pregnancy and it becomes more noticeable in the last weeks of pregnancy.Tips for you Staying active will make your body better prepared for the birth process later. Make sure you eat a balanced diet. Avoid eating foods that are high in salt and sugar. Minggu 36Kini, paru-paru bayi anda mungkin telah cukup matang untuk bernafas di luar rahim tanpa sebarang bantuan. Bayi anda kini berukuran kira-kira 47.4cm panjang dan 2.6kg berat. Bayi anda mungkin sudah bersedia berada pada posisi kepala dibawah untuk proses kelahiran nanti, manakala sesetengah bayi berada dalam kedudukan melintang dan songsang. Salutan berlilin atau vernix caseosa biasanya semakin berkurangan pada kulit bayi sekarang, dan sesetengah bayi biasanya masih mempunyai baki darinya semasa lahir. Simptom Semasa badan anda sedang bersedia untuk bersalin, anda mungkin perasan terdapat banyak keputihan. Semakin kebawah atau menurun posisi bayi anda, anda mungkin mendapati anda mengalami kesukaran bernafas. Anda juga mungkin sudah mula mengalami bengkak di kaki dan buku lali semasa kehamilan dan ia menjadi lebih ketara pada minggu-minggu terakhir kehamilan.Tips Buat AndaKekal aktif akan membuatkan badan anda lebih bersedia untuk proses kelahiran kelak. Pastikan anda makan makanan yang seimbang.

input: Pregnancy Week 36 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: menjadi lebih ketara pada minggu-minggu terakhir kehamilan.Tips Buat AndaKekal aktif akan membuatkan badan anda lebih bersedia untuk proses kelahiran kelak. Pastikan anda makan makanan yang seimbang. Elakkan makan makanan yang mengandungi garam dan gula yang tinggi.

input: Pregnancy Week 37 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 37 / minggu 37 Week 37 Your baby could be born any day now. Your are now considered ‘full-term’. It means your baby is mature enough, to survive in the outside world. Your baby now has an estimated weight of about 2.9kg and a length of 48.6cm.Through Sono Ultrasound, you may be able to see your baby’s facial expressions such as smiles, frowns and even looks like crying.Symptoms As your baby begins to move into your pelvis, you may begin to feel relief from the heartburn and indigestion you’ve been experiencing before. Other symptoms are: Braxton Hicks Backache Stretch marks that are more noticeable Tips for you Stay calm, and get enough rest. Always be aware of any changes and signs of birth such as bleeding, regular contractions, breaking of the amniotic fluid. Minggu 37Bayi anda boleh lahir pada bila-bila masa sekarang. Kandungan anda kini dianggap ‘full-term’. Ia bermaksud bayi anda cukup matang, untuk terus hidup di dunia luar.Bayi anda kini mempunyai anggaran berat kira-kira 2.9kg dan panjang berukuran 48.6cm. Melalui Sono Ultrasound, anda mungkin dapat melihat ekspesi muka bayi anda seperti senyum, kerut dahi malah kelihatan seperti menangis.Simptom Apabila bayi anda mula bergerak ke dalam pelvis anda, anda mungkin mula terasa lebih lega daripada pedih ulu hati dan senak perut yang anda rasakan sebelumnya. Simptom lain adalah: Braxton HicksSakit belakangStretch mark yang makin ketara Tips Buat AndaKekal tenang, dan dapatkan rehat yang secukupnya. Sentiasa peka dengan sebarang perubahan dan tanda-tanda kelahiran seperti turun tanda darah, sakit kontraksi secara berkala, pecah air ketuban.

input: Pregnancy Week 38 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 38 / minggu 38 Week 38Your baby’s weight is now approximately 3kg and more with an approximate length of 39.8cm. Before this, (in the second trimester) your baby is covered in soft, thick hair called lanugo. It’s mostly gone now, although some babies are born with patches of lanugo fur here and there. Bits of amniotic fluid that are swallowed in the womb, produce meconium which is a sticky green mucus in their intestines. It is the first stool that will come out after the baby is born.Symptoms As your due date approaches, you may feel more tired and find it difficult to sleep at night. As your baby continues to grow and move lower into your pelvis, you may experience some pressure and discomfort in this area. You will also experience Braxton Hicks.Tips for you Get plenty of rest. As you get closer to the due date, try to rest as much as possible and get a good night’s sleep. Drink plenty of water to maintain hydration in the body. In addition, it is important to attend all your prenatal appointments to monitor your and your baby’s health.Have you prepared things needed for the birth? Minggu 38Berat bayi anda kini anggaran 3kg dan lebih dengan panjang anggaran 39.8cm.Sebelum ini, (pada trimester kedua) bayi anda diselubungi bulu dengan rambut lembut dan lebat yang dipanggil lanugo. Ia kebanyakannya makin hilang sekarang, walaupun sesetengah bayi dilahirkan dengan tompokan bulu lanugo di sana sini.Cebisan cecair ketuban yang ditelan didalam rahim, menghasilkan mekonium iaitu lendiran hijau melekit didalam usus mereka. Ia adalah najis pertama yang akan keluar selepas bayi dilahirkan. Simptom Semakin hampir tarikh due date anda, anda mungkin berasa semakin letih dan sukar untuk tidur pada waktu malam.Semakin bayi anda terus membesar dan bergerak lebih rendah ke dalam pelvis anda, anda mungkin mengalami sedikit tekanan dan rasa tidak selesa di kawasan ini. Anda juga akan mengalami Braxton Hicks.Tips Buat AndaBanyakkan berehat.

input: Pregnancy Week 38 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia (part 2)
expected: ar dan bergerak lebih rendah ke dalam pelvis anda, anda mungkin mengalami sedikit tekanan dan rasa tidak selesa di kawasan ini. Anda juga akan mengalami Braxton Hicks.Tips Buat AndaBanyakkan berehat. Semakin anda menghampiri tarikh due date, cubalah untuk rehat sebanyak mungkin dan dapatkan tidur malam yang nyenyak. Minum banyak air untuk kekalkan hidrasi dalam badan. Selain dari itu, adalah penting untuk menghadiri semua janji temu prenatal anda bagi memantau kesihatan anda dan bayi anda.Sudahkah anda membuat persiapan kelahiran?

input: Pregnancy Week 39 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 39 / minggu 39 Week 39 You are now counting down the days to give birth to your baby. You can give birth anytime now. Your baby’s estimated weight is now 3.3kg and 50.7cm long. A few weeks ago, the baby’s skin was almost transparent but now they are starting to acquire a new layer that is harder and looks firmer. This helps them to protect their internal organs and helps regulate temperature. The immune system, lungs, liver are now fully developed. The baby’s head is also likely to be in the pelvis in preparation for birth. At this time, the baby may be more active in preparation for birth process, but they may be less mobile because of the limited space in the uterus.Symptoms Now you may be having lots of practice contractions or Braxton Hicks. But if it starts to feel painful, then it can be a sign of labor. You may also experience back pain as your baby moves down your pelvis. You may also feel more pressure in your lower abdomen now.Tips for you This is the time for you to be more sensitive to any changes and signs of birth. Most women have started to get signs of labor during this week. Among the signs you should pay attention to are: vaginal bleeding severe headache that won’t go away vision problems (blurred, sensitive to light, seeing spots or flashing lights) high temperature (over 37.5°c) without flu symptoms persistent abdominal pain water comes out or the amniotic fluid breaks Minggu 39Anda kini menghitung hari bagi melahirkan bayi anda. Anda boleh bersalin pada bila-bila masa saja sekarang. Anggaran berat bayi anda kini adalah 3.3kg dan 50.7cm panjang.Beberapa minggu yang lalu, kulit bayi adalah hampir telus tetapi sekarang mereka mula memperolehi lapisan baru yang lebih keras dan kelihatan lebih pejal. Ini membantu mereka untuk melindungi organ dalaman mereka dan membantu mengawal suhu.Sistem imun, paru-paru, hati kini berkembang sepenuhnya. Kepala bayi juga berkemungkinan berada di dalam pelvis sebagai persediaan untuk kelahiran nanti.

Pada waktu ini, bayi mungkin lebih aktif sebagai persediaan untuk proses kelahiran, tetapi mereka mungkin akan kurang bergerak kerana ruang dalam rahim yang terhad.SimptomKini anda mungkin mengalami banyak kontraksi latihan atau Braxton Hicks. Anda juga mungkin akan merasakan lebih tekanan di bahagian bawah perut anda sekarang.Tips Buat AndaIni adalah masanya untuk anda lebih peka dengan sebarang perubahan dan tanda-tanda kelahiran. input: Pregnancy Week 40 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 40 / minggu 40 Week 40Your baby is now estimated to be 51.2cm long and weigh 3.5kg. The baby’s body is now fully formed with all vital organs functioning properly. The brain continues to develop and will continue to develop rapidly during the first few years of life. The baby’s lungs are now fully mature and ready to take in oxygen after birth. Babies skin may also appear wrinkly, as they have lost most of the vernix caseosa layer that acts as a protective coating and lost some of the lanugo hair that once covered their skin.Symptoms Trouble sleeping Braxton Hicks contractions Backache Pain in the pelvis Stretch marks Tips for you If you are in pain holding contractions, here are some tips for you: stay active as this helps the baby move down and helps your cervix to open. This can speed up your delivery. shower with warm water during contractions, try different positions. ask your partner to massage your back to relieve some pain. With their support,it will encourage your body to produce more endorphins, which are great natural pain relievers. focus on breathing. The trick is to inhale deeply through the nose and exhale through the mouth. Minggu 40Bayi anda kini dianggarkan berukuran 51.2cm panjang dan seberat 3.5kg. Tubuh bayi kini telah terbentuk sepenuhnya dengan semua organ penting berfungsi dengan baik. Otak terus berkembang dan akan terus berkembang pesat dalam beberapa tahun pertama kehidupan. Paru-paru bayi kini sudah matang sepenuhnya dan bersedia untuk mengambil oksigen selepas bersalin.Kulit bayi juga mungkin kelihatan berkedut, kerana mereka telah kehilangan sebahagian besar lapisan vernix caseosa yang bertindak sebagai pelindung pelindung dan kehilangan sebahagian rambut lanugo yang pernah menutupi kulit mereka.

input: Pregnancy Week 9 | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: week 9 / minggu 9 Week 9 At this time, the length of the fetus is about 1 inch or almost 3cm. Arms and legs have grown longer and fingers and toes are beginning to form. The gender of the fetus also becomes clearer where the testicles or ovaries have started to form (but you probably won’t know if it’s a boy or a girl until 16-18 weeks of pregnancy). The face of the fetus is also becoming clearer where the eyes, ears and nose become clearer. Although the fetus has started to move, but this movement is still too small for the mother to feel. Symptoms Until now, the level of the pregnancy hormone hCG has doubled in your body every 2 or 3 days. The hormones Estrogen and Progesterone also increase to increase the blood supply to the uterus. The average pregnant woman describes this period as ‘very challenging’ because of unstable and easily distracted emotions. Tips for you It is important to note that at this stage of pregnancy, the fetus is still vulnerable and needs proper nutrition and care to continue to develop well. Practice a healthy lifestyle and schedule prenatal care for a healthy pregnancy.Drinking milk can provide a good source of calcium and protein for pregnant women. During pregnancy, calcium is important in building strong bones for growing fetus. Don’t forget to continue taking vitamins and folic acid. Minggu 9Ketika ini, panjang janin adalah kira-kira 1 inci atau hampir 3cm. Lengan dan kaki telah membesar lebih panjang dan jari tangan dan kaki mula terbentuk.Jantina janin juga semakin jelas dimana testis atau ovari sudah mula terbentuk (tetapi anda mungkin tidak akan mengetahui sama ada ia lelaki atau perempuan sehinggalah usia kandungan 16-18 minggu). Bahagian muka janin juga semakin jelas dimana mata, telinga dan hidung menjadi lebih jelas. Walaupun janin telah mula bergerak, tetapi pergerakan ini masih terlalu kecil untuk dirasai oleh ibu.

Amalkan gaya hidup yang sihat dan penjagaan pranatal yang mengikut jadual untuk kehamilan yang sihat.Minum susu dapat memberi sumber kalsium dan protein yang baik buat Ibu hamil. input: Pregnancy Week 4: Early Signs, Symptoms & What to Expect
expected: week 4 / minggu 4 Week 4 At this time, it has already attached to the uterine wall and the fertilized egg is called a blastocyst and consists of a group of cells that later develop into an embryo and its supporting structures. At 4 weeks of age, the embryo is about 0.35mm to 1mm in size. It consists of two layers of cells that will eventually form all of the baby’s organs and tissues. The outer layer will be the placenta and amniotic sac. Symptoms Hormones such as estrogen and progesterone will increase in your body to support pregnancy and prevent menstruation. You may begin to experience pregnancy symptoms such as feeling tired easily, nausea, and mood swings (you may feel more sensitive than usual). For some pregnant women, they have already started experiencing morning sickness (nausea). Tips for you This is the time for you to start taking Folic Acid. It is important for the early development of the baby in the womb. Folic acid helps the formation of the neural tube and helps reduce the risk of birth defects such as spina bifida and anencephaly.If you are experiencing morning sickness, avoid eating large portions because it can easily make you feel nauseous. Instead, try to eat food with a small portion (quantity) but often. Avoid spicy, fried, fatty and caffeine foods. It triggers nausea. Chewing ginger candy or drinking ginger tea helps reduce nausea because ginger has natural anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce nausea. Stay hydrated by drinking enough water. Get enough rest so you have more energy the next day. Don’t worry, usually morning sickness will improve as the gestational age increases. Sono Ultrasound You can now start making an appointment called a Growth Scan to check your content later. Growth Scan will usually check the size of the sac, the gestational age and the position of the sac (to ensure whether it is in the uterus).

input: Pregnancy Week 5: Key Symptoms & Your Baby's Development
expected: WEEK 5 / MINGGU 5 Week 5 Usually, this is when many women realize they are pregnant. If you haven’t taken a pregnancy test, now is the time because your hCG Levels have increased. At 5 weeks of age, the fetal heart has begun to form and beat. The embryo is about 2mm long. The nervous system is also developing and the brain and spinal cord are forming. It also already has some of its own blood vessels and forms the umbilical cord that serves to send all the needs of the fetus from the placenta. Symptoms This week you may urinate more often than usual, feel nauseous, feel pain in your breasts (breasts feel more sensitive), bloating and you will be more sensitive and sensitive to smells. Tips for you If you feel pain and sensitivity in the breast, where some women feel pain in the areola area, wear cotton-based and loose clothing. Flatulence during pregnancy can be reduced by avoiding high-fat foods and reducing foods that contribute to flatulence such as cabbage, beans and broccoli.

input: Pregnancy Week 6: Common Symptoms & What to Expect on a Scan
expected: week 6 / minggu 6 Week 6 In the sixth week, the eyes and ears of the fetus begin to appear, as well as the rapidly growing part of the brain. The head looks bigger than the rest of the body, curved and looks like a tail at the end of the body. Hands and feet have also started to form (known as limb buds). The embryo is covered with a thin layer of transparent skin. Symptoms Some pregnant women also experience headaches, morning sickness, nausea. There are also those who cannot eat well (do not eat). Emotional changes are also often associated during pregnancy. During pregnancy, the body undergoes significant hormonal changes. Estrogen and progesterone levels rise rapidly and cause emotional changes. Tips for you Practice a healthy diet during pregnancy, eating nutritious food is important for the well-being of you and your baby. If you can’t eat well (don’t eat), drink enough water, eat small amounts but often and take the vitamins recommended for you. Sono Ultrasound The sixth week is the perfect week to do the first ultrasound scan of your pregnancy. Sac size measurement, due date or EDD will be calculated. Ultrasound will determine how many weeks pregnant you are based on the size of the fetus. While the fetal heartbeat will also be checked usually starting around 6 weeks and above. Through Ultrasound will also determine if you are pregnant with one or more fetuses.

input: Pregnancy Week 7: Managing Symptoms & Baby's Growth Spurt
expected: week 7 / minggu 7 Week 7 Your uterus is growing to accommodate the fetus in the womb. The size of the embryo is the size of a grape. At this stage, many organs and systems of the embryo begin to form and develop. Among them are the eyelids and ears, the digestive tract is also being formed, including the stomach, esophagus and intestines. The heart also beats and pumps blood through the developing circulatory system. Symptoms For those of you who are still experiencing morning sickness, don’t worry because morning sickness will usually go away as soon as you enter the second trimester. Other symptoms are sensitive breasts, significant emotional changes, more sensitive to smells, some women may experience a ‘cream’ on the stomach. Tips for you It is important that you take care of your health and content by eating a healthy diet, doing appropriate exercise and avoiding harmful substances such as alcohol and tobacco. If you are concerned about the symptoms you experience such as cream and ‘spotting’ get advice and examination immediately. Don’t forget your health checkup appointment, prenatal care & ultrasound checkup to monitor the development of your fetus. Sono Ultrasound During the 7-week ultrasound session, several important things can be detected, including the gestational sac. It is a fluid-filled sac that surrounds the developing fetus. The embryo can usually be seen as a small flickering shape inside the gestational sac.

input: Pregnancy Week 8: Your Baby is Now a Fetus | Milestones
expected: week 8 / minggu 8 Week 8 Now, the fetus is about 16mm. The arms of the fetus are already getting longer and bigger than the legs because the upper part of the body grows faster than the lower part. Ankles, knees, fingers and thighs have not yet developed in the legs. At this stage, many body systems and organs and major body systems have begun to form. It includes the brain, heart, liver, nervous system, kidneys and intestines. The amniotic sac, which is filled with amniotic fluid, also helps protect the baby and acts like a ‘cushion’ by absorbing any external pressure or impact. Symptoms You may feel tired and listless. Even some pregnant women find they urinate more often. It happens when your expanding uterus presses on your bladder. Tips for you If you find yourself urinating frequently, and it’s affecting your sleep, try drinking plenty of fluids during the day but less at night.

input: Preventive Health Screening in Malaysia | Early Detection & Full Body Check-Up (part 4)
expected: 577226 Selatan/Pahang/Sabah/Sarawak : 014-9317226 Complain/Collaboration : 018-2567226 Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) about health screening 1. What is included in a full body ultrasound screening? A full body ultrasound screening typically includes the liver, kidneys, gallbladder, pancreas (where visible), bladder, uterus or prostate, and may also include breast or scrotum scans.Optional add-on screenings such as carotid artery screening may be available. 2. How often should I go for a health screening? For general wellness, once a year is commonly recommended. Individuals with existing medical conditions, symptoms, or a family history of certain illnesses may choose to screen more frequently, based on their doctor’s advice. 3. Do I need to fast before an ultrasound health screening? Yes. For upper abdominal scans, fasting for at least 8 hours is usually required.For pelvic scans, a full bladder is typically needed. Our team will provide preparation instructions before your appointment. 4. Can I get my results digitally? Yes. All ultrasound images and reports are securely delivered via the Flabee Care App, allowing convenient access anytime. 5. Is this screening HRDF claimable? Yes. Ultrasound health screening is HRDF claimable for corporate group screening programmes. We will provide the necessary supporting documentation. 6. Does an ultrasound health screening include blood tests? Ultrasound screening and blood tests are different but complementary. Blood tests can be added as an optional package, depending on your needs.Blood tests may help assess general health indicators such as cholesterol, blood sugar, liver function, and kidney function. 7. Should I do both ultrasound and blood tests? Many people choose to combine ultrasound screening with blood tests for a more comprehensive overview of their health. Your doctor can advise which combination is suitable for you. 8. Is ultrasound health screening painful or invasive? No.

input: Preventive Health Screening in Malaysia | Early Detection & Full Body Check-Up (part 5)
expected: screening with blood tests for a more comprehensive overview of their health. Your doctor can advise which combination is suitable for you. 8. Is ultrasound health screening painful or invasive? No. Ultrasound screening is non-invasive, does not involve radiation, and is generally painless. Some mild pressure may be felt during the scan. 9. Can ultrasound screening detect all diseases? No. Ultrasound screening is a screening tool, not a diagnostic test. It helps identify areas that may need further medical review, but it cannot detect all conditions. 10. What if the screening shows something unusual? If an image requires further clarification, you will be advised to follow up with your doctor. Your doctor may recommend additional tests or specialist consultation if needed. 11. Do I still need to see a doctor after screening? Yes. Ultrasound health screening does not replace medical consultation. Results should always be reviewed and interpreted by your doctor as part of your overall health care. 12. How long does a full body ultrasound screening take? A full body ultrasound screening usually takes 30–60 minutes, depending on the number of areas screened and image visibility.Important note:Ultrasound health screening is intended for screening and wellness purposes only. It does not provide a diagnosis and does not replace consultation, investigation, or treatment by a medical doctor. 13. Is a radiologist report compulsory for ultrasound health screening? No. A radiologist report is not compulsory for ultrasound health screening. Many people choose screening for general wellness and reassurance, and may opt to review the images with their own doctor if needed.However, a radiologist report can be added as an optional service for those who prefer a formal written review to share with their doctor or for personal records. 14. Can the result report be used for insurance purposes? Yes.

expected: ort can be added as an optional service for those who prefer a formal written review to share with their doctor or for personal records. 14. Can the result report be used for insurance purposes? Yes. Ultrasound screening reports that are reviewed and verified by our radiologist may be used for insurance-related purposes. Acceptance is subject to the insurance provider’s terms and requirements.We recommend checking with your insurer in advance to confirm their documentation criteria. 15. Do I need to bring someone along for a scrotum scan? Yes. For comfort, safety, and professional practice, patients undergoing a scrotum ultrasound scan are required to bring one accompanying person. This person may be a family member or trusted companion.Our team will ensure the procedure is conducted respectfully and professionally at all times. 16. Are there any risks from an ultrasound scan? Ultrasound has been used for many years and does not involve radiation. When performed by trained professionals and in accordance with recommended practices, it is generally considered safe.Ultrasound scans are non-invasive and most people experience no discomfort or only mild pressure during the procedure. As with any medical procedure, scans are performed responsibly and only when appropriate. 17. I received a referral letter from the hospital. Do you accept it? Yes. We accept referral letters from hospitals and clinics for ultrasound services. Please bring the referral letter with you on the day of your appointment so our team can review it before the scan.If you have any questions about the referral or the type of scan required, feel free to contact us in advance and we’ll be happy to assist.

expected: The very nature of Sono-Ultrasond.com business is such that the collection, use and disclosure of personal information is fundamental to the products and services we provide. We work hard to respect and maintain personal privacy and accordingly align this policy with the Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (“PDPA”) when collecting, holding, processing or using Personal Data in Malaysia. We are equally committed to ensuring that all our employees and agents uphold these obligations. Under the PDPA, Sono-Ultrasond.com is bound to the following obligations with respect to your Personal Data: ConsentPurpose LimitationNotificationAccess & CorrectionAccuracyProtectionRetentionTransfer LimitationOpennessOther Rights, Obligations and Uses What This Privacy Statement ExplainsWhat kind of personal information we collectHow we collect your personal informationHow we use your personal informationWhen we disclose your personal informationWhen we transfer your personal information abroadYour right to access and correct your personal information Our Commitment to You We value your trust and are committed to protecting your personal information. To ensure that you can make informed decisions and feel confident about supplying your Personal Information to us, we provide you with this Privacy Statement outlining our practices and the choices you have concerning how your Personal Information is being collected and used by us. Defining Personal Information Personal information refers to any information which relates directly or indirectly to you. This includes any information that can be used to distinguish, identify or contact you. For the purposes of this Privacy Statement, personal information encompasses sensitive personal information which relates to information relating to your health. For the avoidance of doubt, please note that this Privacy Statement is applicable only if you are a natural person / an individual.

input: Radiologist versus Sonographer: A Clear Guide to Their Distinct Roles
expected: Radiologist Vs Sonographer: A global guide to roles, responsibilities, and reporting authority. Ultrasound imaging stands as one of the most widely used and vital diagnostic tools in modern medicine, providing real-time insights into the body’s internal structures. Across clinics and hospitals worldwide, two key professionals are central to this process: the radiologist and the sonographer. While both are indispensable to medical imaging services and often work in close collaboration, their training, scope of practice, and diagnostic authority differ significantly. Understanding these distinctions is not just a matter of professional demarcation—it is crucial for ensuring efficient workflow, accurate diagnosis, and optimal patient care. This article explores the key differences between radiologists and sonographers through the lens of leading international guidelines, with special focus on Malaysian qualifications and pathways.

does not issue final diagnosis in most countries (varies by region) Typical Responsibilities • Supervise and review ultrasound studies• Correlate imaging with clinical history & lab results• Perform complex or interventional scans• Decide follow-up care and additional imaging • Perform scanning following protocols (AIUM/ISUOG)• Optimize image settings• Document findings• Identify and flag abnormalities• Ensure patient comfort and safety Guideline Compliance Ensures diagnostic accuracy per ACR, RCR, and WHO standards; The Sonographer's Path to Expertise In Malaysia, aspiring sonographers can pursue structured qualifications through accredited institutions like DACAS College, which offers a comprehensive medical sonography program. The college provides MQA-accredited certification that meets national standards for ultrasound education. Graduates of this program are recognized as certified sonographers equipped with both theoretical knowledge and practical skills essential for clinical practice.The JPK NOSS Level 4 Medical Sonography qualification represents a standardized competency framework endorsed by the Department of Skills Development (JPK) in Malaysia. This credential ensures that certified sonographers possess the technical expertise required for:Operating state-of-the-art ultrasound equipmentApplying standardized scanning protocolsCapturing diagnostic-quality images across various anatomical regionsMaintaining patient safety and comfort during examinationsFor those seeking a convenient and flexible entry into the field, Sonobee Ultrasound offers accessible learning pathways. As a specialized training and professional development platform operating under the same holding company as DACAS College, Sonobee connects students directly to accredited education. All qualified Sonobee sonographers hold certifications from DACAS College, ensuring they meet rigorous MQA-accredited standards. Together, these platforms form an integrated ecosystem that bridges formal education, hands-on clinical training, and professional practice, creating a clear and supported route from learning to career in medical sonography.

input: Radiologist versus Sonographer: A Clear Guide to Their Distinct Roles (part 5)
expected: s form an integrated ecosystem that bridges formal education, hands-on clinical training, and professional practice, creating a clear and supported route from learning to career in medical sonography.Prospective students can explore accredited certification programs, admission requirements, and career prospects in medical sonography at https://dacascollege.com/ with the added advantage of real-world exposure and industry alignment across the Sonobee ecosystem.Sonographers proficiently perform a vast majority of routine examinations, including:Basic obstetric and gynecological screeningsAbdominal and pelvic ultrasounds screeningsVascular screeningsMusculoskeletal screenings.Precise biometric or anatomy measurements per ISUOG or AIUM protocols The Radiologist’s Medical JourneyA radiologist, in contrast, is a licensed medical doctor (MD or DO) who has completed medical school, a residency program in diagnostic radiology, and often a subspecialty fellowship. Their training encompasses the interpretation of all imaging modalities—including X-ray, CT, MRI, and ultrasound—and correlating these findings with a patient’s clinical picture. According to guidelines from the American College of Radiology (ACR) and the Royal College of Radiologists (RCR), the ultimate responsibility for image interpretation and diagnosis rests with a qualified physician, typically the radiologist.Scope of Practice & Daily ResponsibilitiesThe day-to-day roles of these professionals are complementary but distinct, forming a cohesive diagnostic team. Sonographer Responsibilities Guided by standards from the American Institute of Ultrasound in Medicine (AIUM) and the Society of Diagnostic Medical Sonography (SDMS), the sonographer’s primary duty is to perform the ultrasound examination. This involves:Operating the ultrasound equipment and optimizing technical settings (e.g., gain, depth, Doppler).Following standardized scanning protocols to ensure comprehensive image acquisition.

input: Radiologist versus Sonographer: A Clear Guide to Their Distinct Roles (part 6)
expected: on. This involves:Operating the ultrasound equipment and optimizing technical settings (e.g., gain, depth, Doppler).Following standardized scanning protocols to ensure comprehensive image acquisition.Identifying, capturing, and documenting normal and abnormal findings.Communicating any urgent or significant preliminary observations to the supervising radiologist or referring clinician.Ensuring patient comfort and safety during the procedure.While sonographers possess deep expertise in anatomy and pathology, their role in most countries is to describe what they see, not to deliver a final, definitive diagnosis to the patient.Radiologist ResponsibilitiesAs defined by the ACR and RCR, the radiologist’s role is interpretive and diagnostic. Their responsibilities include:Reviewing all images acquired by the sonographer clarification.Interpreting the ultrasound findings within the full context of the patient’s medical history, lab results, and prior imaging.Providing an official, diagnostic medical report that offers a conclusion or differential diagnosis.Recommending appropriate follow-up investigations, additional imaging, or treatment pathways.Performing and interpreting more complex or interventional ultrasound procedures, such as biopsies. Diagnostic Authority: Who Provides the Final Report? This is a critical distinction with clear international consensus. The sonographer provides a vital technical impression and is essential for flagging abnormalities. In some regions, they may issue preliminary notes. However, in most healthcare systems worldwide, they do not hold the legal authority to issue a final, binding diagnostic report.The radiologist holds the full diagnostic authority. They synthesize the sonographer’s images and observations with their medical expertise to confirm or exclude disease, communicate final results to the referring physician, and sign the official report.

input: Radiologist versus Sonographer: A Clear Guide to Their Distinct Roles (part 7)
expected: ey synthesize the sonographer’s images and observations with their medical expertise to confirm or exclude disease, communicate final results to the referring physician, and sign the official report. The ACR explicitly states that the interpreting physician is responsible for the diagnosis and the content of the report. Handling Case ComplexityBoth professionals handle a range of cases, but the level of complexity often determines their direct involvement.Sonographers proficiently perform a vast majority of routine examinations, including:Standard obstetric and gynecological scansAbdominal and pelvic ultrasoundsVascular screeningsMusculoskeletal assessmentsPrecise biometric measurements per ISUOG or AIUM protocolsRadiologists are particularly integral for:Evaluating complex, non-routine, or equivocal cases.Confirming suspected fetal anomalies identified in initial scans.Characterizing tumors and complex masses.Integrating ultrasound findings with CT, MRI, or PET scans.Performing and guiding interventional procedures. Standardized Workflow: A Best-Practice ModelInternational guidelines promote a collaborative workflow that leverages the strengths of both roles to ensure patient safety and diagnostic accuracy. The AIUM, ACR, and RCR endorse a standard model:The Sonographer performs the scan:They acquire comprehensive images, document key findings, and flag any immediate concerns.The Radiologist reviews the study:They interpret the entire image set, correlate it with clinical data, and may perform a limited additional scan.The Radiologist issues the final report:A formal diagnostic report is generated and sent to the referring clinician, who manages the patient’s ongoing care. This synergistic model is considered the gold standard, ensuring that the technical excellence of the sonographer is seamlessly combined with the diagnostic expertise of the radiologist.

input: Radiologist versus Sonographer: A Clear Guide to Their Distinct Roles (part 8)
expected: ngoing care. This synergistic model is considered the gold standard, ensuring that the technical excellence of the sonographer is seamlessly combined with the diagnostic expertise of the radiologist. Conclusion: A Complementary Partnership The relationship between the radiologist and the sonographer is fundamentally collaborative, not hierarchical. One is not superior to the other; they are specialized experts working in tandem. The sonographer’s technical skill in image acquisition—whether gained through international certification or through accredited Malaysian programs like DACAS College’s MQA-accredited courses—combined with the radiologist’s medical expertise in interpretation creates a checks-and-balances system that elevates the quality of care. For patients, understanding this team-based approach can provide reassurance that their ultrasound examination benefits from a dual layer of expert analysis, ultimately leading to more accurate diagnoses and effective treatment plans guided by global best practices. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) 1. What is the main difference between a radiologist and a sonographer? The key difference lies in their training and primary role. A sonographer is a highly skilled allied health professional trained to perform ultrasound scans and acquire diagnostic images. A radiologist is a licensed medical doctor who specializes in interpreting those images, providing a diagnosis, and issuing the final medical report. Think of it this way: the sonographer is the expert in taking the picture, and the radiologist is the expert in reading and interpreting the picture. 2. Can a sonographer give me my diagnosis or tell me what's wrong during the scan? In most countries, including Malaysia, sonographers cannot provide a final diagnosis. Their role is to capture high-quality images and document what they see.

input: Radiologist versus Sonographer: A Clear Guide to Their Distinct Roles (part 9)
expected: or tell me what's wrong during the scan? In most countries, including Malaysia, sonographers cannot provide a final diagnosis. Their role is to capture high-quality images and document what they see. They may explain the procedure and what they are looking at in general terms, but they are ethically and legally required to defer diagnostic interpretation to the radiologist. The official results and diagnosis will come from the radiologist’s report, which is sent to your referring doctor. 3. Do I ever see the radiologist during my ultrasound? Typically, you will interact directly with the sonographer for the duration of the scan. The radiologist usually works behind the scenes, reviewing the images after the scan is complete. However, in complex cases or for certain interventional procedures (like a biopsy), the radiologist may perform or directly supervise the scan. 4. How do I become a certified sonographer in Malaysia? You can pursue a formal qualification such as the JPK NOSS Level 4 in Medical Sonography. Institutions like DACAS College offer MQA-accredited programs that provide the necessary theoretical knowledge and clinical training. These programs are designed to prepare you for professional certification and clinical practice. Flexible learning options are also available through platforms like Sonobee (https://dacascollege.com/). 5. What does "MQA-accredited" mean for a sonography program? MQA (Malaysian Qualifications Agency) accreditation is a national quality assurance. It means the sonography program at an institution like DACAS College meets stringent standards for curriculum, teaching quality, and student outcomes set by the Malaysian government. An MQA-accredited qualification is widely recognized and respected by employers in both the public and private healthcare sectors. 6. Is a radiologist's report always necessary after an ultrasound? Yes.

input: Radiologist versus Sonographer: A Clear Guide to Their Distinct Roles (part 10)
expected: MQA-accredited qualification is widely recognized and respected by employers in both the public and private healthcare sectors. 6. Is a radiologist's report always necessary after an ultrasound? Yes. According to international guidelines from bodies like the ACR and RCR, a formal report by a qualified physician (the radiologist) is the standard of care. This report is the legal document that contains the diagnosis and guides your treatment. The images alone, without expert interpretation, are not considered a complete medical examination. 7. Who is more accurate—the sonographer or the radiologist? This is not a matter of one being more accurate than the other; they provide different types of accuracy in a team-based model. The sonographer’s accuracy is in image acquisition—getting the clearest, most complete pictures possible. The radiologist’s accuracy is in image interpretation and diagnosis—using their medical expertise to understand what those pictures mean for your health. The system is designed so that their combined expertise ensures the highest possible diagnostic accuracy. 8. Can a sonographer specialize in a specific area like a radiologist can? Absolutely. Sonographers often pursue specializations in areas such as: Obstetrics & Gynecology (OB/GYN): Focusing on pregnancies and female reproductive health. Abdominal Sonography: Imaging organs like the liver, kidneys, and gallbladder. Vascular Sonography: Studying blood flow and vessels. Musculoskeletal (MSK) Sonography: Imaging muscles, tendons, and joints. These specializations involve additional training and certification (e.g., through ARDMS specialty exams). 9. Why is there sometimes a wait for my ultrasound results? The delay is usually due to the collaborative workflow. After your scan, the sonographer must prepare the image set.

input: Radiologist versus Sonographer: A Clear Guide to Their Distinct Roles (part 11)
expected: RDMS specialty exams). 9. Why is there sometimes a wait for my ultrasound results? The delay is usually due to the collaborative workflow. After your scan, the sonographer must prepare the image set. The radiologist then needs adequate time to thoroughly review all the images, possibly compare them with your previous scans or other tests, consult medical references if needed, and dictate a detailed, accurate report. This careful process is essential for your safety and ensures you receive a correct diagnosis. 10. If the roles are so different, why is their partnership so important? The radiologist-sonographer partnership is the cornerstone of quality ultrasound care. It creates a system of checks and balances. The sonographer’s technical skill ensures the radiologist has excellent images to interpret. The radiologist’s medical training provides the clinical context for a definitive diagnosis. This collaboration minimizes errors, enhances patient safety, and ensures that you benefit from two layers of specialized expertise. Disclaimer: The information provided in this article is for educational and informational purposes only. It is based on international guidelines and general practices, and is not intended as medical advice, a substitute for professional medical consultation, or a definitive guide to scope of practice. Clinical roles, regulatory requirements, and reporting authority for radiologists and sonographers can vary significantly by country, region, and healthcare institution. Always consult with qualified healthcare providers and relevant national regulatory bodies for guidance specific to your situation. input: Sonobee Ultrasound Marks a New Era in Mother & Baby Care with the Grand Launch of the Bebee App | Private Ultrasound Scan Centers in Malaysia
expected: Sonobee Ultrasound Marks a New Era in Mother & Baby Care with the Grand Launch of the Bebee App The world of maternal care is evolving, and Sonobee Ultrasound is at the forefront of this transformation. In an electrifying event filled with energy, innovation, and heartfelt connections, Sonobee Ultrasound proudly launched the BeBee App, a game-changing platform designed to support mothers from pregnancy through postpartum. This remarkable occasion was not just a celebration—it was a bold step towards redefining the parenting experience. A Celebration Unlike Any Other The morning kicked off with a bang as Zumba by Izabella set the stage with an invigorating performance. The high-energy session wasn’t just about movement—it was a symbol of the vitality and strength that defines motherhood.As the excitement settled, guests were taken on an exclusive tour of Sono Holding’s ultrasound center, offering a behind-the-scenes look at Sonobee Ultrasound’s facilities. The journey continued to the BeBee Automation Store, where attendees witnessed firsthand how BeBee is revolutionizing shopping for mothers and babies. The Famalove Pharmacy Corner, Vitachoc Lactation Cookie, DBidan Massage Center, and Dacas College.Then came the moment everyone had been waiting for—the official launch of the BeBee App. Bebee App: A New Beginning for Parents With great anticipation, the Bebee App was officially introduced, marking the beginning of a new digital era for mothers. Designed to simplify, support, and enhance the motherhood journey, Bebee offers an all-in-one solution for pregnancy guidance, baby care essentials, expert advice, and seamless shopping.To give attendees a deeper understanding of the platform, a live demonstration of the Bebee App’s powerful features took place, highlighting its user-friendly interface and innovative approach to parenthood. The excitement didn’t stop there.

As we move forward, our mission remains clear: to empower parents with the best tools, support, and resources available.

This scan is used to determine the sex of the baby. These services can help diagnose and monitor a variety of health conditions, from breast lumps and uterine fibroids to liver disease and kidney stones.Breast ultrasound is used to evaluate breast tissue, while uterus ultrasound can help diagnose conditions such as endometriosis and uterine fibroids. Abdomen ultrasound can provide detailed images of the abdominal organs, including the liver and kidneys, while kidney ultrasound can help diagnose conditions such as kidney stones and cysts. Scrotum ultrasound can help diagnose conditions affecting the male reproductive organs, while transvaginal ultrasound can provide detailed images of the female reproductive organs. Ocular ultrasound can help diagnose eye conditions and injuries.At Sonobee Ultrasound, we understand the importance of early detection and diagnosis in maintaining good health.
